title: Full-stack developer (PHP + TS)
descriptionHtml:
About us:

Planner 5D is a global hub for home design, uniting over 100+ million users in 230 territories around our planet (yes, we have 2 users connecting from Antarctica each month!). Our platform simplifies the home renovation process from concept to execution, and this process has never been more straightforward with our cutting-edge software. You don't need to be a professional designer to enhance your home or workspace. We are dedicated to streamlining the design experience, making the customization of dream homes accessible to everyone.

Our cross-platform presence spans Web, iOS, Android, Windows, and MacOS, ensuring seamless synchronization for our users. Planner 5D is more than just software; it's a vibrant community of enthusiastic and product-oriented professionals. From diverse backgrounds, our team collaborates across time zones, fueled by a shared passion to revolutionize the home design market.

We are constantly looking for like-minded talent eager to take ownership and drive innovation within our expanding suite of tools. Join us in shaping the future of home design.

We are searching for senior full-stack web developer who will join our web team and work on new features, improving and maintaining our current solution.

Our tech stack: PHP 7.4(8.1), Symfony, PHPUnit, MySQL, Redis, MongoDB, RabbitMQ, Git., Docker.

For front-end part: native Javascript, JQuery(legacy code), Typescript, Three.js(OpenGL), Webpack, Websocket, Jest (unit tests), Docker, SVG.

Requirements

  • 4+ years of experience of Web development
  • Intermediate in English


Required Knowledge Of

  • PHP - popular frameworks, libraries, ..
  • JavaScript
  • TypeScript
  • Popular frameworks and libraries (at least jQuery)
  • ECMAScript 6+
  • CSS
  • Data - SQL (SQLite, MySQL, PosgreSQL, ...), Memcached, Redis, MongoDB, Message Queues, ..
  • 2D and 3D graphics (for example Canvas, WebGL, OpenGL, ...)
  • Supporting technologies - REST, JSON, XML, HTML, Git, Protobuf, ..
  • Payment systems / APIs (PayPal, Stripe, Apple / Google payment processing, ...)
  • How to write clean and maintainable code
  • Best practices in security, performance, memory management, maintainability, data structure, ..
  • Good understanding of server infrastructure, web protocols (HTTP, Web Sockets, ...)
  • Ecosystem


Nice to have

  • Understanding of mathematics, geometry
  • Understanding of Russian or Lithuanian languages
  • Some knowledge of Laravel, Symfony, Doctrine, AngularJs, ReactJS, VueJS, LESS, SASS, Bootstrap, ..


Character Requirements

  • Should like your job
  • Great communication and analytical skills
  • Wish to learn, use and understand new technologies
  • Passionate about software development and striving for the newest technologies
  • Has hobbies related to technologies (programming, micro controllers, 3D printing, physics, mathematics, ...)
  • Should be able to understand tasks, and express himself to others (essentially to properly communicate in our team)


What we offer:

  • Great work environment that balances freedom and responsibility
  • Our team is made up of friendly and passionate enthusiasts who are eager to help and share their knowledge
  • We believe in work-life balance, so you'll receive around 30+ days of paid holidays per year
  • Company computer equipment by request
  • Education courses for our team members, and we're willing to allocate funds toward your training expenses
  • English classes on our corporate platform
  • Offline company events in Lithuania and online team-building
  • Unlimited free Planner5D subscriptions


Note: We only consider applications from candidates currently based in locations: Lithuania or Netherlands. Visa sponsorship is available if you hold primary residence with work authorization.

companySlogan: Make your home a better place! Planner 5D is a popular home improvement and interior design platform used by 77M+ users
companyDescription: Make your home a better place! Planner 5D is a popular home improvement and interior design platform used by 77+ million users worldwide...

title: Front-end developer
descriptionHtml:
Ons webshop team zoekt een

Front-end developer

Alkmaar

24-38u per week

MBO-HBO werk-/denkniveau

Zorg jij ervoor dat onze webshops er tot de laatste pixel perfect uitziet en minstens net zo gebruiksvriendelijk werken? En heb je eerder gewerkt met open source systemen? Dan zijn we bij All4running op zoek naar jou!

Als Front-end Developer werk je met andere teams samen om onze webshop zo optimaal mogelijk te laten werken en zo onze klanten blij te maken. Als scale-up zijn we de laatste jaren sterk gegroeid in omzet en werknemers en hebben we onze deuren geopend in o.a. Duitsland en Zweden. Voor onze internationale groeiambitie zoeken we daarom een front-end developer die hier graag onderdeel van wil zijn. Samen werken we aan het beste en grootste online running platform van Europa.

Je werkt samen met een team van developers, designers, marketeers en data-analisten. Omdat je jezelf graag verder wilt ontwikkelen, kijk je veel met je collega’s mee en volg je verschillende trainingen. In de sprints pak je ook je eigen taken op om meteen mee te bouwen aan onze online platformen. Als front-end developer bij All4running werk je in een klein, maar ambitieus team waarin samen kwaliteit leveren centraal staat.

We werken op basis van een Agile werkwijze waarbij we in kleine teams snel resultaten boeken. Wat je vandaag bedenkt, kan enkele dagen later al online staan. Of je het nu leuk vindt om de mooiste animaties te bouwen of om mee te werken aan het ontwikkelen van onze checkout, bij ons kun je jezelf vormen op een manier die het beste bij jouw ambitie past.

Wat ga je doen?

Als front-end developer zorg je ervoor dat onze webshops en applicaties perfect werken en er super strak uitzien. Jij vindt het belangrijk dat het er tot de laatste pixel perfect uitziet en minstens net zo gebruiksvriendelijk werkt. Je werkt hierbij graag met de nieuwste technieken en doet geen concessies voor het mooiste eindresultaat. Je werkt graag samen met andere specialisten om tot de beste oplossingen te komen. Door middel van code reviews, R&D tijd en trainingen zorg jij ervoor dat we de rest altijd een stapje voor zijn.

We maken gebruik van Hÿva binnen Magento. Ervaring hiermee of Alpine.js/tailwind is een pré.

Je vindt het leuk om:

  • De netste code te schrijven of de mooiste animaties uit te denken;
  • Samen te werken met onze developers, designers en marketeers om onze webshops nóg beter te maken;
  • Collega’s en jezelf te helpen via pull requests, code reviewing en pair programming;
  • Nieuwe ideeën en technieken ontwikkelen tijdens jouw R&D tijd.

Wat vragen wij van je?

  • Je hebt goede kennis van technieken als HTML en CSS.
  • Je hebt ervaring met het programmeren in Javascript
  • Ervaring met het Magento framework is een pré.
  • Ervaring met techniek als React.js, Vue.js, Alpine.js is een pré.
  • Tussen de 24 en 38 uur per week beschikbaar.
  • Minimaal 3 jaar werkervaring als front-end developer.
  • Beschikbaar om op ons kantoor in Alkmaar te werken.

Wat bieden wij?

  • Een job in een sterk groeiende organisatie met de ambitie om de grootste running specialist in Europa te worden.
  • Leuke werksfeer met gepassioneerde en sportieve collega’s.
  • Korting op de producten die we bij All4running verkopen.
  • Een werkplek in de kantoorruimte van ons nieuw opgeleverde magazijn en thuiswerkmogelijkheden.
  • Een salaris tussen €3189,- en €4483,- afhankelijk van relevante werkervaring / skills
  • Pensioenregeling
  • Startbewijs voor hardloopevenementen
  • Reiskostenvergoeding, vanaf 12,5 km enkele reis woon-werk

Werken bij All4running

Liefde voor de sport en voor hardlopen in het bijzonder. Dat is wat ons bij All4running drijft. Onze winnaarsmentaliteit gecombineerd met onze vakkennis maakt dat wij als hardloopspecialisten altijd streven naar het aanbieden van de beste producten. Maar met dat alleen nemen we geen genoegen. Die specialistische producten van hoge kwaliteit bieden we aan met de beste service. Die service naar de hardloper, onze vakkennis en liefde voor de loopsport voeren bij ons daarom altijd de boventoon. Zowel in onze winkels, in onze webshop als binnen ons team.

companySlogan: Building The Future of Running Retail
companyDescription: All4running is the most progressive and leading running specialist in the Netherlands and Flanders. With web shops; all4running.nl, all4running.be and stores; Flagship store Alkmaar and All4running Shoe Advisors in Amsterdam and Utrecht. Besides this, the organisations serves with the web shop 21RUN.com runners from Germany, Denmark and Sweden. At All4running and 21RUN runners receive specialist products with the highest quality, combined with the best service.  The service to the runners, professional knowledge and love for running have always been predominated: in the stores, the web shops and within the team. The interaction between the stores and web shop is important within the company. As a single entity, All4running/21RUN strives to become the largest running specialist in Europe.

title: Frontend Developer
descriptionHtml:
Over de functie();

Als frontender bij Bold werk je zelfstandig samen (ja, dat kan) met een compact team van ervaren webdesigners, Magento developers en e-commerce experts om gebruiksvriendelijke, mooie, stabiele, snelle, converterende storefronts te bouwen.

Soms gaat dat om het bouwen van mooie frontends voor nieuwe webshops, soms om het uitbreiden of verbeteren van bestaande shops. In beide gevallen streven we naar passende en kwalitatieve oplossingen.

Functie

Frontend developer (medior, senior)

Werkzaamheden

Javascript, Html, SCSS, Vue, Nuxt, Rest Api, GraphQL, ElasticSearch, TailwindCSS, AlpineJS, Gulp, Node, Git.

(jij hebt als tech-enthousiast ongetwijfeld nog veel moois aan dit lijstje toe te voegen)

Dienstverband

Fulltime (32 - 40 uur)

Indicatie werkniveau

HBO, WO

Locatie

Amsterdam

Je salaris en secundaire arbeidsvoorwaarden stellen we vast in goed overleg. Als we bij elkaar passen komen we daar zeker uit.

companySlogan: Strategic and technical excellence in e-commerce
companyDescription:
Bold Commerce | Your Strategic E-commerce Partner

We are Bold Commerce, a dedicated team with the ambition to elevate your webshop to the next level.

What we do:
We build, and maintain custom webshops using Magento Open Source, Adobe Commerce, Hyvä, and Shopify Plus. Our solutions are built with a focus on innovation, performance, scalability, and future readiness, always aligned with your unique goals.

Our approach:
We act as the central hub in your e-commerce ecosystem, seamlessly integrating with design, marketing, logistics and finance. Using a tailored Scrum methodology and short sprints, we deliver efficiently and transparently.

We build long-term partnerships, stay hands-on throughout the process, and pursue both technical excellence and customer-focused growth.

Our promise:
* Expertise: in-depth knowledge of complex e-commerce projects
* Strength: we translate your vision into a scalable platform that grows with your business
* Value: our commitment, focus on quality, and extensive experience make the difference

Trusted by leading brands:
Brands like Voorkappers, Akzo Nobel, Vlisco, Loavies, Datona, TennisDirect, and many others have partnered with Bold Commerce to achieve their e-commerce ambitions.

Why choose Bold?
✔️ One specialized team focused on Magento & Shopify Plus
✔️ Technical craftsmanship and strategic insight
✔️ Solution-oriented, involved, and forward-thinking
✔️ A reliable long-term partner for sustainable growth

Curious how we can take your shop to the next level? Let’s connect!

From check-out to checkout.

title: Frontend Developer
descriptionHtml:
Job Title: Frontend Developer

Location: Amsterdam, Netherlands


Role Overview:

We are seeking a skilled Frontend Developer with strong expertise in Angular to join our team in Amsterdam. The ideal candidate will be responsible for designing, building, verifying, and deploying software solutions while ensuring efficient, maintainable, and scalable code. You will also work on upgrading existing applications, troubleshooting, and debugging issues to deliver high-quality software.


Key Responsibilities:

Design, build, and deploy high-quality software solutions.

Write clean, efficient, and maintainable code.

Upgrade, enhance, and maintain existing applications.

Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software issues.

Collaborate with cross-functional teams in Agile/Scrum environments.

Perform unit testing to ensure reliability and performance of code.


Competencies:

Primary Technology: Angular 13+


Experience:

6–8 years of professional development experience.


Essential Skills (Must-Have):

Strong development experience in Angular (9 and above).

Proficiency in JavaScript and TypeScript.

Experience with Node.js.

Strong knowledge of HTML5 and CSS3.

Experience with unit testing frameworks (Jasmine, Karma).


Good-to-Have Skills:

Experience working in Scrum/Agile environments.

Familiarity with Docker and Tomcat.

Experience in CI/CD pipelines.

title: Freelance Frontend Developer
descriptionHtml:
Job Description

We are looking for a skilled and passionate freelance Frontend Developer to build and shape the user interfaces for a diverse range of digital products and client websites. This role is focused on creating high-quality, scalable, and visually polished web applications using our modern frontend stack. You will be a key member of our development team, turning design concepts into reality and ensuring a seamless user experience across multiple projects.

What We Need

  • Eye for Design: A strong sense of aesthetics and usability, with the ability to translate design concepts into beautiful, functional user interfaces.
  • Excellent Communicator & Team Player: Articulate, collaborative, and able to work effectively within a team environment, sharing ideas and feedback constructively.
  • Adaptable & Innovative Mindset: A natural curiosity and eagerness to explore new technologies and venture into uncharted territory. You shouldn't shy away from learning something new to solve a problem.
  • AI-Enhanced Workflow: Fully embraces AI technologies to optimize their workflow, from in-IDE assistants (like GitHub Copilot, Cursor) to external tools and command-line agents.
  • Knowledge of Design Systems: Experience with or a solid understanding of design systems is a significant plus. Familiarity with tools like Figma and Tokens Studio is highly valued.

What You’ll Do

  • Develop, test, and maintain high-quality user interfaces using React and Next.js.
  • Work closely with designers to translate Figma mockups and prototypes into pixel-perfect, responsive web pages.
  • Build and maintain our component library using Storybook and Vanilla Extract, ensuring components are reusable, accessible, and well-documented.
  • Leverage our design tokens pipeline (Tokens Studio) to ensure visual consistency across all products.
  • Optimize applications for maximum speed, scalability, and accessibility.
  • Collaborate with backend developers to integrate APIs and ensure a smooth end-to-end experience.

Key technical strengths we’re looking for

  • Core Frameworks: Strong proficiency in React and Next.js.
  • Headless CMS: Experience building sites powered by headless CMS platforms like Sanity (our default), Contentful, DatoCMS, or Strapi.
  • Styling & Components: Solid experience with CSS-in-JS solutions like Vanilla Extract and building component libraries with Storybook.
  • Build Tools: Familiarity with modern build tools like Vite.
  • Design Integration: Proven experience working with Figma and design token tools like Tokens Studio.
  • General Frontend: Deep understanding of HTML, CSS, JavaScript (ES6+), and web performance best practices.

This role begins in mid-September and continues through the end of the year. It’s a 40-hour-per-week position, and we ask that you be available to work on-site at our Amsterdam office at least one day a week. You’ll be joining a collaborative team working with a really cool tech stack in a lively and creative environment.

About Us

We’ve been exploring technology's potential to deliver breakthrough innovations since 1998. We believe that deep technical know-how combined with cutting-edge creativity drives change to future-proof businesses. Change relies on radical synergy. Technology and creativity should work in perfect unison. Tech enables creativity. Creativity unlocks the potential of tech.

Our track record of disruptive ventures and innovative ideas shows that we have transformative thinking deeply ingrained in our DNA. We punch above our weight when it comes to consulting, creating and maintaining digital ecosystems for global clients like VodafoneZiggo, Polestar, citizenM, and Philips. With a team of 450+ specialists across brand, experience, technology, and data & AI, we have the power to drive fundamental transformation at scale.

Diversity, Equity, Inclusion

Our people are a true cross-section of society. That’s how we ensure that the services, campaigns, and products we create uphold the same quality regardless of who interacts with them. We welcome everybody and respect individual identities. We are convinced that diversity stimulates creativity and ensures innovations.

With a team of 450+ specialists across brand, experience, technology, and data & AI, we have the power to drive fundamental transformation at scale.Diversity, Equity, InclusionOur people are a true cross-section of society. That’s how we ensure that the services, campaigns, and products we create uphold the same quality regardless of who interacts with them. We welcome everybody and respect individual identities. We are convinced that diversity stimulates creativity and ensures innovations.
companySlogan: A global technology and brand experience company.
companyDescription: We are Hypersolid. Digital transformation architects, working with ambitious clients who want to innovate at speed. We seamlessly blend deep technical know-how with world class design. Composing digital platforms & experiences that are flexible and distinctive by nature.

title: Front-End Developer
descriptionHtml:
What You Can Expect From The Work

  • You will be part of our growing Product Development team, which consists of product managers, designers, mobile developers, back-end developers and front-end developers
  • We deploy continuously and do peer reviews before pushing to main
  • Curiosity and taking initiative is really important. The product team is very autonomous and has a lot of freedom. Your contribution will have a huge impact. Your newly shipped feature will be used by thousands of our users immediately
  • You will be working with cutting edge technology and within a company where we always strive to update to the latest version
  • Technologies we use: Next.js, TypeScript, GraphQL, Jest, Playwright, CSS modules, Contentful, Storybook and GIT
  • You will be working on projects for your team and the front-end circle. For example building a brand new blog for marketing, improving the sellers experience and migrating the codebase to Turborepo


About You

  • You have 5 years of experience in building web apps with React or Next.js
  • You have some experience in coaching other developers
  • You love creating cool stuff and have a sharp eye for detail, a great user experience is valued a lot at TicketSwap
  • You are pragmatic and able to find the right balance between shipping knowing when to take time for a refactor
  • You know the latest standards in regards to semantic and accessible (a11y) HTML
  • You not only focus on the details, but also on performance and testing
  • You’re passionate about helping to grow and improve TicketSwap
  • You are based in The Netherlands, are an EU resident, or have an existing visa to work here. A relocation package is not provided


Excited and ready to join our team?

Research shows that women and those in traditionally underrepresented groups tend to apply only if they check all the boxes. That’s a shame, as we would love to build a diverse team. If you know you’ve ‘got what it takes’, but don’t meet every requirement for the role, we would still encourage you to apply.

TicketSwap is looking for the best and motivated talent out there no matter your nationality, gender, sexual preference or religious beliefs. 🚀

Click the button below and we'll get back to you as soon as possible! 💥

Proactive acquisition from 3rd parties is not appreciated.

jobPosterTitle: Corporate Recruiter at TicketSwap
companySlogan: The experience marketplace every fan loves.
companyDescription:
TicketSwap is a safe and easy app for fans to buy and sell tickets to their favourite concerts, festivals, sporting events, theatre shows and club nights.

With +11 million users in 36 countries, TicketSwap protects fans from overpricing by ensuring tickets are exchanged at fan-friendly rates. Together with its dedicated anti-fraud technology, the company is dedicated to offering a fair, safe and simple experience for fans attending more than 40,000 live events globally.

The journey we are on is to pursue technological advances and business growth with music fans: we want to change the world. By this we mean we will stick to our values in order to change the way the world sees the ticketing industry: we will bring fairness to the market, and we will continue to lobby policy-makers, work with event organizers, engage with artists and be a trusted partner to the fans. 

Born in Amsterdam and now with over 30 more nationalities, we thrive on diversity. The TicketSwap family is made up of young, enthusiastic, creative fans and we strive to always keep an inclusive work environment that all can enjoy from the moment they walk through our doors.

Diversity and inclusion of all types of people is what makes a company super-productive and amazing. At TicketSwap we really value individuality and authenticity. Always be yourself.

We're committed to creating and keeping an open and supportive work environment. This includes equal opportunity for hiring, promotions and personal development within the company regardless of one's sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, and the equal consideration for same and opposite sex partners or spouses.

Our Core Values

🕺Fan Fanatical - The fan's experience comes first.

✅ Get It Done -  Keep it simple.

💡 Embrace Change - Evolution is getting better through changes.

🤝 Own It - With great power comes great responsibility.

🚀 Create Impact - Smart in applying efforts and resources.

title: Creative frontend developer
descriptionHtml:
A media company with millions of monthly visitors is looking for a Frontend Developer who loves making real impact. You will work on platforms everyone knows and have the space to deliver pixel perfect, performant and scalable work.


Company profile

This company is an independent publisher with a portfolio full of well known online brands. Think of sites that have dominated the Dutch internet for years, now getting a modern revamp. Within the tech department of 20 people, frontend, backend and app developers build products that reach millions of people every day. No agencies, no client work – here you build your own platforms.


The atmosphere is open, pragmatic and people focused. Lines are short, leadership is involved and developers have a say. There is room for autonomy, personal growth and smart ideas.


Role description

As a Frontend Developer you will build the frontends of high traffic platforms. You translate interaction designers’ work into accessible, blazing fast interfaces that are also strong from an SEO perspective. You collaborate closely with designers, backend developers and DevOps engineers, and you take ownership of complete modules or features.

You work with modern tooling (Tailwind, HTML5, JavaScript) and contribute to UX, performance and consistency within the design system. AI is increasingly integrated into projects, and your input helps shape how.


Requirements

You have 3+ years of experience as a Frontend Developer and feel comfortable in an environment with millions of users.

You can work independently, have an eye for detail and understand how frontend and media reinforce each other.


You are strong in:

  • HTML5, CSS (SASS, BEM or similar structures) and JavaScript without relying on frameworks
  • Performance optimization, accessibility and SEO
  • Pixel perfect implementation with a pragmatic mindset

Nice to have:

  • Experience with Tailwind, templating (Blade, Django, Go Templates) or WordPress (ACF)
  • Familiarity with design systems, component libraries like Storybook or test frameworks
  • Understanding of advertising driven websites or content platforms


What we offer

  • Salary between €4,000 and €5,500 gross per month more possible for seniority
  • 25 vacation days plus your birthday off
  • Travel allowance or full public transport reimbursement
  • Excellent pension scheme
  • Laptop Mac or Windows and phone allowance
  • Hybrid work 2 days per week
  • Flexible workspaces across the country
  • Realistic workload, loyal team and plenty of room for your own input


Interested?

Call or email Lars Verweij at +31 6 2029 3364 or l.verweij@haystackpeople.nl

title: FULL STACK DEVELOPER
descriptionHtml:
Als full stack developer werk je zowel aan de frontend als de backend. Voor sommige projecten zul je alleen aan de frontend werken of alleen aan de backend, maar we verwachten dat je beide kunt.

Aangezien we een klein team zijn zul je ook werken aan het design van features, de architectuur van de software en het testen van features. Kortom, van begin tot het einde ben je betrokken bij de ontwikkeling.

Voorbeelden Van Projecten Zijn

  • Een Q&A forum waar leerlingen elkaar kunnen helpen;
  • Integratie met ChatGPT;
  • Automatische kwaliteitscontroles van content (video’s, samenvattingen, opgaven, etc.);
  • Interne bedrijfsprocessen automatiseren of versimpelen;
  • Een docentenomgeving waar docenten les kunnen geven zoals ze dat nog nooit hebben kunnen doen;

En nog veel meer. We hechten veel waarde aan vakmanschap. Dat wil zeggen dat we op zoek zijn naar iemand die er niet alleen waarde aanhecht om een werkend product af te leveren, maar ook een product dat goed in elkaar zit. Denk aan code die onderhoudbaar is, veilig en goed te lezen.

Thuiswerken is mogelijk en doen we allemaal. We zien elkaar echter nog wel 1 à 2 keer per week op kantoor in Amsterdam.

Waar zijn we naar op zoek?

Allereerst zoeken wij iemand die een passie heeft voor IT en vakmanschap belangrijk vindt. Daarnaast zoeken wij iemand die al enkele (2+) jaren ervaring heeft. Tot slot zoeken wij iemand die goed zelfstandig kan werken, maar ook zeker vragen durft te stellen en een eigen mening heeft.

  • Ervaring met HTML, CSS en Bootstrap;
  • Ervaring met Angular of in ieder geval TypeScript;
  • Ervaring met Python en Django;
  • Ervaring met Django rest framework;
  • Ervaring met Git;
  • Ervaring met het maken en gebruiken van Restful API’s;
  • Goed gevoel voor UX;
  • Minimaal HBO werk- en denkniveau;
  • Zelfstandig kunnen werken;
  • Minimaal 32 uur per week beschikbaar;

Mocht je niet aan alle eisen voldoen maar wel enthousiast zijn? Neem gerust contact op.

Wat bieden wij?

  • Goed salaris passend bij je ervaring;
  • Werken vanuit huis en op ons kantoor in Amsterdam;
  • Een enthousiast team in een scale-up;
  • Veel vrijheid en mogelijkheden om jezelf te ontwikkelen;
  • Werken aan iets wat er toe doet.

Enthousiast geworden of wil je meer informatie? Neem dan contact op met Nicky van Rijsbergen via hr@onlineslagen.nl en wie weet zien we elkaar voor een (digitale) kop koffie!

Acquisitie naar aanleiding van deze vacature wordt niet op prijs gesteld.

De beste voorbereiding op de school- en eindexamens!

companyDescription: OnlineSlagen is het meest complete en geavanceerde online leerplatform voor de eindexamens. We bieden online examentrainingen aan voor examenkandidaten, met de mogelijkheid tot uitbreiding naar schoolexamentrainingen. Door middel van o.a. duidelijke animatievideo’s wordt alle stof uitgelegd. Leerlingen kunnen onbeperkt oefenen in de slimme leeromgeving waar zij persoonlijk inzicht krijgen in resultaat en voortgang. Hierdoor kan er leuker en efficiënter geleerd worden. Ook is er vanaf 1 april een chatfunctie waarin examenkandidaten al hun vragen kunnen stellen, 7 dagen per week. Op deze manier helpen we leerlingen de beste resultaten te halen voor hun schoolexamens en eindexamens.

title: Frontend Developer
descriptionHtml:
About Secfi

Secfi is trusted by thousands of tech professionals for financial planning and financing. We’re the first to provide a proprietary suite of equity planning tools, 1:1 guidance with licensed equity strategists, and a set of financing products that enable employees to own a stake in the company they helped build. Currently, we have over 52,000 users on our platform owning over $90bn worth of equity, and have worked with employees from more than 90% of all U.S. unicorns.


Role overview

We’re looking for a Front-End Engineer to join our team in Amsterdam. This is a mid-to-senior level position within our engineering team, where you’ll work closely with product and design to build and evolve the core of Secfi’s platform as well as maintaining and enhancing our public-facing website.


You’ll have the opportunity to lead initiatives and shape technical decisions from day one. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys building modern and intuitive UIs, takes ownership of their work, wants agency in how things get built and is excited about building web applications that shape the financial future of their users.


What you’ll do

  • Integrate APIs and services to power our equity planning platform and internal tools.
  • Collaborate with product, design, and back-end engineers to define features, and bring new experiences to life.
  • Design, develop, and maintain features that are robust, scalable, and secure.
  • Write unit and integration tests for core functionality.
  • Support product in data analysis and experimentation to inform decisions.
  • Contribute to architectural decisions and help improve application performance and reliability.
  • Help maintain and evolve our marketing website built using Sanity and NextJS.


You will work on projects like:

  • Integrate AI into our planning tools
  • Redesigning our user platform
  • Implementing financial planning and tax calculation tools


What we’re looking for

  • 3–5+ years of front-end development experience.
  • Strong command of React with Typescript and integrating APIs (RESTful, bonus points for GraphQL).
  • Experience with a headless CMS, preferably Sanity
  • Familiarity with testing frameworks such as Cypress, Jest and/or Vitest.
  • Ability to take ownership of features and collaborate across disciplines.
  • An eye for simplicity, scalability, maintainability and performance.


Why you’ll love working here

  • A friendly and collaborative environment where engineers lead projects and have real agency.
  • A culture that values simplicity, autonomy, and people feeling safe and recognized.
  • A cool office on the IJ waterfront in Amsterdam (near Centraal), with lunch provided on office days.
  • Hybrid setup: we work from the office on Tuesdays, Thursdays, and every other Monday.
  • Competitive compensation, equity ownership, and the chance to build something meaningful.


What the hiring process looks like

  • Introductory interview — 30 min (video call)
  • Technical interview – 90 min
  • --- Code Review & Fix (60 min): You’ll be asked to review some real world code, discuss areas for improvement with the interviewer and then go ahead and implement the improvements.
  • --- Architecture Discussion (30 min): You will be prompted with a hypothetical feature / app idea and be asked to discuss how you’d implement it. This can be done using diagrams or via a free form discussion, whatever you prefer.
  • Value-fit interview with the manager — 60 min (in person, if applicable)
  • Meet the CEO – 30 minutes 
  • Reference checks (async)

companySlogan: We work with startup employees to provide equity planning, stock option financing, and wealth management.
companyDescription:
Secfi is one of the leading providers of equity planning, stock option financing, and wealth management for tech employees and founders. Offering a digital platform for equity planning, 1:1 financial advice, ongoing investment management, and tools like equity planners and tax calculators, Secfi helps clients maximize the value of their equity compensation and own a stake in the company they helped build. With liquidity solutions such as secondary sales and non-recourse financing, Secfi serves employees from over 90% of U.S. unicorns, assisting more than 46,000 individuals and representing $80 billion in equity value.

Data current as of November 2024.

title: Frontend Developer
descriptionHtml:
Front-end Developer (with a UX/UI spark!)


Coders Connect is partnering with a cutting-edge B2B tech company that’s redefining how businesses use data-driven insights to make smarter, faster decisions 🚀


We’re looking for a Front-end Developer who’s just as comfortable in Figma as in React — someone who loves shaping intuitive user experiences and bringing interfaces to life. If you enjoy turning complex data into simple, elegant designs, this one’s for you 🎨💻


🌈 What You’ll Do

  • Design delightful experiences - Co-lead discovery, map UX flows, and define information architecture for new and existing features.
  • Craft beautiful UIs - Build pixel-perfect designs in Figma and evolve a design system with reusable components and responsive rules.
  • Prototype & validate - Test your ideas with interactive prototypes and quick in-code experiments to ensure usability and feasibility.
  • Bring it to life - Implement front-end magic using React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind, keeping things accessible and lightning fast ⚡
  • Visualize data - Turn complex datasets into clear, interactive charts using eCharts or Recharts.
  • Collaborate & iterate - Work closely with product, data, and back-end teams (and real users!) to ship meaningful features quickly.


🧩 What You Bring

  • 5–10 years of experience building and shipping B2B SaaS products.
  • A solid UX and UI design background — from user flows to high-fidelity designs.
  • Expertise with React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.
  • A deep understanding of accessibility (ARIA, keyboard nav, color contrast).
  • A knack for data visualization and simplifying complexity.
  • A product mindset - pragmatic, curious, and outcome-focused.
  • Strong communication and a love for collaboration in fast-moving environments.


💡 Bonus Points

  • Experience designing for analytics or forecasting tools.
  • Motion design chops for polished interactions.
  • Familiarity with design tokens and theming.
  • Cloud know-how (Azure or similar).


🧠 Tech & Tools

React · Next.js · TypeScript · Tailwind CSS · Figma · Recharts/eCharts · Jest · Cypress · Git


🌍 Why You’ll Love It

  • Hybrid working model - flexibility that fits your lifestyle.
  • Collaborate with an international, passionate team.
  • Shape impactful products that make a real difference (yes, even for the planet 🌱).


📎 Portfolio required: Show us your end-to-end process - from problem to polished UI.

companyAddress.addressLocality: Remote 👉 London 🌍 Cape Town 🌍 Johannesburg 🌍 Vilnius 🌍 Lima 🌍 New York 🌍 Dubai

companySlogan: Coders Connect 💙 global 🌐 technology recruitment partner for start-ups 🦄 & scale-ups 🚀
companyDescription:
Coders Connect was formed from a technology community that has a focus on Software Engineering, Data Engineering, DevOps, QA Automation and Data Science. We provide a full hiring lifecycle experience. Everything from talent identification to offer management and most importantly, onboarding to aftercare and satisfaction - with everything in between.

Coders Connect started out as a dev community and now we are brilliantly placed to tap into some of the richest dev hot-spots. We continue to grow in our constantly evolving marketplace. We have broadened our vision and increased our capabilities to add more value to our communities.

Our tech communities are strongest in Software Engineering, Data Engineering, DevOps, QA Automation and Data Science. Need a change? Need talent? Our communities grow every day, our ability to deliver quality at speed is something that has proven valuable to many leading tech firms and technologists worldwide.

title: Full Stack Developer
descriptionHtml:
Ons techteam blijft groeien! We hebben ambitieuze plannen en zoeken daarom een Senior Full Stack Developer!

Fulltime

  • Amsterdam, Nederland

Over de functie

Wij zijn op zoek naar een Senior Full Stack Developer die de verantwoordelijkheid neemt voor onze advertentie-infrastructuur binnen een netwerk van 70+ websites met veel verkeer. Je werkt zowel aan de frontend als backend en zorgt ervoor dat onze technologie snel, stabiel en winstgevend is.

Je werkt voornamelijk met TypeScript en daarnaast ook met CSS / JS / Nginx / NextJS.

Met een bereik van 12 miljoen unieke bezoekers per maand is PXR de grootste uitgever op het gebied van sport en lifestyle.

De rol

Je ontwikkelt systemen voor monitoring en automatische waarschuwingen, zodat problemen worden opgemerkt vóór ze impact hebben. Ervaring of interesse in advertentietechnologie (zoals header bidding, VAST, CMP) is een grote pre.

We werken met de mobile teams ook uitvoerig aan in-app advertenties, dus affiniteit met Flutter en/of native apps is een mooie bonus.

Jouw verantwoordelijkheden

  • Ontwikkelen en onderhouden van de front-end scripts (TS)
  • Verantwoordelijk voor het inladen, herladen en correct meten van advertenties en consent management platformen
  • Optimaliseren van advertentieprestaties en betrouwbaarheid
  • Bouwen van monitoring- en waarschuwings flows
  • Samenwerken met teams voor design, data en product om advertentieprestaties te verbeteren
  • Leiding geven aan de bouw van een showcase-website (NextJS) voor advertentieformaten
  • Ondersteunen bij het integreren van creatieve advertentie-uitingen
  • Ondersteunen van de mobile teams voor de advertentie integraties

Jouw ervaring

  • Minimaal 5 jaar ervaring met JavaScript
  • Ervaren in TypeScript
  • Bekend VM’s en cloudomgevingen
  • Basis ervaring met Kubernetes is een plus
  • Kennis van of interesse in advertentietechnologie (zoals header bidding, VAST, CMP)
  • Analytisch, zelfstandig en oplossingsgericht
  • Goede beheersing van Engels; Nederlands is een plus

Onze Perks

  • Een baan bij één van de snelst groeiende mediabedrijven van Nederland;
  • Een uitdagende functie van 32 tot 40 uur;
  • De hard- en software die jij nodig hebt om fijn te kunnen werken;
  • Een eigen ontwikkelingstraject met begeleiding die ruimte biedt om te groeien op persoonlijk vlak;
  • Een enthousiast, betrokken team binnen een dynamische, informele en groeiende organisatie, waarin ook veel ruimte is om successen samen te vieren. Regelmatig worden gezellige borrels en de leukste teamuitjes georganiseerd;
  • Een fijne werkplek op een mooi kantoor met de mogelijkheid om hybride te werken.

Solliciteer

Wil je ons team komen versterken als Full Stack Developer? Dan horen we graag van je!

Solliciteer nu

companySlogan: Voor de ēchte.
companyDescription: Als onafhankelijk mediabedrijf combineren we uitgeven, advertising, tech en e-commerce. Zo bereiken en raken we echte mensen in niches als sport, technologie, parenting en automotive. Omdat we geloven dat in een digitale wereld de echte relatie altijd wint.

title: Medior Frontend Engineer
descriptionHtml:
Company Description

Hi there, potential colleague!

Join us in our mission to become a driver of positive change in the eyewear industry.

Get ready to make a real impact in a certified B Corp as our new Medior Frontend Engineer.

As a Medior Frontend Engineer, you’ll be a key member of the team responsible for shaping our digital customer experience. In close collaboration with designers and engineers, you will not only build features for our web and retail platforms, but also help improve core internal tools that empower our colleagues.

A bit more about us: we’re a fast-growing eyewear brand, based in Amsterdam with an energetic, international and ambitious team. Our frontend technology stack is built on NextJS and TypeScript, running on Vercel — with a back-end on Ruby on Rails (Solidus).

This is a full-time position that offers flexibility, allowing you to work either onsite at our headquarters on the Singel in Amsterdam or remotely from anywhere in Europe.

As part of our hybrid digital team, you’ll collaborate with colleagues living in Spain, France, Luxembourg, Portugal & The Netherlands.

This opportunity is available immediately.

You'll be...

  • Building and taking ownership of new features from concept to deployment, ensuring they are robust and scalable through testing, monitoring and code reviews.
  • Translating creative designs from our UI/UX team into responsive, accessible, and high-quality code for our digital storefront and POS systems.
  • Actively contributing to in-house tools, like CMS, to empower our internal teams.
  • Optimising website performance with tools such as Cloudflare Workers and Vercel Edge Config enabling advanced caching and real-time API responses.
  • Working on integrations with other Ace & Tate systems as well as third-party services.
  • Working together with colleagues of all disciplines to launch new products, improve usability, and implement A/B tests.
  • Sharing knowledge with other developers through pair-programming and constructive feedback.


You have...

  • 3+ years of experience as a Frontend Engineer, with a focus on web application development.
  • Proficiency in Next.js, React, TypeScript, HTML, and CSS, and a solid understanding of frontend design patterns and best practices.
  • Experience working with serverless architecture.
  • A strong focus on user experience and a good understanding of responsive design and mobile-first development.
  • Proven ability to collaborate effectively in a hybrid, cross-functional team environment.
  • Excellent communication skills, enabling you to articulate technical concepts to both technical and non-technical team members.
  • A passion for staying up-to-date with the latest technologies and industry trends.


Nice if you have...

  • Experience with CDNs (like Cloudflare) and other performance optimization techniques.
  • Knowledge of eCommerce concepts, such as cart management, payment gateways, and product catalogs.
  • A good grasp of SEO best practices to optimize website discoverability.
  • Experience in A/B testing and data-driven decision-making to improve user experience and drive conversion rates.
  • Experience building accessible and inclusive web experiences, following WCAG guidelines.
  • Experience maintaining and contributing to a component library, using tools like Storybook to develop, test and document components.
  • Experience contributing to a custom CMS, helping to build and expand its capabilities.
  • Exposure to or an interest in full-stack development.


What’s In It For You...

  • A competitive salary, if needed we can offer visa sponsorship.
  • A flexible hybrid work environment.
  • 25 holidays per year (based on full time) plus additional tenure-based days (2 extra days after 1 year of work, and 3 days extra after 2 years of employment).
  • Company pension plan.
  • Travel reimbursement if you live more than 10kms from our HQ.
  • Wellbeing: a collab with ClassPass and free access to unlimited mental health support via our partner OpenUp.
  • Continuous free updates of your eyewear collection plus great discounts!
  • Daily nutritious lunch and healthy snacks.
  • Participation in events planned by our CultureClub (e.g. Borrel XXL, &talks, holiday gifting, ...).


Jeez, that was a lot. Still with us?

If you are, and you’re thinking that you might fit this profile, please apply via the form below. We’d love to hear from you!

Ace & Tate is an equal opportunity employer. We are committed to nurturing an inclusive environment for all current and potential employees.

companySlogan:
Hi, we’re Ace & Tate and we make glasses.
It sounds simple and that’s the point. Great fits that last, for all eyes.
companyDescription:
Hi, we’re Ace & Tate and we make glasses. It sounds fairly simple, and that’s the whole point. We’re here to inject a good dose of common sense into our industry by making well-designed, quality eyewear at an affordable price. Great fits that last, for all eyes.

With 650 eyewear experts across more than 80 lively and impressive (if we may say so ourselves) stores in 9 countries, we're here to guarantee our customers always enjoy the view.

We’re committed to becoming a more responsible business every day: for people, the planet and for the long run.

title: Frontend Developer
descriptionHtml:
Frontend Developer

Location: Amsterdam (Keizersgracht) | Remote-friendly

Type: Full-time | Contract

Join us and help make global work accessible for all.


About Cocoroco

At Cocoroco.com, we believe that talent is everywhere—but opportunity isn’t. That’s why we’ve built a global online talent marketplace to connect international companies with remote professionals in customer service, sales, and compliance.

Our mission?

To make work accessible for everyone, regardless of their location or background.

Our clients include Bunq, Rituals, Picnic, and other fast-scaling international companies.

Founded in 2021 and growing fast, we’re proud to be profitable and product-led. Our marketplace is built for speed, quality, and automation, and now we’re scaling up our internal tech team to power the next stage of growth.

About the Role

We’re looking for a Frontend Developer to become the first in-house frontend hire at Cocoroco. You’ll work closely with our co-founder and agency partners to take ownership of our platform’s frontend—and help shape its technical future.

This is a foundational role where you’ll get the freedom and responsibility to define best practices, set up workflows, and build features that directly impact thousands of users around the world.

If you’re passionate about user experience, frontend performance, and building scalable applications, this is your chance to make a real difference.

What You’ll Do
  • Lead frontend development across our web applications.
  • Work with product, design, and backend teams to bring features to life.
  • Create a frontend roadmap focused on performance, scalability, and UX.
  • Review and write clean, maintainable, well-tested code.
  • Set up and manage CI/CD pipelines for frontend deployments.
  • Optimize frontend performance and ensure application reliability.
  • Troubleshoot and improve live production systems.
  • Contribute to team culture and knowledge-sharing as we grow.
RequirementsTechnical Must-Haves
  • 5+ years of experience with mainstream frontend frameworks.
  • Strong proficiency in TypeScript and React.
  • Experience building and maintaining scalable, high-performance applications.
  • Solid understanding of REST APIs and frontend-backend integrations.
  • Familiarity with frontend testing frameworks.
  • Working knowledge of cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP).
  • Experience with CI/CD pipelines and containerization.
  • Bonus: Familiarity with AI/ML concepts or generative AI in frontend.
Soft Skills
  • Proactive problem solver with a critical mindset.
  • Strong communication and collaboration skills.
  • Comfortable in a dynamic, fast-moving environment.
  • Self-starter with a desire to shape technical culture.
Nice to Have
  • Experience with marketplaces or AI-driven platforms.
  • Understanding of generative AI and its application in UX/UI.
What We Offer
  • Competitive salary and full-time labor contract.
  • Work on an innovative, mission-driven product.
  • Career development and growth opportunities.
  • Flexible hours and remote work options.
  • A central Amsterdam office at the beautiful Keizersgracht.
Application Process
  1. Submit your CV and a short cover letter explaining why you're the right fit.
  2. Application review.
  3. Cultural fit interview.
  4. Technical interview.
  5. Offer & onboarding.

companySlogan: Helping companies to find & hire customer support talent
companyDescription:
Cocoroco.com connects businesses with top-tier talent in customer service, sales, and compliance from over 20 countries and in 16 languages, reducing recruitment costs and accelerating the hiring process while enhancing flexibility.

Our user-friendly interface allows companies to post jobs for free and gain direct access to our talent pool of vetted candidates who are ready to interview. 

With Cocoroco, companies can effortlessly find and hire the ideal candidate for their open positions, whether it’s for a short-term assignment or a long-term contract.

title: Full Stack Developer
descriptionHtml:
At Cocoroco.com we're looking for a Full Stack Developer to join and build our tech team.

About Us

We are Cocoroco.com! We believe the war on talent is a matter of a loca l market mismatch. That’s why we’re enabling companies to tap into the global talent pool through our online talent marketplace for remote customer service, sales and compliance talent. By doing so, global talent can connect with international companies, work from home and get fair compensation. It is therefore our mission to make work accessible for everyone globally, regardless of their location or background. Talents will now access the global labor market and maximize their career growth by unlocking their full potential.

Founded in early 2021, Cocoroco.com is growing at a fast pace and has built a proven online marketplace to support our business model. Speed and quality are the core drivers of our success which are accelerated by automation, and our model is trusted by companies such as Bunq, Rituals, Picnic, and many more.About the job.

Job Description

We are now looking for a Full-Stack Developer to join our team located at the Keizersgracht in the center of Amsterdam. Be our first in-house tech hire and shape our innovative marketplace to make work accessible for everyone globally. We're currently working with an agency to develop our platform, and this will be our first internal position to grow the in-house tech team.

This gives the opportunity to become part of a profitable, fast-growing company with the flexibility to define and build on the technical foundations of our business. The ideal candidate has the ability to lead our tech development and has the potential to lead the future tech team.

Does this sound like the challenge you need? Don’t wait—reach out to discuss.

Role

  • Full-stack developer

Objective

  • Spearhead the team’s technical success by building, validating and maintaining our technical roadmap.

Scope

  • Reporting to the Co-Founder.
  • Be the first in-house tech hire

Responsibilities

  • Develop and maintain web applications with a focus on performance and user experience.
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define, design, and ship new features.
  • Ensure the scalability, security, and reliability of applications.
  • Participate in code reviews and contribute to team knowledge sharing.
  • Implement and maintain CI/CD pipelines to ensure smooth deployment processes.
  • Monitor, troubleshoot, and improve application performance, ensuring high availability and reliability.
  • Manage infrastructure as code using tools like Terraform or similar.

Requirements

Technical skills:

  • Proficiency in TypeScript, React.
  • Experience with PHP and Symfony framework.
  • Knowledge of databases, particularly MySQL.
  • Understanding of RESTful APIs and microservices architecture.
  • Familiarity with AI and machine learning concepts is a plus.
  • Experience with CI/CD pipelines and DevOps practices.
  • Knowledge of cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, Azure, Google Cloud).
  • Experience with containerization and orchestration tools (e.g., Docker, Kubernetes).

Experience

  • >5 years work experience with mainstream frameworks
  • Proven track record of developing full-stack applications.
  • Experience in AI integration and database management.
  • Demonstrated ability to work on complex projects from concept to deployment.
  • Experience in managing and deploying applications in cloud environments.

Soft Skills

  • Strong problem-solving abilities.
  • Excellent communication and teamwork skills.
  • Ability to work in a fast-paced, dynamic environment.

Nice To Have

  • Experience with marketplaces and AI-driven projects.
  • Understanding of generative AI database prompting.

Benefits

Perks and benefits:

  • Competitive salary, on a labor contract
  • Opportunity to work on innovative projects.
  • Professional development and growth opportunities.
  • Flexible working hours and remote work options.

Application Process

  • Submit your resume and a cover letter detailing your experience and why you are a good fit for this role.
  • Review
  • Cultural interview
  • Technical interview
  • Offer

Apply for the job

Do you want to join our team as our new Full Stack Developer? Then we'd love to hear about you!

title: Founding AI Frontend Developer
descriptionHtml:
Founding AI Frontend Developer | naptha.ai

About the role: We are seeking a talented frontend developer to join our team as a founding member, focusing on rapidly developing and deploying dynamic user interfaces for products built on our custom multi-agent system stack. This role involves creating intuitive, responsive, and powerful interfaces that enable users to interact seamlessly with our AI systems. The ideal candidate will have expertise in modern frontend development, UI/UX design principles, and experience with real-time web applications and AI-powered interfaces.

  • Design and implement intuitive, responsive interfaces that effectively visualize complex AI agent interactions and workflows
  • Develop and optimize React/JavaScript applications that support AI-driven user experiences
  • Rapidly prototype and iterate on UIs based on user feedback and evolving product requirements
  • Work closely with our AI engineering team to ensure frontend components effectively leverage our multi-agent system capabilities
  • Create reusable UI components and establish frontend architecture patterns for future development
  • Implement real-time data visualization and interaction patterns that help users understand and control AI agent behaviors
  • Ensure high performance, accessibility, and cross-browser compatibility of all user interfaces
  • Contribute to the overall product vision and help define the user experience of our multi-agent systems

In this role, you're a good fit if you have:

  • Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Web Development, Design, or related field
  • 3+ years of experience in frontend development with a strong portfolio demonstrating expertise in React, TypeScript, JavaScript, Vue, or similar modern frontend frameworks
  • Experience with state management libraries (Redux, MobX, Zustand), responsive web design, and building complex interactive user interfaces
  • Strong understanding of UI/UX design principles, HTML5, CSS3, and best practices for AI-driven applications
  • Familiarity with WebSocket, GraphQL, REST APIs or similar technologies for real-time data handling
  • Experience with data visualization libraries (D3.js, Chart.js, Three.js, etc.)
  • Knowledge of frontend build tools and workflows (Webpack, Vite, npm, yarn)
  • Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work in a fast-paced startup environment
  • Excellent communication skills and ability to collaborate with cross-functional teams
  • Passion for AI technologies, LLMs, and human-AI interaction paradigms

About the hiring process:

  • Video interview with hiring manager
  • Take-home project
  • Presentation of take-home project to panel
  • Interview with co-founders

Compensation & Benefits:

  • Competitive salary and equity stake for role and stage of company
  • Commensurate with experience

title: Frontend developer
descriptionHtml:
Ben jij de Front-end Developer met een passie voor het verleggen van technologische grenzen om de zorg te verbeteren?
 Dan is dit je kans om je aan te sluiten bij een team van getalenteerde ontwikkelaars en engineers om de volgende generatie applicaties te ontwerpen en te bouwen.

Jouw verantwoordelijkheden
 Als Front-end Developer kom je terecht in een compact multidisciplinair team dat zich richt op innovatie en uitbreiding van producten en diensten. Jouw bijdrage zorgt ervoor dat eindgebruikers meer gebruiksgemak, -comfort en ondersteuning ervaren tijdens hun dagelijkse werkzaamheden in de zorg.

Er wordt gewerkt op een agile wijze (Scrum, Kanban of Lean), afhankelijk van de aard en fase van het product.
Heb je interesse in de nieuwste technologie, neem je eigenaarschap en hanteer je hoge kwaliteitsnormen? Dan is dit een geweldige kans.

Waar we naar op zoek zijn

  • HBO werk- en denkniveau

  • Communicatief sterk & flexibele teamspeler

  • Goede kennis van HTML5 & (S)CSS in combinatie met React

  • Ervaring met Redux (of vergelijkbare state management library)

  • Ervaring met Git of soortgelijke tools

  • Kennis van UX-design (bijv. Storybook) en sterk inlevingsvermogen in het gebruikersperspectief

Pre:

  • Kennis van ASP.NET (Core), C#

  • Ervaring met .NET Core / .NET 8.0+

  • Ervaring met RESTful API's

  • Bekend met Agile methodieken (Scrum, Kanban, Lean)

  • Kennis van CI/CD, Docker, Kubernetes

  • Begrip van schaalbaarheid, performance en diagnostiek

Wat wij bieden

  • Professionele en positieve werkomgeving in een gezond en groeiend bedrijf

  • Competitief salarispakket

  • Ruimte voor persoonlijke ontwikkeling

  • Ondersteunend en uitdagend team van professionals

  • Extra's: sportmogelijkheden, vers fruit, zit-sta bureaus, game room

  • Mogelijkheid tot thuiswerken (hybride)

companySlogan: Creating careers in IT Development and Testing
companyDescription:
Spilberg focuses on the IT Development & Testing market. We connect professionals who excel in coding and testing to organisations - from start-ups to multinationals - so that together they can drive the digital revolution with unprecedented passion and creativity.  

Our unique approach allows us to make the best match, fast. And focus is key. We choose to do one thing and do it right: each Spilberg consultant is an expert in one specific IT Development or Testing specialism, and focuses on one region, and one of four possible contract forms.   

Our specialisms: Mobile Development, .Net/C#, Front-end/Web development, Embedded and Hardware Development, Java/Scala/Kotlin Development, Lowcode Mendix/Outsystems, Testing, Python Development, Go, Product Owners, and Scrum Masters & Business Analysts  
 
Spilberg is part of Vibe Group, a fast-growing IT staffing and consulting organisation with offices in the Netherlands, Belgium and Germany. Would you like to know more about Spilberg and the way we work? Or are you interested in working for Spilberg as an IT professional? Please contact us today.

title: Frontend Developer - React/Typescript
descriptionHtml:
Working model

Flexible Hybrid Model (3 Days per week in the office)


Physical location

Amsterdam, Jordaan


Research shows that female candidates only apply if they meet 100% of the requirements, while male candidates already do so at 60%. Are you hesitant whether you meet all the requirements? Please do apply, we're looking forward to hearing from you!


🌍 About Coolset

Coolset is on a mission to build the all-in-one decarbonisation and supply chain integrity platform for forward thinking companies. By providing tools and infrastructure, we make it simple for businesses to measure, report, and reduce their climate impact.

We’re building carbon management software for the future with the goal to help accelerate the transition to net zero. Coolset was founded in 2021 and is supported by a remarkable group of early-stage investors & advisors.

But a company is only as good as its people, so who are we? The Coolset team currently consists of 20 people aged between 24 and 36 years old. We all share a passion for purpose driven work and the occasional after-work beer.

‍

🤔 About the role

As a front-end engineer, you will play a significant role in the development of the Coolset platform.

You will be working on building new features, projects, and integrations for the platform. This is a great opportunity to learn about and work with the latest technology while having a positive impact on the environment.

This role requires someone with an entrepreneurial stance towards problem-solving, flexibility in action, and a hands-on mentality while taking accountability for your projects. Strong communication skills and a creative-oriented mindset for solving problems are a must.


We use React with native and custom hooks to build our web apps, as well as MaterialUI for base and custom components, with custom logic and styling.


🦁 Your profile

  • You have 4+ years experience working in a software engineer role, preferably at a high-growth startup
  • You have a good knowledge and understanding of concepts like security, performance, accessibility, and Typescript.
  • You love working with React, and use React best practices to produce world-class software (or have experience with other frameworks but are willing and able to learn React)
  • UX comes natural to you. You’re always striving to create the best UX for your users
  • You know how to have constructive conversations with backend, design, product, and other departments in the company to optimise our apps.
  • You have a DevOps mentality - not all solutions should be solved with code!
  • You find the right balance between quality and output. You launch fast and iterate and don't get stuck in processes
  • You're already based in The Netherlands, preferably in or around Amsterdam


➕ Nice to haves

  • Hands-on experience with Google Cloud Platform
  • Experience with backend development using Python/Django


👀 Our recruitment process

  • 30-min video screen - Over Zoom, we get to know you and you get to know us. You get to ask any questions you might have
  • Coding challenge - You’ll receive an assignment to work on, use this to show off your skills. No need to over-engineer it - just see what you can get done in a couple of hours
  • 60-min case interview - Over Zoom, you'll present the results of your assignment. In this phase, we'll evaluate your critical thinking skills, asking you to take us through the considerations you made while working on the assignment
  • 120-min in-office working session - We'll brainstorm together on how to build a new feature. This will be a technical refinement session where we explore a roadmap feature and decide on the best technical approach
  • ☎️ If successful: A job offer within 48 hours to join Coolset


💎 Benefits

  • Flexibility in holidays (25+ days per year) 🌴
  • Flexible and remote working arrangements 💼
  • Learning and development budget for books and courses 📚
  • Healthy vegetarian lunches 🥦
  • Yearly offsite and regular team events 🥳


💻 Technologies we use

React | Typescript | Python | PostgreSQL | Google Cloud | Firebase | Docker | npm


  • Note: This is a full-time, (primarily) on-site position in Amsterdam. Unfortunately, we can not support visa applications at this time.

title: Creative Front-end Developer (On-site)
descriptionHtml:
We are looking for a ⚠️ creative ⚠️ front-end developer that can work ⚠️ on-site ⚠️ in our office in Amsterdam. Non-creative or remote applications won't get a response due to high volumes of applications.

About The Job

Are you a talented, ambitious and curious front-end developer looking for a new opportunity to showcase your skills? Look no further! At Lama Lama, a creative digital agency, we are currently searching for a passionate and skilled Front-end Developer to join our team.

Recent projects we created are Greener, Eqip, SEA Water, Tobacco, Rookvrije Generatie, Van Doorne, Sony Music, Home, Jimmy Nelson and Our World by Justdiggit

We continuously work on projects like Behind the Pines, Bisque Golf, Soilmates, and Doing Goods

Responsibilities

  • Developing stunning websites and digital experiences
  • Learn from and inspire your fellow dev team members
  • Collaborate with creative and design teams to ensure a smooth process
  • Stay on top of on industry trends and technologies to bring new ideas
  • Improve our boilerplates that we use to kickstart our projects
  • Write clean and efficient code

Stacks

Our front-ends are always based on one of our two preferred stacks, depending on the project's needs. Among these, we strongly prefer using our LamaPress boilerplate for WordPress.

  • WordPress (custom boilerplate, Vite, Tailwind CSS, GSAP, Three.js)
  • Shopify Liquid (custom boilerplate, Vite, Tailwind CSS, GSAP)

About You

  • Are a true team player and are open to share knowledge
  • Have an eye for design and detail, can contribute during the design phase
  • Have a feeling for the right amount of motion to strengthen the message
  • Are familiar with WordPress (we've got a fancy Vite build flow and CLI tooling)
  • Have knowledge about JavaScript and ES6 standards
  • Know how to work with Tailwind CSS
  • Know how to work with design tools (we use Figma)
  • Know how to work with version control (we use Github)

About Lama Lama

Lama Lama is a creative digital agency with an ambitious and diverse team of around 18 people. Our office feels like home and is located in the centre of Amsterdam, with a view on Prinseneiland.

We deliver digital changes for companies with a conscience and brands with a heart. We embrace a fluid approach, and use our expertise to create longevity and value for our clients. Together with them we hope to make the world a little better.

Perks And Benefits

  • Competitive salary, based on your experience
  • A full-time job in a small, ambitious and open minded team
  • Good work-life balance
  • Profit sharing
  • Travel allowance and a lease bicycle plan 🚲
  • Pension contribution
  • Good coffee and a healthy lunch together with your colleagues
  • An unforgettable annual trip abroad ⛷🏖
  • 13" MacBook Pro and a 27" monitor
  • Education budget and a personal development plan
  • Friday afternoon talks and drinks
  • The possibility to work from home

Apply for the job

We embrace diversity in our workplace. All individuals, regardless of background, are encouraged to apply!

We are looking for a ⚠️ creative ⚠️ front-end developer that can work ⚠️ on-site ⚠️ in our office in Amsterdam. Non-creative or remote applications won't get a response due to high volumes of applications.
