companySlogan: Amsterdam based creative digital agency.
companyDescription:
We’re a creative digital agency for brands with a heart

At Lama Lama, we love to play—seriously. Our agency specializes in vibrant branding and unique translations of your brand into immersive digital experiences.

With hearts full of wonder, we leverage data to drive results, aiming to make the world a little better and people a little happier.

title: Front-end Developer
descriptionHtml:
About Fairphone

Fairphone is more than just a company - we are a global leader in sustainable, modular electronics, on a mission to change the electronics industry from the inside out. Built on strong social and environmental values, we are a diverse and inclusive team from all walks of life creating market consumer electronics that make a real impact.

At Fairphone, you will find a supportive and safe space where everyone can be themselves, collaborate openly, and have the freedom to learn and grow - because that’s how we innovate and drive change together!

So… are you a proactive, self-motivated team player who loves taking initiative and bringing positive energy? Do you thrive in a fast-moving start-up or scale-up environment? Are you a great communicator who values collaboration and embraces different perspectives? And most importantly, do you feel a strong connection to Fairphone’s mission and values? If you're nodding along and thinking, “Yes, that’s me!”, then check out our vacancy below!

Please know that we acknowledge that we are living in a time where the use of AI can bring many efficiencies and support. However, we want to know the real YOU. Please try to limit the use of AI tools to generate answers to the application; we value authenticity and encourage you to use your creativity!

  • Location: Amsterdam (you must be registered in the Netherlands and eligible to work here)
  • Hours: 40 hours per week
  • Start: ASAP
  • Deadline to apply: We review applications on a rolling basis. Please apply as soon as possible.

About Your Role

As a Mid/Senior Front-End Developer at Fairphone, you will be an integral part of our dynamic E-commerce team, directly impacting our online presence and customer journey. Your primary focus will be on the continuous improvement and optimization of our Odoo-based website. You will work closely with our CRO (Conversion Rate Optimization) Specialist, enabling them to rapidly test and iterate on new ideas through the implementation of A/B tests and other experimental features. This role is crucial for driving our online sales by delivering a seamless, user-friendly, and high-converting experience.

You'll be an integral part of our Webshop team, operating within an agile Scrum framework. This team includes a dedicated Product Owner and a mix of Frontend and Backend developers. Collaboration is key; you'll partner closely with UX designers and quality controllers within the team, and extend that collaboration to other development teams and essential stakeholders like marketeers.

A successful candidate in this role is someone who is not only technically proficient but also highly collaborative, possesses a strong problem-solving mindset, and is eager to contribute to a data-driven development process. Your ability to translate design mockups and CRO hypotheses into functional, performant, and maintainable code will be key to your success and our collective impact.

Key Responsibilities & Objectives

Your key responsibilities:

  • Develop, maintain, and optimize front-end features for our Odoo-based webshop and website, ensuring high performance, responsiveness, and cross-browser compatibility.
  • Work in close collaboration with the Product Owner and CRO Specialist to implement A/B tests, multivariate tests, and other experimental features to validate hypotheses and drive conversion improvements.
  • Translate UI/UX designs and wireframes into high-quality, reusable front-end code, paying close attention to detail and user experience.
  • Optimize website performance for speed and scalability, addressing issues related to load times, rendering, and asset delivery.
  • Implement and maintain SEO best practices on the front-end to improve organic search visibility.
  • Participate actively in code reviews, providing constructive feedback and ensuring code quality and adherence to established standards.
  • Troubleshoot and debug front-end issues, identifying root causes and implementing effective solutions.
  • Collaborate with back-end developers to integrate front-end components with server-side logic and APIs.
  • Stay up-to-date with the latest front-end technologies, trends, and best practices, and proactively suggest improvements.

Key objectives:

  • To significantly improve the conversion rate of our webshop by enabling rapid experimentation and iteration.
  • To ensure the highest standards of front-end performance, usability, and accessibility across all web properties.
  • To establish robust and scalable front-end development practices within the team.
  • To contribute to a culture of continuous learning and knowledge sharing.

Your Skills & Experience

  • You have a minimum of 4+ years of professional experience in front-end web development.
  • You have some formal training in Computer Science, Web Development, or a related field (e.g., Bachelor's degree or equivalent vocational training/certifications).
  • You have excellent written and verbal communication skills in English
  • Proficiency in JavaScript (ES6+) and TypeScript is a must-have.
  • Strong understanding of modern front-end frameworks (e.g., React, Vue.js, Angular) is highly preferred, even if direct Odoo framework experience is not present.
  • Solid grasp of web markup, including HTML5 and CSS3 (Sass/Less).
  • Demonstrable knowledge of SEO concepts and their front-end implementation.
  • Understanding of MVC (Model-View-Controller) architectural patterns.
  • Familiarity with Python, particularly in the context of web development or Odoo customization, is a plus but not mandatory.
  • Experience with version control systems (e.g., Git).
  • Experience with Bloomreach/VWO or similar platform with AB testing capabilities is a plus.
  • Preferably, you are familiar with working with macOS, Google Workspace, and Basecamp.

What Fairphone can offer you?

  • The opportunity to create an impact on the electronics industry around the world.
  • A diverse work environment full of international, passionate, warm-hearted team members.
  • 25 paid holidays per year (based on a full-time contract) next to the other public holidays in the Netherlands. You’ll also get a day off on your birthday! Additionally, the longer you stay, the more holidays you get!
  • Daily, healthy lunch, organic FairChain coffee, and many more tasty things.
  • You will join Fairphone’s collective pension scheme, and we will contribute to building your pension.
  • You will receive a MacBook, Fairbuds, and a Fairphone as working devices.
  • Hybrid working model - We are remote-friendly, and you can work up to 60% of your time per month from home or any other location you want. We also contribute up to €250 for your home office set-up.
  • Public transport allowance – we fully cover your 2nd class commute from your home to the office.
  • Bike allowance – We support you with a bike purchase of up to €300, and you’ll also have a yearly repair budget of up to €100! We also cover 23 cents per km for your biking distance from home to the office (or train station) and back!
  • Grow with us! We encourage you to develop at Fairphone. That’s why we’ll support your career goals with coaching (Inuka), trainings, workshops, or courses that you can join with your development budget.
  • Kitchen with beautiful views to the IJ waterfront.
  • There’s a gym and recreation and yoga rooms in the building where you can build healthy habits, stay active and have fun with your colleagues, as well as a subscription to our mental & physical well-being services (Inuka & Urban Sports)

About Us

DEI @Fairphone

At Fairphone, we care about people, planet and you. It’s natural that we see diversity, equity and inclusion (DEI) as an essential part of how we work together and do business.

We support and further strengthen our inclusive work environment and culture by more formally implementing various DEI efforts to ensure all Fairphoners feel included, respected, and supported.
descriptionText: About FairphoneFairphone is more than just a company - we are a global leader in sustainable, modular electronics, on a mission to change the electronics industry from the inside out. Built on strong social and environmental values, we are a diverse and inclusive team from all walks of life creating market consumer electronics that make a real impact.At Fairphone, you will find a supportive and safe space where everyone can be themselves, collaborate openly, and have the freedom to learn and grow - because that’s how we innovate and drive change together!So… are you a proactive, self-motivated team player who loves taking initiative and bringing positive energy? Do you thrive in a fast-moving start-up or scale-up environment? Are you a great communicator who values collaboration and embraces different perspectives? And most importantly, do you feel a strong connection to Fairphone’s mission and values? If you're nodding along and thinking, “Yes, that’s me!”, then check out our vacancy below!Please know that we acknowledge that we are living in a time where the use of AI can bring many efficiencies and support. However, we want to know the real YOU. Please try to limit the use of AI tools to generate answers to the application; we value authenticity and encourage you to use your creativity!Location: Amsterdam (you must be registered in the Netherlands and eligible to work here) Hours: 40 hours per weekStart: ASAPDeadline to apply: We review applications on a rolling basis. Please apply as soon as possible. About Your RoleAs a Mid/Senior Front-End Developer at Fairphone, you will be an integral part of our dynamic E-commerce team, directly impacting our online presence and customer journey. Your primary focus will be on the continuous improvement and optimization of our Odoo-based website. You will work closely with our CRO (Conversion Rate Optimization) Specialist, enabling them to rapidly test and iterate on new ideas through the implementation of A/B tests and other experimental features. This role is crucial for driving our online sales by delivering a seamless, user-friendly, and high-converting experience.You'll be an integral part of our Webshop team, operating within an agile Scrum framework. This team includes a dedicated Product Owner and a mix of Frontend and Backend developers. Collaboration is key; you'll partner closely with UX designers and quality controllers within the team, and extend that collaboration to other development teams and essential stakeholders like marketeers.A successful candidate in this role is someone who is not only technically proficient but also highly collaborative, possesses a strong problem-solving mindset, and is eager to contribute to a data-driven development process. Your ability to translate design mockups and CRO hypotheses into functional, performant, and maintainable code will be key to your success and our collective impact.Key Responsibilities & ObjectivesYour key responsibilities:Develop, maintain, and optimize front-end features for our Odoo-based webshop and website, ensuring high performance, responsiveness, and cross-browser compatibility.Work in close collaboration with the Product Owner and CRO Specialist to implement A/B tests, multivariate tests, and other experimental features to validate hypotheses and drive conversion improvements.Translate UI/UX designs and wireframes into high-quality, reusable front-end code, paying close attention to detail and user experience.Optimize website performance for speed and scalability, addressing issues related to load times, rendering, and asset delivery.Implement and maintain SEO best practices on the front-end to improve organic search visibility.Participate actively in code reviews, providing constructive feedback and ensuring code quality and adherence to established standards.Troubleshoot and debug front-end issues, identifying root causes and implementing effective solutions.Collaborate with back-end developers to integrate front-end components with server-side logic and APIs.Stay up-to-date with the latest front-end technologies, trends, and best practices, and proactively suggest improvements.Key objectives:To significantly improve the conversion rate of our webshop by enabling rapid experimentation and iteration.To ensure the highest standards of front-end performance, usability, and accessibility across all web properties.To establish robust and scalable front-end development practices within the team.To contribute to a culture of continuous learning and knowledge sharing.Your Skills & ExperienceYou have a minimum of 4+ years of professional experience in front-end web development.You have some formal training in Computer Science, Web Development, or a related field (e.g., Bachelor's degree or equivalent vocational training/certifications).You have excellent written and verbal communication skills in EnglishProficiency in JavaScript (ES6+) and TypeScript is a must-have.Strong understanding of modern front-end frameworks (e.g., React, Vue.js, Angular) is highly preferred, even if direct Odoo framework experience is not present.Solid grasp of web markup, including HTML5 and CSS3 (Sass/Less).Demonstrable knowledge of SEO concepts and their front-end implementation.Understanding of MVC (Model-View-Controller) architectural patterns.Familiarity with Python, particularly in the context of web development or Odoo customization, is a plus but not mandatory.Experience with version control systems (e.g., Git).Experience with Bloomreach/VWO or similar platform with AB testing capabilities is a plus.Preferably, you are familiar with working with macOS, Google Workspace, and Basecamp.What Fairphone can offer you?The opportunity to create an impact on the electronics industry around the world.A diverse work environment full of international, passionate, warm-hearted team members.25 paid holidays per year (based on a full-time contract) next to the other public holidays in the Netherlands. You’ll also get a day off on your birthday! Additionally, the longer you stay, the more holidays you get! Daily, healthy lunch, organic FairChain coffee, and many more tasty things.You will join Fairphone’s collective pension scheme, and we will contribute to building your pension.You will receive a MacBook, Fairbuds, and a Fairphone as working devices.Hybrid working model - We are remote-friendly, and you can work up to 60% of your time per month from home or any other location you want. We also contribute up to €250 for your home office set-up.Public transport allowance – we fully cover your 2nd class commute from your home to the office.Bike allowance – We support you with a bike purchase of up to €300, and you’ll also have a yearly repair budget of up to €100! We also cover 23 cents per km for your biking distance from home to the office (or train station) and back!Grow with us! We encourage you to develop at Fairphone. That’s why we’ll support your career goals with coaching (Inuka), trainings, workshops, or courses that you can join with your development budget. Kitchen with beautiful views to the IJ waterfront.There’s a gym and recreation and yoga rooms in the building where you can build healthy habits, stay active and have fun with your colleagues, as well as a subscription to our mental & physical well-being services (Inuka & Urban Sports) About UsDEI @FairphoneAt Fairphone, we care about people, planet and you. It’s natural that we see diversity, equity and inclusion (DEI) as an essential part of how we work together and do business.We support and further strengthen our inclusive work environment and culture by more formally implementing various DEI efforts to ensure all Fairphoners feel included, respected, and supported.
companySlogan: We’re on a mission to change technology for the better.
companyDescription:
At Fairphone, we are building a movement for fairer electronics. By making sustainable tech, we’re opening up the supply chain and creating new relationships between people and their products.

We’re making a positive impact across the value chain in mining, design, manufacturing and life cycle, while expanding the market for products that put ethical values first. Together with our community, we’re changing the way products are made.

title: Frontend Software Engineer (React & Typescript)
descriptionHtml:
We are hiring a Mid-level Frontend Engineer (React & Typescript) who will drive the implementation and optimization of user-facing features for our AI-driven career guidance solution, focusing on technical integrity, high performance, and cross-functional collaboration.

About SkillLab

At SkillLab, we envision a world where everyone has a pathway to employment. We enable and lead a radical change - a transition towards skill-based labor and education markets. Our AI-driven technology creates more inclusive and efficient markets by connecting people with jobs and education through the universal language of skills. SkillLab is working with employment and career services in 35+ countries and seeks to transform labor and education markets globally.

SkillLab’s innovative use of AI was recognised with awards like Google AI for Impact, UNESCO Top 10 uses of AI and the European Social Innovation Competition 2021, among other awards.

Your Responsibilities

  • Product Implementation: Drive new feature implementation from specification to deployment, ensuring code quality, that directly supports a seamless, accessible and personalized user experience.
  • Code Quality & Integrity: Elevate engineering standards by actively reviewing code, adhering to established testing protocols, and safeguarding codebase maintainability, security and robustness.
  • Design & System Partnership: Act as the technical partner to the Design and Product teams, translating designs into highly performant and scalable software solutions.
  • Performance & Scalability: Own front-end performance metrics, continuously optimizing application speed, responsiveness, and resource utilization for a world-class global experience.
  • Technical Evolution: Propose, evaluate, and champion new tools, libraries, and modern practices to future-proof the front-end stack.


Your Skills

  • 3–5 years of experience in front-end development.
  • Expertise in TypeScript, React(function components with hooks) and Web/DOM APIs.
  • Strong experience with Progressive Web Apps (PWAs).
  • Proficiency with key React ecosystem libraries: state management(Redux/Zustand/SWR), styling(emotion/TSS), animation frameworks(GSAP/react-spring), testing(Vitest/Playwright).


Extra awesome

  • Working knowledge of SSR frameworks (e.g., Vike, Next.js, Remix).
  • Experience with Ruby and Rails, Storybook, bundlers, service workers, or Google Cloud.


Salary & start date

  • We use a salary benchmark for the Dutch high-tech sector to set your salary based on your experience. We expect that the annual gross salary for the experience we are looking for ranges from €55k - €65k per year.
  • We accept applications on a rolling basis, and we envision a start date as soon as possible.


Benefits

  • You will enjoy 25 paid vacation days per year (20 days as the statutory minimum holiday entitlement in the Netherlands plus 5 extra days from SkillLab).
  • You can work flexibly from our office in Amsterdam and home within the Netherlands. You can also extend your holiday stay in a different country and work from abroad for a limited period of time.
  • You will get an extensive relocation support to move to Amsterdam including visa sponsorship, 30% ruling application, your plane tickets, covered real estate agent fees, etc.
  • You will have a personal learning budget to invest in your professional development.
  • You will have access to mentors & coaches (SkillLab is part of the Google for Startups SDG accelerator).
  • You will have access to a monthly flexible budget of benefits via Alleo app. You can spend this budget on a large selection of providers, ranging from gym memberships to bike subscriptions and online stores.
  • You will join our bi-annual company offsite retreats in different locations like Belgium, the Netherlands etc.


What Else To Know

  • Get 4 tips for your job application at SkillLab: https://skilllab.io/en-us/news/skilllabjobapplication
  • Read more about our compensation framework: https://skilllab.io/en-us/news/skilllab-compensation
  • Learn more about SkillLab’s social life: https://skilllab.io/en-us/news/social-life-at-skilllab
  • SkillLab is committed to diversity, equality and inclusion at the workplace. We welcome applications of candidates from all backgrounds. Read more about DEI: https://skilllab.io/en-us/news/diversity-equity-and-inclusion-at-skilllab

title: Full Stack Developer Intern
descriptionHtml:
Business Web Solutions is offering an exciting internship opportunity designed to help aspiring developers gain industry-ready skills. This is a remote-first program where you will learn through active project work and guided mentorship. You will gain valuable exposure to modern frameworks, problem-solving approaches, and collaborative practices. As a Full Stack Developer Intern, you’ll work on live projects, collaborate with global peers, and strengthen your coding skills. Applicants in Amsterdam, Netherlands are encouraged to apply. You will be trained on industry workflows and receive feedback from mentors to improve your practical knowledge.


Requirements

• Ability to collaborate in virtual teams using tools like Zoom, Slack, or Trello.
• Eagerness to learn modern frameworks such as React, Angular, or Django.
• A personal computer with stable internet access.
• Open to students, graduates, or career switchers.
• Comfortable with self-paced online learning.
• Basic familiarity with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.


Benefits

• Internship certificate & Letter of Recommendation (performance-based).
• Certificate of completion at the end of the program.
• Networking opportunities with global peers and professionals.
• Hands-on training with live projects across front-end and back-end.
• Practical learning with industry frameworks such as Django, React, or WordPress.
• Opportunity for future full-time consideration based on performance.

title: Full Stack Developer – Junior (Remote)
descriptionHtml:
At Business Web Solutions, we’re welcoming Full Stack Developer (Entry Level) to help build, refine, and release improvements to real applications. The Internship spans 1 to 6 months depending on availability and contribution. Tasks span UI builds, API endpoints, and database updates using HTML, CSS, JavaScript on the front end and Python, Flask with MySQL on the back end; tools such as VS Code, Postman. Work alongside the build team to scope tasks, track progress, and merge improvements into live projects. We value clarity and reliability—commit readable code, test your changes, and log what you ship. The Internship helps you add credible, real‑project entries to your portfolio and résumé. Ideal for learners wanting hands‑on exposure while contributing to production‑adjacent tasks in a professional setup. Expect to handle bite‑sized tasks, post concise updates, and move items from backlog to done with clear commits.


Requirements

• Ability to collaborate in virtual teams using tools like Zoom, Slack, or Trello.
• Eagerness to learn modern frameworks such as React, Angular, or Django.
• A personal computer with stable internet access.
• Open to students, graduates, or career switchers.
• Comfortable with self-paced online learning.
• Basic familiarity with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.


Benefits

• Internship certificate & Letter of Recommendation (performance-based).
• Certificate of completion at the end of the program.
• Networking opportunities with global peers and professionals.
• Hands-on training with live projects across front-end and back-end.
• Practical learning with industry frameworks such as Django, React, or WordPress.
• Opportunity for future full-time consideration based on performance.

title: Front-end developer intern
descriptionHtml:
Position offered: Front-end developer intern


Job Type: 40 hour, Internship


Number of position: 1


About Pluxbox Pluxbox offers a cloud-based open platform (PaaS) that makes it easy for them to develop applications in a NoCode manner. This helps them to stay ahead of the competition and be ready to catch the next wave. Pluxbox is an innovative and fast-growing IT company that operates worldwide for media companies such as NPO, VRT, News. UK and RTL. Find more information about the platform at https://pluxbox.com


Grow your career


We make a global impact with a small, high-quality team. Pluxbox ~18 people and more than half are engineers. Our engineers work on everything from ideation to launch to growth, and we give a ton of responsibility to our team members.


All our company business processes are based on agile and lean. This means that each step is validated end-to-end. Not only in terms of design and code, but also in terms of product propositions and market fit. In everything we do, we set learning goals and see if it brings traction as expected.


In order to be able to cope with rapid growth, Pluxbox intends to expand both the sales and production team in the coming period. As a young team we all are very passionate about our work and are highly motivated.


Tasks

  • Contributing to functional and technical design and development of well-structured software products Contribute to maintenance of existing code bases.

  • With a clear focus on the customer, develop advanced web applications.

  • Producing high-quality products for our software solutions

  • Software documentation, testing and quality assurance

  • Defining, scoping and implementing our software products as a development team member.


Requirements

  • You are a bachelor’s or master student.

  • You describe yourself as positive, proactive, assertive and you are a teamplayer;

  • You have strong organisational skills with the demonstrated ability to prioritise multiple tasks and deliver results;

  • Motivated self-starter taking ownership with ability to adapt to a continually changing business and work environment and manage multiple priorities;

  • Strong verbal, written and listening communication skills in English.

  • You are a creative talent with a natural sense of design.

  • You have working or practical knowledge of frontend frameworks such as JavaScript, Vuejs, typescript, HTML, CSS.

  • Experience with Scrum is a plus

  • An appealing online CV website is a plus


Benefits

In our international, diverse and fast-paced working environment we aim to create a feeling of belonging and connection as the base for achieving our goals as a team. We also offer:



  • A flat Structure & informal culture.

  • Flexible opportunity to work from home and office.

  • You gain practical experience at an internationally renowned technology company;

  • Standup desks, company laptop & hardware.

  • Christmas party, online games on fridays, everyday afternoon drinks after 16:00.

  • You gain useful knowledge with good stipend.

  • You receive good support within an open and pleasant working culture.

  • You work on live projects that will be used all over the world.

  • Unlimited drinks and coffee.


Interested? share your CV.


If you have any questions or want to know more about the vacancy? Don't hesitate! contact Ms. K. Sharma

companySlogan: Your media supply chain in one unified flow
companyDescription:
Pluxbox is a no-code development platform, which enables media companies to create a highly personalized digital ecosystem to seamlessly connect and automate all the essential media workflows and applications.  

With Pluxbox, media organisations get all the power and speed to keep up with ever-changing consumer demands and increasing competition for consumers' attention. At the same time, internal teams will benefit from a productivity boost and easy access to all the analytical data. 

Pluxbox offers a fast, low risk and agile way to develop highly-personalized applications for any media needs.

title: Front-End Developer
descriptionHtml:
At Cocoroco.com we're looking for a Front-End Developer to join our tech team.

About Us

We are Cocoroco.com! We believe the war on talent is a matter of a loca l market mismatch. That’s why we’re enabling companies to tap into the global talent pool through our online talent marketplace for remote customer service, sales and compliance talent. By doing so, global talent can connect with international companies, work from home and get fair compensation. It is therefore our mission to make work accessible for everyone globally, regardless of their location or background. Talents will now access the global labor market and maximize their career growth by unlocking their full potential.

Founded in early 2021, Cocoroco.com is growing at a fast pace and has built a proven online marketplace to support our business model. Speed and quality are the core drivers of our success which are accelerated by automation, and our model is trusted by companies such as Bunq, Rituals, Picnic, and many more.

About The Job

We are now looking for a frontend developer to join our team located at the Keizersgracht in the center of Amsterdam. Be our first in-house frontend tech hire and help shape our innovative marketplace to make work accessible for everyone globally.

We're currently working with an agency to develop our platform, and this will be our first internal FE position to grow the in-house tech team.

This is a unique opportunity to become part of a profitable, fast-growing company, where you’ll have the flexibility to define and build on the technical foundations of our business. The ideal candidate is passionate about frontend development, performance optimization, and user experience—with the potential to lead our future frontend team.

Does this sound like the challenge you need? Don’t wait—reach out to discuss.

Objective

Spearhead the team’s technical success by building, validating, and maintaining the frontend technical roadmap.

Scope

  • Reporting to the co-founder.
  • Be the first in-house frontend tech hire.

Responsibilities

  • Develop and maintain web applications with a focus on performance and user experience.
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define, design, and ship new features.
  • Ensure the scalability, security, and reliability of frontend applications.
  • Participate in code reviews and contribute to team knowledge sharing.
  • Implement and maintain CI/CD pipelines to ensure smooth deployment processes.
  • Monitor, troubleshoot, and improve application performance, ensuring high availability and reliability.
  • Optimize frontend applications for speed and responsiveness.

Requirements

Technical skills:

  • Proficiency in TypeScript and React.
  • Understanding of RESTful APIs and frontend interaction with microservices.
  • Strong grasp of frontend performance optimization techniques.
  • Experience with frontend testing frameworks.
  • Knowledge of cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, Azure, Google Cloud).
  • Experience with containerization and frontend CI/CD pipelines.
  • Familiarity with AI and machine learning concepts is a plus.

Experience

  • >5 years of work experience with mainstream frontend frameworks.
  • Proven track record of developing scalable frontend applications.
  • Experience in designing and implementing user-friendly interfaces.
  • Demonstrated ability to work on complex projects from concept to deployment.
  • Experience in managing and optimizing frontend applications in cloud environments.

Soft Skills

  • Strong problem-solving abilities.
  • Excellent communication and teamwork skills.
  • Ability to work in a fast-paced, dynamic environment.

Nice To Have

  • Experience with marketplaces and AI-driven projects.
  • Understanding of generative AI for frontend interactions.

Benefits

Perks and benefits:

  • Competitive salary, on a labor contract.
  • Opportunity to work on innovative projects.
  • Professional development and growth opportunities.
  • Flexible working hours and remote work options.

Application Process

  • Submit your resume and a cover letter detailing your experience and why you are a good fit for this role.
  • Application review.
  • Cultural interview.
  • Technical interview.
  • Offer.

Apply for the job

Do you want to join our team? Then we'd love to hear about you!

companyDescription:
Cocoroco.com connects businesses with top-tier talent in customer service, sales, and compliance from over 20 countries and in 16 languages, reducing recruitment costs and accelerating the hiring process while enhancing flexibility.

Our user-friendly interface allows companies to post jobs for free and gain direct access to our talent pool of vetted candidates who are ready to interview. 

With Cocoroco, companies can effortlessly find and hire the ideal candidate for their open positions, whether it’s for a short-term assignment or a long-term contract.

title: Full Stack Developer
descriptionHtml:
Job Description

We are looking for an innovative and collaborative Full Stack Developer to join our team. This role is for a versatile developer who can take ownership of features from concept to deployment. You will be building robust, scalable applications by connecting a polished frontend to powerful backend services, with a focus on creating seamless, end-to-end products that may include AI-powered features.

What We Need

  • Eye for Design: A strong sense of aesthetics and usability, with the ability to translate design concepts into beautiful, functional user interfaces.
  • Excellent Communicator & Team Player: Articulate, collaborative, and able to work effectively within a team environment, sharing ideas and feedback constructively.
  • Adaptable & Innovative Mindset: A natural curiosity and eagerness to explore new technologies and venture into uncharted territory. You shouldn't shy away from learning something new to solve a problem.
  • AI-Enhanced Workflow: Fully embraces AI technologies to optimize their workflow, from in-IDE assistants (like GitHub Copilot, Cursor) to external tools and command-line agents.
  • Knowledge of Design Systems: Experience with or a solid understanding of design systems is a significant plus. Familiarity with tools like Figma and Tokens Studio is highly valued.

What You’ll Do

  • Design, develop, and maintain full-stack applications using our core stack.
  • Architect and build AI-powered features and applications, integrating with large language models (LLMs) and other AI services.
  • Build responsive and performant user interfaces with React and Next.js, utilizing our design system and component libraries built with Storybook and Vanilla Extract.
  • Develop and manage server-side logic and APIs using Node.js.
  • In cooperation with our TechOps department, deploy and maintain cloud infrastructure on AWS, ensuring scalability, reliability, and security.
  • Collaborate with frontend and backend developers to integrate user-facing elements with server-side logic.

Key technical strengths we’re looking for

  • Frontend: Strong proficiency in React, Next.js, Vanilla Extract, Vite, and Storybook.
  • Backend: Solid experience with Node.js.
  • Headless CMS: Experience architecting and integrating solutions with headless CMS platforms like Sanity (our default), Contentful, DatoCMS, or Strapi.
  • Cloud: Hands-on experience with AWS services (e.g., EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS).
  • AI Integration: Familiarity with building applications that leverage AI/ML APIs (e.g., OpenAI, Hugging Face, Anthropic) is highly desirable.
  • Design Integration: Experience working with Figma and Tokens Studio to implement designs accurately.
  • Databases: Knowledge of both SQL and NoSQL databases.

About Us

We’ve been exploring technology's potential to deliver breakthrough innovations since 1998. We believe that deep technical know-how combined with cutting-edge creativity drives change to future-proof businesses. Change relies on radical synergy. Technology and creativity should work in perfect unison. Tech enables creativity. Creativity unlocks the potential of tech.

Our track record of disruptive ventures and innovative ideas shows that we have transformative thinking deeply ingrained in our DNA. We punch above our weight when it comes to consulting, creating and maintaining digital ecosystems for global clients like VodafoneZiggo, Polestar, citizenM, and Philips. With a team of 450+ specialists across brand, experience, technology, and data & AI, we have the power to drive fundamental transformation at scale.

Diversity, Equity, Inclusion

Our people are a true cross-section of society. That’s how we ensure that the services, campaigns, and products we create uphold the same quality regardless of who interacts with them. We welcome everybody and respect individual identities. We are convinced that diversity stimulates creativity and ensures innovations.

title: Frontend Developer
descriptionHtml:
Would you like to build digital platforms for leading clients like VodafoneZiggo, Polestar, citizenM, or NLZIET? Work with modern frameworks like React and Svelte? And collaborate with a group of driven, talented, and fun people?

What are you going to do?

As a Senior Frontend Developer, you’ll take the lead in designing, developing, and delivering advanced web applications for our clients. You’ll be a key player in setting technical direction, guiding fellow developers, and ensuring project success from both a technical and stakeholder perspective. You’ll work with modern tools like TypeScript, React, and Svelte within a team that values growth, quality, and knowledge-sharing.

You will:

  • Take ownership of complex frontend projects and steer them from start to finish.
  • Make informed architectural decisions and ensure they align with our established standards.
  • Lead implementation using React (Contexts & Hooks), Svelte, and TypeScript.
  • Be the go-to person for stakeholders, clients, and dependent teams.
  • Mentor and support medior and junior developers, helping them grow.
  • Provide structure and guidance to your team during challenging phases.
  • Contribute to and help shape internal standards within the Web team.
  • Support pre-sales processes for new or ongoing clients by estimating and scoping projects.
  • Justify technical decisions and approaches directly to clients.
  • Conduct code reviews and uphold quality standards across the team.


The team

Within our web team, continuous learning and knowledge-sharing are central. We run weekly Web Weekly sessions to explore frameworks, new ideas, and challenges from real projects. Our TED-style team talks go beyond code – they’re a platform for inspiration, whether that’s a new tool, personal insight, or a success story (tech-related or not).

We also collaborate closely with the Smart TV team (Svelte & TypeScript) and the React Native team, sharing best practices and technical developments. Code reviews are a must — no matter your level — and even senior developers are challenged to explain, teach, and reflect. As a senior, you’re expected to support and guide the team, not just in code but also in structure and decision-making.

Who are we looking for?

You’re not just passionate about frontend development — you have a clear vision and can confidently lead technical discussions and project decisions. You thrive in environments where you can support others and shape the direction of both projects and people. You’re also comfortable switching between code, team coaching, and direct client interaction.

Learning is part of your DNA — you follow developments in the frontend ecosystem, attend conferences, and love to share your knowledge. Whether it’s defining standards, guiding architecture, estimating project scope or participating in pre-sales — you’re ready to step in.

What do you bring with you?

  • HBO-level thinking and working (or equivalent experience).
  • 5+ years of experience in frontend development, with a senior-level mindset.
  • Solid experience with TypeScript, React (Hooks, Context), and/or Svelte.
  • Proven ability to architect frontend solutions and drive technical strategy.
  • Experience mentoring developers and fostering team growth.
  • Comfortable in a client-facing role, including pre-sales and scoping.
  • Experience with unit testing (e.g., React Testing Library, Jest).
  • Experience with streaming video and DRM is a plus.
  • Fluent in English (Dutch is a bonus).


Who are we?

We’ve been exploring technology's potential to deliver breakthrough innovations since 1998. We believe that deep technical know-how combined with cutting-edge creativity drives change to future-proof businesses. Change relies on radical synergy. Technology and creativity should work in perfect unison. Tech enables creativity. Creativity unlocks the potential of tech.

Our track record of disruptive ventures and innovative ideas shows that we have transformative thinking deeply ingrained in our DNA. We punch above our weight when it comes to consulting, creating, and maintaining digital ecosystems for global clients like VodafoneZiggo, Polestar, citizenM, and Philips. With a team of 450+ specialists across brand, experience, technology, and data & AI, we have the power to drive fundamental transformation at scale.

Diversity, Equity, Inclusion

Our people are a true cross-section of society. That’s how we ensure that the services, campaigns, and products we create uphold the same quality regardless of who interacts with them. We welcome everybody and respect individual identities. We are convinced that diversity stimulates creativity and ensures innovation.

title: Fullstack Developer
descriptionHtml:
Join Bliksund in making a difference

At Bliksund, we dedicate ourselves to creating mission-critical systems that help emergency and healthcare professionals focus on what really matters – saving lives.

Our goal is to create innovative, user-friendly solutions that support emergency workers in both daily operations and during crisis situations. We help those who help.


The ideal candidate

As Fullstack Developer for our Crash Recovery System (CRS) product team you will help improve the tools that support emergency responders worldwide. CRS is used in over 30 countries and serves hundreds of vehicle rescue sheets to our users daily.

The ideal candidate has experience working with microservices and multiplatform. They have a background working with Azure, preferably with containerization and Kubernetes as well. Additionally, they should be able to communicate clearly with team members, convince others of their own ideas and concede to ideas of others.


Application due

As soon as possible

Workplace

Zwaag (NL)


At Bliksund, you will:

  • Contribute to developing robust infrastructure and DevOps processes.
  • Create best practices and communicate benefits and implementation.
  • Translate functional requirements to technical specifications.
  • Mentor (junior) developers and lift those around you.
  • Innovate existing tools and develop new features.
  • Troubleshoot problems and contribute to structural improvements.


We think you have these qualities:

  • Generalist with a passion for learning, enjoys sharing knowledge.
  • Willingness to adapt and adopt new technologies and methodologies
  • Pro-active and pragmatic in solving problems.
  • Great communication both written and verbally.
  • Ability to deal with uncertainty and agile timelines.
  • Value good documentation.
  • Fluent in English.


We think you have these qualifications:

  • 2+ years of experience in C/.NET
  • 2+ years of experience in software development.
  • Experience developing Frontend systems.
  • Experience with working with AWS, GCP, Azure, or other cloud vendors.
  • Experience with pipeline management software (e.g., Azure DevOps).


The following are nice to have:

  • BSc or MSc in computer science, data science, engineering, or similar discipline.
  • Experience with container orchestration technologies (e.g., K8S).


Office location

The ideal candidate should be able to work from Zwaag (NL). Hybrid options can be discussed.

Why join Bliksund?

We do business with purpose through creating innovative software solutions that make a difference. Bliksund is a leading software company providing digital tools for emergency services globally (e.g., Fire and Rescue, Ambulance and Emergency Services). We are a diverse team spread across different locations, cultures and languages. What we all have in common is a dedication to developing cutting-edge digital tools to make work easier, safer and more efficient for our customers. We are a global scale-up built on a Nordic easy-to-work-with culture.

companySlogan: Digital tools for emergency situations providing control, insight and common situational awareness
companyDescription: Bliksund is a leading provider in the digital transformation of the emergency services. Our unique blend of technical expertise and hands-on experience from the field enable us to deliver user-friendly solutions tailored to the emergency services’ work processes. We provide tools and practices facilitating increased service quality and better use of resources. We are proud to be a chosen partner in the Norwegian health ecosystem delivering high quality services aiming for a holistic patient pathway.

title: Full Stack Developer
descriptionHtml:
At Webbers Agency, we are dedicated to developing innovative eCommerce solutions. We build flexible and scalable solutions using MedusaJs, NextJs, and other modern technologies, and we are looking for a passionate Full Stack Developer to join our team.


What will you do?

  • Design and implement architecture for headless eCommerce applications using MedusaJs.
  • Develop and maintain powerful front-end applications with NextJs.
  • Configure and integrate CMS solutions such as Strapi or Payload.
  • Translate project requirements into clear technical specifications.
  • Proactively identify and solve problems.
  • Write and maintain tests to ensure software quality.
  • Communicate regularly with clients to achieve project goals.
  • Collaborate with colleagues, including project managers and QA teams, and contribute to a positive team dynamic.


What do you bring?

  • Experience with eCommerce solutions.
  • At least 4 years of experience as a software developer in a commercial environment.
  • You are an EU citizen and live in the Netherlands.
  • Strong knowledge of TypeScript.
  • Experience with NextJs and/or React for building dynamic interfaces.
  • Proficiency with CMS platforms such as Strapi or Payload.
  • Experience with Postgres and/or MongoDB databases and knowledge of database management.
  • Proficient in using version control.
  • Experience with Agile/SCRUM methodologies and associated tools.
  • Professional level of English (C1 or higher).


Nice to have:

  • Hands-on experience with MedusaJs, Strapi, and/or Payload.
  • A background in the eCommerce industry.
  • Knowledge of scalable system architectures.


What do we offer?

  • An opportunity to work in a growing company that takes eCommerce to the next level.
  • Become part of a young, dynamic team that values innovation.
  • Flexible working hours and the option for hybrid work.
  • Competitive salary: €4,500 - €7,000 based on skills and experience.
  • Pension scheme.
  • Travel reimbursement.
  • A brand-new MacBook, also for private use.
  • Budget and time for your professional growth and development.
  • Participation in team-building activities and events.
  • Influence on the future development of our organizational culture.


Our application process:

  • Introductory interview
  • Code challenge
  • Feedback and decision


Are you ready to help us revolutionize the eCommerce industry? Join Webbers Agency and help build the future of online business. Send your CV to hi@webbers.com or apply through our form.


===========================================


Bij Webbers Agency zijn we toegewijd aan het ontwikkelen van innovatieve eCommerce-oplossingen. Wij bouwen flexibele en schaalbare oplossingen met MedusaJs, NextJs en andere moderne technologieën, en zoeken een gepassioneerde Full Stack Developer om ons team te versterken.


Wat ga je doen?

  • Ontwerpen en implementeren van de architectuur voor headless eCommerce-toepassingen met MedusaJs.
  • Ontwikkelen en onderhouden van krachtige frontend-applicaties met NextJs.
  • Configureren en integreren van CMS-oplossingen zoals Strapi of Payload.
  • Project vereisten vertalen naar duidelijke technische specificaties.
  • Proactief problemen identificeren en oplossen.
  • Testen schrijven en onderhouden om de kwaliteit van de software te waarborgen.
  • Regelmatig communiceren met klanten om projectdoelen te behalen.
  • Samenwerken met collega's, waaronder projectmanagers en QA-teams, en bijdragen aan een positieve teamdynamiek.


Wat breng je mee?

  • Je hebt ervaring met E-commerce oplossingen.
  • Minimaal 4 jaar ervaring als softwareontwikkelaar in een commerciële omgeving.
  • Je bent een EU-burger en woont in Nederland.
  • Sterke kennis van TypeScript.
  • Ervaring met NextJs en/of React voor het bouwen van dynamische interfaces.
  • Vaardigheid in het werken met CMS-platformen zoals Strapi of Payload.
  • Ervaring met Postgres en/of MongoDB datanases en kennis van databasebeheer.
  • Proficient in het gebruik van versiebeheer.
  • Ervaring met Agile/SCRUM-methodologieën en bijbehorende tools.
  • Engels op professioneel niveau (C1 of hoger).


Pré:

  • Hands-on ervaring met MedusaJs, Strapi en/of Payload.
  • Achtergrond in de eCommerce-industrie.
  • Kennis van schaalbare systeemarchitecturen.


Wat bieden wij?

  • Een kans om te werken in een groeiend bedrijf dat eCommerce naar een hoger niveau tilt.
  • Onderdeel worden van een jong en dynamisch team dat innovatie hoog in het vaandel heeft staan.
  • Flexibele werkuren en de mogelijkheid tot hybride werken.
  • Marktconform salaris: €4.500 - €7.000 gebaseerd op competenties en ervaring.
  • Pensioenregeling.
  • Reiskostenvergoeding.
  • Een gloednieuwe Macbook, ook voor privégebruik.
  • Budget en tijd voor jouw professionele groei en ontwikkeling.
  • Deelname aan teambuilding activiteiten en evenementen.
  • Invloed op de verdere ontwikkeling van onze organisatiecultuur.


Ons sollicitatieproces

  • Kennismakingsgesprek
  • Code challenge
  • Feedback en beslissing

title: Full Stack Software Engineer
descriptionHtml:
WHO WE ARE

At INFO, we love solving complex problems for our clients by designing and building digital products that support their core business. We bring together design, data, and technology expertise to create impactful solutions. We work in close, long-term partnerships with our clients. For example, we improved the customer and employee experience for the Stadsbank van Lening of the City of Amsterdam. We helped Growy scale up its concept for a fully automated vertical farm. With our bike management platform, around 6 million people each year are able to rent OV-fiets for the last part of their journey. These are just a few examples of how we help our clients drive sustainable innovation.

 

Our team consists of about 40 people, all passionate about digital innovation. We love asking tough questions and are driven by curiosity— key ingredients for staying ahead and helping our clients do the same.


WHAT YOU'LL DO

As a Full-stack Software Engineer at INFO, you’ll be actively involved in creating impactful digital solutions within an agile team:

  • Design, develop, test, and maintain features across the application stack for various client projects.
  • Translate requirements and designs into high-quality, responsive user interfaces.
  • Build and optimize scalable backend services, APIs, and business logic.
  • Implement and manage effective data storage solutions with a focus on performance and integrity.
  • Integrate our applications with external services and data sources.
  • Write clean, maintainable, and well-tested code; participate in code reviews and uphold team standards.
  • Shape direction in close partnership with designers, product owners, and developers.
  • Proactively steer ideas to improve development practices, application architecture, and overall code quality.


WHAT WE EXPECT FROM YOU (YOUR BACKGROUND)

At INFO, we value curiosity—we’re not afraid to try new things. The ideal person for this role brings the following:

  • Proven professional experience as a Full-stack Developer or Software Engineer.
  • Strong proficiency in TypeScript.
  • Solid frontend experience with React (familiarity with Next.js is a strong plus).
  • Demonstrable backend experience using JS tooling (experience with NestJS is highly desirable).
  • Sound understanding of relational databases (e.g., PostgreSQL) and practical experience with ORMs/query builders.
  • A strong commitment to writing high-quality, maintainable, well-documented code.
  • Excellent communication and teamwork skills, with the ability to articulate technical concepts clearly.
  • Intrinsic interest in technology, digital innovation, and tackling complex challenges.
  • You think in outcomes: comfortable shaping scope with product/design, validating assumptions, and shipping iteratively.
  • You care about users: willing to look at analytics, instrumentation, and feedback to guide improvements.
  • You own what you build: from an initial problem statement or technical spike through delivery, monitoring, and iteration.
  • Bachelor’s or Master’s in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Information Technology, or a related field.


BONUS POINTS

• Cloud & DevOps: AWS, Infrastructure as Code (Terraform/OpenTofu), Docker (Kubernetes a plus).

• Data platforms or data processing exposure (e.g., Kafka, Spark, or analytics pipelines).

• Python experience for data/back-end tasks.

• Open-source experience or contributions.

• Practical experience integrating LLM/AI capabilities (e.g., OpenAI/Anthropic APIs, Hugging Face).

• Working with embeddings and vector databases (e.g., pgvector, Pinecone, Weaviate) and RAG-style patterns.

• Prompt engineering, evaluation/testing of AI features, and guardrails/safety considerations.

• Basic MLOps or model-serving know-how (e.g., MLflow, SageMaker, Databricks) and attention to privacy/compliance.


WHAT WE OFFER

A place in an ambitious and tight-knit team where you’ll have the freedom to shape your role. You’ll get plenty of space to implement your ideas and experiment with new methods and techniques. We offer a competitive, market-based salary with excellent secondary benefits, including:

• 30 vacation days

• Non-contributory pension plan

• Flexible working hours


Our office is located at the Marineterrein in Amsterdam - a hub for innovative companies. Here you'll find great colleagues, tasty lunches, and fun social drinks (Borrels). There are often events on site, so there’s always something happening nearby. Need to clear your head? Nothing works better than a walk around the grounds or enjoying the view from a quiet spot by the water. Next to working at the office, we also make sure you’re able to work comfortably from home.


Join our team!

Are you excited after reading about this vacancy? Please apply via LinkedIn using the button on this page.

companySlogan: We solve complex challenges by designing and developing business-critical digital products.
companyDescription:
At INFO, we create impact through digital innovation. We combine design, technology, and business strategy to help organizations deliver sustainable value in an ever-changing world. Our holistic approach brings these disciplines together and seamlessly aligns with the needs of our clients and their end-users. This ensures solutions that are not only intuitive and user-friendly but also scalable and future-proof. Our lean and agile approach makes innovation inspiring, commercially viable and fun. This approach allows us to solve complex challenges by breaking them down into incremental and sustainable solutions. There’s nothing we love more than solving complicated puzzles together with our client. 

To us, our history functions as a propellor rather than an anchor. We use our 30 years of experience with digital innovation to continuously learn and evolve, and to make our mark on the digital landscape. From pioneering Dutch websites to groundbreaking digital solutions, every step has brought us closer to what we are today and what the world may be tomorrow.

We’re a quirky squad of optimistic people with one common strand of innovation-loving DNA. Designers, engineers, scrum masters, consultants, interns, marketeers, business developers; we’re all in it to make the world a better place, one digital solution at a time.

title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer, Contract
descriptionHtml:
Who Are We?

Xcelirate develops technologically-advanced platforms which are accessed by thousands of users every minute! We are proud to offer a workplace where the sharpest developers come together to strategically plan and swiftly execute practices which see us maintain our existing market dominance and attain global expansion. We owe our success to our customers who have seen us grow across a decade, and our talented team who have made that growth possible.

What are we looking for?

You're a full-stack dev - you've been around the block, and you know your way through both backend trenches and frontend battlefields. PHP? Still your reliable sidekick. JavaScript? Sometimes a mischievous friend, sometimes a chaos gremlin, but you've learned how to keep it in line.

You work best with fierce independence. You don't need hand-holding - you're the one who does the hand-holding when it's needed. You don't wait for direction; you are the direction. To twist a phrase: you're not the one who knocks, you're the one who delivers.

You live for making things work. Whether that's a clean new feature, a quirky legacy bug fix, or tracking down why that button refuses to do what it's told. You like code that's neat and maintainable, but you're also practical - you know sometimes duct tape is exactly what the situation calls for.

Building apps is your thing - you tinker, refactor, and optimize because you can't help yourself. You get a kick out of speeding things up, cleaning things up, and occasionally wondering what exactly your predecessor was drinking when they wrote that function.

And yes, you're not afraid to dive into the relics. That PHP app last touched in 2010? It still needs love. The JavaScript file with 1,200 lines and no semicolons? You'll wrestle it into submission.

What will you be doing?

  • Manage your own time while adhering to priorities set by the company
  • Build new features and improve existing ones across our platforms
  • Refactor and enhance applications to keep them performant, scalable, and maintainable
  • Write tests (unit, integration, and end-to-end) to ensure software reliability
  • Be involved in every phase of the software lifecycle, from ideation to deployment
  • Participate in deep technical discussions and help shape our applications and infrastructure
  • Get hands-on with all elements of the stack, from backend logic to frontend interactions
  • Identify inefficiencies and help streamline workflows, reducing unnecessary work
  • Take ownership of your work, ensuring high-quality results and maintainable solutions

Requirements

What will you bring along?

  • 10+ years of PHP development, with expertise in at least one framework (Symfony, Zend preferred)
  • 12+ years of web application development experience: you've seen the evolution of web tech and know how to build for the future
  • 6+ years working with frontend frameworks/libraries like Vue.js, React, Nuxt, or Next.js
  • Deep understanding of scalable web architectures: monolithic, microservices, or hybrid, you know when to use what
  • Strong communication skills, with the ability to explain technical concepts to both engineers and non-engineers
  • Passion for automated testing (unit, integration, and end-to-end) and test-driven development (TDD)
  • Hands-on experience building and maintaining CI/CD pipelines
  • Strong expertise in PHP development, debugging, and algorithm/software design
  • Knowledge of agile development tools, techniques, and principles
  • Familiarity with Ansible and Terraform for infrastructure automation
  • Experience deploying, managing, and scaling applications in cloud environments (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud)
  • Strong grasp of web security: encryption, authentication, authorization, and everything in between.

We are always looking for the best candidates, so if you think you would be a good fit even if you don't meet 100% of the requirements, we would love to hear from you!

Benefits

How We Support Our Contractors

  • €60/hour + retention bonus scheme: Competitive contractor rate with a generous bonus paid every 6 months based on your time with us
  • Top-Notch Workstation: We provide the latest MacBook, branded merchandise, and everything you need for an optimal work environment
  • Global Co-Working Access: Work from a global network of co-working spaces to keep your work-life dynamic and flexible
  • Flexibility: Enjoy full flexibility in work location and hours, supporting a work-life balance tailored to your needs
  • Events and Gatherings: Participate in exciting events throughout the year, including team gatherings, cultural events, and other fun activities

companyDescription:
Xcelirate develops technologically-advanced platforms which are accessed by thousands of users every minute! We are proud to offer a workplace where the sharpest developers come together to strategically plan and swiftly execute practices which see us maintain our existing market dominance and attain global expansion. We owe our success to our customers who have seen us grow across a decade, and our talented team who have made that growth possible.

Within the Xcelirate family, our leaders vow to remain generous, mindful and clear while encouraging ownership and creativity, leaving everyone with a sense of pride and confidence in one-another’s reliability.

We are committed to attracting and retaining professional and accountable team members who respect cautious and sensible decision making.

title: PHP developer
descriptionHtml:
An award-winning, service email marketing agency that has secured its place in the Emerce Top 100 for the ninth year in a row

  • PERMANENT
  • Amsterdam
  • Posted 7 months ago

Be responsible for one of the most intuitive marketing automation platforms in Europe. Our in-house developed software are taking the world by storm. In the last year alone there have been 52 new releases, the automation of innovative new marketing channels such as WhatsApp and Push Notifications and the groundwork is being laid for a state of the art Customer Data Platform – and you could be a part of it all!

Level up your career

Role

You will be one of the great minds in a team of skilled developers. We give you the opportunity to build on and develop, our Marketing Automation Platform to keep it at the forefront of innovation. As our PHP Software Developer your role will include:

  • The development of new software modules.
  • Innovation through microservices (Kubernetes)
  • Play a part in the successful delivery of 3,500,000,000 emails every year.
  • Deliver tailor-made solutions for our customers by developing and integrating specific functionalities for them. From devising solutions to implementation.
  • The testing and optimisation of your development work.
  • you pay attention to the quality of the codebase to keep the technical debt as small as possible.

“What was very important to me when looking for a new job as a developer was the opportunity to continue to grow. Work must remain a challenge and diversity is a big plus. Together with the team you are developing our platform and you learn a lot. There is plenty of room for personal development and enough space to spar if you’re in need of inspiration. In addition to the standard work, there are also a lot of activities outside office hours. If you like it, you will regularly be invited to play squash or bouldering. In any case; plenty to do!” – Developer since July 2019

Our Promise to You

A Challenging Environment With The Freedom To Learn And Progress Within a Proactive, Young, Friendly Team. We Also Offer Some Great Perks

  • Foosball table and Playstation 4
  • Flexible working and working from home
  • Attractive secondary employment conditions such as collective health insurance, pension, 25 vacation days (e.b g. 40-hour working week), a laptop, good home working environment and expense allowance;
  • Wellbeing package, including workshops, podcasts and one extra day’s leave.
  • Volunteer days – one additional paid day each year to volunteer for a charity.
  • Revenue and performance-dependent bonus that can be up to one month’s salary;
  • Plenty of opportunities to develop yourself, training budget, knowledge sessions and in-house training;
  • Nice coffee, fruit and a delicious lunch (as soon as we work in the office again );
  • A dynamic working environment, in which we give room for both personal and professional growth;
  • Regular company outings, monthly drinks, quarterly lunches and sports and board games evenings;
  • Centrally located office in a beautiful wooded area, and easy to reach by public transport or car.

We are ….

An award-winning, service email marketing agency that has secured its place in the Emerce Top 100 for the ninth year in a row. With our self-developed email marketing application, we increase the effectiveness of marketing campaigns and customer contact moments. We do this together with more than 80 experts and for emerging players and established A-brands from various industries, including Transavia, Eneco, Greetz, Shell and KWF.

Do you want to work with us already? Do not wait any longer and apply directly via the form below. If we see our new expert in you, we invite you for a meeting with a small delegation from the Development team. If it clicks mutually, we plan a second meeting with the manager and CEO.

What You Bring

You live and breathe state-of-the-are technology. We are looking for someone creative and forward-thinking, and you can take these attributes into your work. You like to work independently, but also like to spar with colleagues for new ideas. We have a strong team of sociable developers who have a wild sense of humour – they’ll keep you on your toes. As our new Software Developer you also have:

Your Name (required)

Your Email (required)

Are you willing to relocate to the Netherlands? (required)

When are you available to work? (required)

What is your hourly rate or salary indication? (required)

Are you allowed to work in Europe, or do you need Visa sponsorship? (required)

Message

Upload CV

We are looking for someone creative and forward-thinking, and you can take these attributes into your work. You like to work independently, but also like to spar with colleagues for new ideas. We have a strong team of sociable developers who have a wild sense of humour – they’ll keep you on your toes. As our new Software Developer you also have:Your Name (required)Your Email (required)Are you willing to relocate to the Netherlands? (required)When are you available to work? (required)What is your hourly rate or salary indication? (required)Are you allowed to work in Europe, or do you need Visa sponsorship? (required)MessageUpload CVΔ

title: Front End Developer
descriptionHtml:
Front-end Softwareontwikkelaar - Bouw mee aan de toekomst van mondzorgsoftware!

Locatie: Heemstede

Salaris: €4.000 – €5.500 per maand (o.b.v. 40 uur)

Dienstverband: Vast, minimaal 32 uur per week

Ben jij een ervaren softwareontwikkelaar die graag impact maakt? Wil je werken aan innovatieve applicaties die de mondzorgsector vooruithelpen? Bij Vertimart zoeken we een Front-end specialist met een passie voor C# en Blazor. Jij brengt onze software naar een hoger niveau en zorgt voor efficiënte, gebruiksvriendelijke oplossingen.

Wat ga je doen?

Jij speelt een sleutelrol in het ontwikkelen en verbeteren van onze applicaties:

  • Ontwikkelen & optimaliseren – Bouw en verfijn software met C# en Blazor.
  • Nieuwe functionaliteiten creëren – Werk aan innovatieve features en modules.
  • Technische uitdagingen tackelen – Los bugs en complexe vraagstukken op.
  • Samenwerken & kennis delen – Werk intensief samen met collega’s en deel best practices.
  • Processen verbeteren – Denk mee over efficiëntere software- en ontwikkelprocessen.


Jouw profiel

  • Sterke technische skills – C# en .NET kennen geen geheimen voor je. Blazor en Azure-ervaring zijn een plus.
  • Analytisch & resultaatgericht – Jij vertaalt complexe processen naar slimme oplossingen.
  • Goede communicatie – Je schakelt makkelijk met zowel tech- als non-tech collega’s.
  • Gestructureerd & nauwkeurig – Je hebt oog voor detail en werkt kwaliteitsgericht.


Wat wij vragen

  • HBO/WO werk- en denkniveau
  • Minimaal 5 jaar ervaring in softwareontwikkeling
  • Ervaring in een Agile-omgeving is een plus
  • Goede beheersing van Nederlands en Engels


Wat wij bieden

  • Uitdagende rol in een innovatief en groeiend bedrijf
  • Informele werksfeer met een enthousiast team
  • Sporten met een personal trainer – blijf fit met je collega’s
  • Hybride werken & workation mogelijkheden
  • Flexibele werktijden – kies voor een werkweek vanaf 32 uur
  • Laptop van de zaak
  • Goede arbeidsvoorwaarden – bonusregeling & pensioen zonder eigen bijdrage


De sollicitatieprocedure

  • Eerste telefonische intake met onze Recruiter daarna een gesprek met je toekomstige leidinggevende en/of collega’s
  • Tweede gesprek + meekijkdagdeel om de sfeer te proeven
  • VOG-aanvraag voor indiensttreding


Klaar om impact te maken? 💥 Solliciteer nu via Chenara Vischer cvischer@mspsgroep.nl of via onze website. We kijken uit naar jouw reactie!

companySlogan: Zorg voor elkaar
companyDescription:
Debiteurenbeheer speciaal voor de zorg
Infomedics neemt het volledige debiteurenbeheer van u over en regelt het gehele facturerings- en incassoproces. We incasseren declaraties bij zorgverzekeraars en patiënten, verwerken retourinformatie, verzorgen eventuele herdeclaraties en verwerken betalingen en betalingsinformatie.

Meer tijd voor echte zorg
In een ideale wereld kunt u zich voor honderd procent concentreren op de zorg voor uw patiënten. Maar de realiteit verlangt dat u behalve zorgverlener ook praktijkmanager, ondernemer en financieel specialist bent. 

Een succesvolle praktijk samen met Infomedics
Infomedics helpt u in de breedte van uw praktijkvoering succesvol te zijn door facturering en debiteurenbeheer uit handen te nemen en grip op uw financiën te organiseren. 

Professionaliteit en lage kosten
Met Infomedics werkt uw praktijk professioneler, heeft u een betere controle over uw cash flow en krijgt u meer tijd voor uw patiënten. Door onze efficiëntie en schaalgrootte blijven de kosten laag. Infomedics werkt samen met alle zorgverzekeraars in Nederland. U kunt dus altijd met uw declaraties bij ons terecht.

title: Frontend Developer (React, Nextjs)
descriptionHtml:
🚀 Build high-performance front-end applications in the world of superyachts!

📍 Remote or Amsterdam | 🌎 Global Team | ⚓ Superyacht Industry


SuperYacht Times is looking for an insanely ambitious front-end developer to strengthen our team. You’ll work on cool products for the highest-end industry there is, for the most exclusive customers in the world. This is not a place for mediocrity.


📩 Apply now and become part of the SuperYacht Times technology team! To apply, please fill out the application form here: https://forms.gle/wUmqA3QwXHMjqSHb6


YOUR ROLE

As a Front-end Developer, you’ll work on our cutting-edge mobile apps using Typescript, React and Nextjs. You’ll collaborate with a passionate back-end and UX team to deliver fast, reliable, and beautifully designed applications that shape the yachting industry.


What You’ll Do

✔️ Build and maintain our front-end apps written with Typescript, React and Nextjs

✔️ Manage and deal with customer feedback and bugs

✔️ Work closely with the other front-enders, UX designers and back-enders to craft seamless user experiences

✔️ Optimise performance and usability

✔️ Collaborate in an agile environment with a focus on clean, maintainable code

✔️ Contribute ideas and solutions to improve our products


Who You Are

✅ 5+ years of experience with front-end development in Typescript

✅ Strong knowledge of Typescript, React, Nextjs, and web development

✅ Experience with React Native is a nice-to-have, but not a requirement

✅ Passion for building intuitive, high-performance web apps

✅ Self-motivated, proactive, and eager to learn

✅ Experience working remotely in a fast-paced, ambitious team

✅ Great communication skills, and good command (written and spoken) of English

✅ A strong team player, with a strong feeling of ownership and responsibility

✅ A problem solver, who prioritises solving the stakeholder need over anything

✅ You Get Things Done™️fast, and efficiently


WHY JOIN US?

✨ Be part of a growing company in a niche, high-end industry

✨ Work remotely with an international team

✨ Help build applications that are used by millions

✨ Contribute to exciting, innovative projects in the yachting world

✨ Competitive salary and a great work culture

companySlogan: SYT brings enjoyment and inspiration to superyacht enthusiasts.
companyDescription:
The world of yachting is exciting and innovative. But it can be hard to find a news source that is both trustworthy and entertaining.

This is SuperYacht Times.
Where superyacht enthusiasts all over the world find information and inspiration.

Whether you’re a proud superyacht owner or aspire to become one, whether you’re a knowledgeable insider or passionate admirer, we keep you updated with the latest news, accurate data and our smart yachting solutions.

We bring you entertainment with high-impact visuals and in-depth articles. Deep-dive into our unmatched intelligence and experience the incredible world of yachting.

News, facts, stories, digital solutions.

We have it all. Get inspired.

SuperYacht Times

title: Senior Backend Developer - PHP Laravel
descriptionHtml:
Company Overview

At NewRich Network, we empower digital entrepreneurs to turn their dreams into reality. Our mission is simple yet bold: to help people create a balanced, fulfilling lifestyle - while building wealth and independence along the way.

We're a fast-growing team driven by one vision: a world where anyone can work remotely, chase their passion, and live life on their own terms.

Our platform combines SaaS tools, e-learning programs, and a supportive social network - a one-stop ecosystem designed for creators, entrepreneurs, and dreamers who want more than just a career.

We believe fulfilling work and a healthy work-life balance is key to living a NewRich Lifestyle.

If you're motivated, ambitious, and ready to grow with us, we want to hear from you!

As a Senior PHP Developer, you'll play a key role in our product's growth. You'll take on leadership responsibilities within the dev team and work closely with our Lead Developer to build and scale our core systems.

Requirements

  • 5+ years as Software Developer with proven project track record.
  • Strong knowledge of PHP 8, Laravel 9+, MySQL, React.js 18.2 (or any other frontend framework).
  • Experience with HTML/CSS/JS, RESTful APIs, Git.
  • Docker/Kubernetes, AWS (or similar cloud).
  • Solid database design and optimization skills.
  • Strong problem-solving, communication, and ability to work independently.
  • Experience with PHPUnit or similar testing frameworks.
  • Good understanding of web app security.
  • Fluency in English (written & spoken).

Nice to have:

  • WebRTC, FFMPEG, HLS, SRT, RTMP, DRM.
  • Node.js/Express, GitHub Actions.
  • NoSQL (MongoDB, Redis).
  • DevOps practices.

Personal qualities:

  • Self-driven, motivated, reliable in a fast-paced environment

Responsibilities:

  • Develop and maintain server-side applications (PHP 8, Laravel, MySQL).
  • Build and optimize APIs, ensure performance, scalability, and security.
  • Implement front-end features with React.js (18.2).
  • Work with CI/CD pipelines, automated testing, and code reviews.
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams, mentor juniors.
  • Manage integrations between systems and cloud services (AWS).
  • Maintain documentation, database schemas, and ensure security best practices

Benefits

  • Paid Adventure Time - Take an all-expenses-paid remote working trip for 3 weeks to a destination of your choice with one of our remote work-trip partners. On top of that, you'll have "Me-Days" - flexible personal days you can take whenever you need a reset
  • Fast Growth, Big Upside - We're a small, ambitious team. That means more ownership, faster learning, and a real chance to shape the future of our company (and your career)
  • Unlimited Learning - You'll get full access to every course and program on our NewRich platform. We invest in your growth because your growth fuels ours
  • Home Office Stipend - Your setup matters. We'll support you with a budget to create your ideal workspace and provide you with a new MacBook to power your productivity
  • Annual Retreat - Work remote, but meet the team IRL. Every year we gather in amazing locations - next stop: Colombia

Excited about this role?

Explore more at https://newrich.com/

We'd love to hear from you!
