Ervaring hebt met het schrijven van Unit, Integration en End-to-end (E2E) tests. Frontend kennis hebt (HTML, CSS, JavaScript) en ervaring hebt met frontend frameworks (Vue, React, Svelte). Je bent:TeamplayerPHP-expertProbleemoplosserWat bieden wij?Een job in een sterk groeiende organisatie met de ambitie om de grootste running specialist in Europa te worden. Leuke werksfeer met gepassioneerde en sportieve collega’s, inclusief vrijmibo’s en team-/bedrijfsuitjes. Korting op de producten die we bij All4running verkopenEen werkplek in de kantoorruimte van ons nieuw opgeleverde magazijn én thuiswerkmogelijkheden. Een salaris tussen €3812,- en €5358,- afhankelijk van relevante werkervaring / skillsPensioenregelingStartbewijs voor hardloopevenementenReiskostenvergoeding, vanaf 12,5 km enkele reis woon-werkWerken bij All4runningLiefde voor de sport en voor hardlopen in het bijzonder. Dat is wat ons bij All4running drijft. Onze winnaarsmentaliteit gecombineerd met onze vakkennis maakt dat wij als hardloopspecialisten altijd streven naar het aanbieden van de beste producten. Maar met dat alleen nemen we geen genoegen. Die specialistische producten van hoge kwaliteit bieden we aan met de beste service. Die service naar de hardloper, onze vakkennis en liefde voor de loopsport voeren bij ons daarom altijd de boventoon. Zowel in onze winkels, in onze webshop als binnen ons team.
companySlogan: Building The Future of Running Retail
companyDescription: All4running is the most progressive and leading running specialist in the Netherlands and Flanders. With web shops; all4running.nl, all4running.be and stores; Flagship store Alkmaar and All4running Shoe Advisors in Amsterdam and Utrecht. Besides this, the organisations serves with the web shop 21RUN.com runners from Germany, Denmark and Sweden. At All4running and 21RUN runners receive specialist products with the highest quality, combined with the best service.  The service to the runners, professional knowledge and love for running have always been predominated: in the stores, the web shops and within the team. The interaction between the stores and web shop is important within the company. As a single entity, All4running/21RUN strives to become the largest running specialist in Europe.

title: Full Stack Engineer
descriptionHtml:
Coders Connect is partnering with an innovative client to build the next generation of data-powered products 🚀


Are you ready to take ownership of both frontend and backend systems? As a Full Stack Engineer, you’ll design, build, and operate scalable software solutions that power intelligent applications and customer-facing platforms.


What you’ll be doing ✨

  • End-to-end ownership: From architecture to deployment, you’ll deliver robust, cloud-native solutions.
  • Lead the way: Set best practices for software design, architecture, and delivery.
  • Data in motion: Build seamless integrations, data pipelines, and front-facing applications.
  • Measure impact: Define success metrics and instrument analytics to guide product decisions.
  • Collaborate across teams: Work closely with product, ML engineers, and stakeholders to bring ideas to life.
  • Stay sharp: Keep up with emerging technologies and bring in tools that drive real impact (not just hype 😉).


What you bring 🔧

  • Strong Azure experience, building and deploying at scale.
  • Proven full stack track record — backend to frontend.
  • Solid software engineering fundamentals: testing, CI/CD, production ownership.
  • A product-first mindset — clear communicator, pragmatic problem solver.
  • Experience in startup or fast-moving environments.


Preferred stack 💻

  • Languages: C# (.NET), Typescript (Next.js), Python
  • Data & Processing: SQL (PostgreSQL), Pandas (+ ETL tools a plus)
  • Cloud: Azure (ML, Data Factory, Data Lake, Event Hub, Functions, App Services, Containers, VNETs)
  • DevEx: Git, CI/CD (GitHub Actions or Azure DevOps), Docker


Why join? 🌍

  • Hybrid, flexible work setup based in the Netherlands
  • Significant ownership and growth opportunities
  • A chance to join an international, forward-thinking team
  • Work on meaningful projects where your code makes an impact


Note: Visa sponsorship is not available for this role.

companyDescription:
Coders Connect was formed from a technology community that has a focus on Software Engineering, Data Engineering, DevOps, QA Automation and Data Science. We provide a full hiring lifecycle experience. Everything from talent identification to offer management and most importantly, onboarding to aftercare and satisfaction - with everything in between.

Coders Connect started out as a dev community and now we are brilliantly placed to tap into some of the richest dev hot-spots. We continue to grow in our constantly evolving marketplace. We have broadened our vision and increased our capabilities to add more value to our communities.

Our tech communities are strongest in Software Engineering, Data Engineering, DevOps, QA Automation and Data Science. Need a change? Need talent? Our communities grow every day, our ability to deliver quality at speed is something that has proven valuable to many leading tech firms and technologists worldwide.

title: PHP Developer
descriptionHtml:
At Cryptohopper we're looking for a PHP Developer to join our team.

  • Do not apply if you're not already living in the Netherlands! Your application will be denied automatically.

zk-SNARKs, miners, nodes, bulls, bears, FOMO and FUD. Some of those terms may sound like Marvel villains or curse words (“I should FUD you upside the head for staring at my nodes!”), but to a trained ear they spell m.a.g.i.c. Cryptocurrency magic, to be exact. In our view – and yes, it’s a bold statement – crypto will be the currency your grandkids consider the norm. And for good reason, because however cryptic crypto may seem, the underlying Blockchain technology is as safe as possible.

Trading in these currencies, though? That’s when sh*t used to go sideways. Until the launch of Cryptohopper: an AI-driven bot that makes crypto trading accessible, fun, and worthwhile. Do you want to optimize and innovate a bot that hosts more than nine million transactions worth an estimated 2 billion USD each month?

Show us what you got!

Interlude: fork in the road time!

Picture yourself at a junction. Not just ‘any’ junction, but, say, a crossroads in Dark Souls III. Lots of dynamic lighting. Fire. Brimstone. The works. Nifty particle effects. The kind of scene that invariably unfolds whenever you need to prep for a Stand Up. Anyway. At this particular junction, you can go right or (surprise!) left. So what to do? Well, that depends on your ambitions and skillset.

PHP Developer?

Turn right if you want to develop edge-of-your-seat backend solutions that enhance our infrastructure, trading bot, and AI. Enhancements that boost and safeguard our global trading platform in terms of scalability, reliability and security. Prepare to snuggle up (currently not too closely) to our product teams, so they can build (and run, and love) the exact features our users need to trade on cryptocurrency markets. To succeed, you have to be versed in PHP and Javascipt/Node.js, and willing to get up close and personal with up-and-coming tooling. Including tech that you introduce to the stack. This is the perfect position if you combine ‘hardcore’ coding skills with a ‘security first’ mindset and are excited to learn about crypto trading and blockchain technologies

Hi, we're the stack.

PHP, NodeJs, MySQL, InfluxDB, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, jQuery, RESTful, APIs, Cryptotrading, AWS, Cyber security, etc.

You know you got this if.

  • You have 10+ years of experience as a PHP Developer
  • You are into PHP, NodeJs, MySQL, and similar
  • You enjoy working in a team where feedback is the common language
  • Your lunch break experiments sometimes get out of hand. One time you accidentally developed an app that correlated caffeine intake with sock funkiness. And it worked.

What We Offer.

A mission-driven culture with a great work/life balance and a good benefits package. Sure, we work hard to get sh*t done, but we also regularly push our moustache (sorry, it’s a silly joke for Dutch readers) for a VR gaming session, picnics in the park, indoor bouldering, drinks at the pub, and whatever happens in our (wo)man cave - and probably best stays there. The setting aside, we also:

  • Pay you (pinky promise!): between EUR 52K and 100K per year [skill dependent]
  • Allow you to work wherever, including our Amsterdam HQ and your favorite lunch room (what’s good?)
  • Send you on your merry way for 25 days each year, minimum (more is negotiable)
  • Provide you with great gear; a high-end laptop and whatever else you need to succeed. Perhaps an AI-driven desk chair that *knows* when you want to lean back?
  • Shower you with extras, like trading benefits, a generous training budget, and (mom will be proud!) the opportunity to work in a domain that accelerates financial inclusion for the unbanked
  • Fun activities each last Thursday of the month, coffee that won’t make you wish you chose tea, and lots of mind-blowing feedback on your work, hobby’s, pets, and cuddly toy collection. And we sincerely look forward to hearing what’s on your mind, too.

Ready to virtually meet our engineers?

We don’t require (in fact, please don’t) a motivation letter; we’d rather have a good chat and tell you everything you want to know. About life, the universe, and everything!

companySlogan: The most complete automated cryptocurrency trading platform out there.
companyDescription:
We change the way the world invests. 

Started in 2017 by two brothers, we like to trade differently. Regular traders trade with emotion, need sleep, can't keep track of all markets en some lack experience. 

Cryptohopper helps traders by bringing innovation and the experience of professionals to the people. Bots don't need sleep, or copy a pro that's using our sophisticated software to trade.

Want to help building on the future of crypto trading? Visit our career page at careers.cryptohopper.com. 

The world of investing is changing fast. Our mission is to lead this change.

title: Full Stack Engineer
descriptionHtml:
Full Stack Engineer – AI-Powered Multi-Tenant SaaS – up to €90K + Stock Options – Netherlands


Our client is a fast-growing company that is building an AI-powered SaaS platform that helps organizations handle contracts and compliance obligations faster, more professionally, and more efficiently. By combining advanced and agentic AI with the expertise of legal professionals, they automate up to 95 percent of repetitive work. Built on a multi-tenant architecture, the platform is designed for organizations with multiple subsidiaries and uses specialized AI agents to handle most routine work. Lot of modern tech stuff!


You will join as one of the first key members of a new in-house engineering team that will take full ownership of the platform and deliver the future roadmap. You will work directly with the CTO and co-founders alongside a UX Frontend Specialist and an AI Engineer, forming the technical heart of the organization.


Tech stack

Python, Django, Next.js/React, PostgreSQL, Scaleway, Git, and Git Flow CI/CD


The role

As a Full Stack Engineer you will focus mainly on the backend around 70 percent, but also contribute to the frontend around 30 percent. You will help make the system enterprise-ready, build a retrieval-augmented-generation pipeline with the AI Engineer, improve performance and search accuracy, and create collaborative features where multiple users can edit and see each other’s changes in real time. You will also connect the AI agent layer to the data layer, including implementing row-level security for strict access control in a multi-tenant environment.


This is a hands-on role where you work closely with the CTO on architecture, scalability and reliability, acting as a right hand in building the platform’s foundation.


You should have experience with

  • Five or more years of professional software development
  • Strong backend skills in Python, ideally with Django
  • Experience with owning a product
  • DevOps practices and CI/CD in cloud environments
  • Frontend experience with React, Next.js, or similar


Nice to have

  • Experience with SaaS platforms
  • Understanding of architectures connecting AI agents to data layers
  • Experience with security standards


The offer

  • Gross annual salary up to €90K plus stock options
  • Hybrid working with two days per week in the office in the Amsterdam/Flevoland area
  • Initial seven or twelve-month contract with intent to move to permanent


Only candidates based in the Netherlands will be considered. No visa sponsorship!

companySlogan: We do recruitment for technology teams
companyDescription:
We’re not here to impress. We’re here to get it right. 
At Doghouse, we operate like a tech company, fast, clear, and focused on solving your hiring problem. No junior handovers. No sugarcoated updates. Just brutal clarity and results.

We run structured delivery sprints that keep you informed and in control. We take ownership in your recruitment process and when we send someone, it’s because they actually fit. 
Simple as that. 
---------------
Our work spans across two core hiring tracks:

Permanent hires: We help you build high-performing product and engineering teams, from medior to principal to executive level.

Freelance & interim: Need someone now, for a mission-critical project? We find top specialists fast, with a focus on engineering, data, DevOps and InfoSec.


Get in toucht!

title: Web Developer
descriptionHtml:
Canonical is a leading provider of open source software and operating systems to the global enterprise and technology markets. Our platform, Ubuntu, is very widely used in breakthrough enterprise initiatives such as public cloud, data science, AI, engineering innovation, and IoT. Our customers include the world's leading public cloud and silicon providers, and industry leaders in many sectors. The company is a pioneer of global distributed collaboration, with 1200+ colleagues in 75+ countries and very few office-based roles. Teams meet two to four times yearly in person, in interesting locations around the world, to align on strategy and execution.

The company is founder-led, profitable, and growing.

Our mission is great open source

It is our mission to make open source software available to people everywhere. We create world-renowned software, impacting the lives of millions of people every day.

The web team works in a multi-disciplinary environment with visual designers, UX designers and other developers to bring exciting new web projects to life. We help and learn from each other and constantly strive to improve both our work and our processes.

Required skills and experience

  • Demonstrable experience of work on modern web applications
  • A strong understanding of HTML, CSS with SCSS and JavaScript
  • Experience with Javascript components libraries
  • Experience with TypeScript
  • Experience with responsive user interfaces for a wide range of devices and browsers
  • Experience with Git or other version control systems
  • Awareness of SEO best practice
  • Consideration of accessibility in all aspects of your work
  • A strong understanding of web performance in complex user interfaces
  • Ability to interact with UX, designers and server-side developers
  • Curiosity about technology and a thirst to learn
  • Based in EMEA timezones (Europe, the Middle East and Africa)
  • University degree or equivalent education

Useful experience if you have it

  • Familiarity with Linux desktop technologies
  • Server-side languages, such as Python or NodeJS
  • Experience working on a large scale React (with TypeScript) project
  • A history of open source contributions
  • Relevant work experience

Who you are

We want a Web Developer who loves what they do. You are passionate about web standards and keep abreast of new developments in our industry. You always look for opportunities to improve your skills. You like to show off what you're working on and also learn from others. You have strong attention to detail and value the design of a product as much as you value the code. You have strong communication skills and maybe even blog once in a while. You're aware of the latest CSS techniques but also know the limitations that developing for a broad audience can bring - actually, you embrace the challenge.

In this team

  • You'll create high fidelity websites and web apps using the latest incarnations of HTML, CSS (SCSS) and Javascript (React and TypeScript)
  • You'll help maintain existing projects including updating content and adding new pages
  • You'll manage incoming requests for updates and liaise with or delegate to other people as necessary
  • You'll ensure the standard of our output remains high and consistent across our whole product portfolio
  • You'll ensure new pages are published according to specification and in compliance with our web style guide
  • You'll participate in and contribute to our living style guide, Vanilla Framework.
  • Work closely with UX designers and visual designers to implement exemplary user experiences.

What we offer colleagues

We consider geographical location, experience, and performance in shaping compensation worldwide. We revisit compensation annually (and more often for graduates and associates) to ensure we recognize outstanding performance. In addition to base pay, we offer a performance-driven annual bonus or commission. We provide all team members with additional benefits which reflect our values and ideals. We balance our programs to meet local needs and ensure fairness globally.

  • Distributed work environment with twice-yearly team sprints in person
  • Personal learning and development budget of USD 2,000 per year
  • Annual compensation review
  • Recognition rewards
  • Annual holiday leave
  • Maternity and paternity leave
  • Team Member Assistance Program & Wellness Platform
  • Opportunity to travel to new locations to meet colleagues
  • Priority Pass and travel upgrades for long-haul company events

About Canonical

Canonical is a pioneering tech firm at the forefront of the global move to open source. As the company that publishes Ubuntu, one of the most important open-source projects and the platform for AI, IoT, and the cloud, we are changing the world of software. We recruit on a global basis and set a very high standard for people joining the company. We expect excellence; in order to succeed, we need to be the best at what we do. Most colleagues at Canonical have worked from home since our inception in 2004. Working here is a step into the future and will challenge you to think differently, work smarter, learn new skills, and raise your game.

Canonical is an equal opportunity employer

We are proud to foster a workplace free from discrimination. Diversity of experience, perspectives, and background create a better work environment and better products. Whatever your identity, we will give your application fair consideration.

companySlogan: Enterprise open source, secured and delivered by the publisher of Ubuntu.
companyDescription:
We deliver open source to the world faster,  more securely and more cost effectively than any other company.

We're also the publishers of Ubuntu, the world’s most popular enterprise Linux from cloud to edge, together with a passionate global community of 200,000+ contributors. 

Ubuntu means 'humanity to others'​. We chose it because it embodies the generosity at the heart of open source, the new normal for platforms and innovation.

Together with a community of 200,000, we publish an operating system that runs from the tiny connected devices up to the world's biggest mainframes, the platform that everybody uses on the public cloud, and the workstation experience of the world's most productive developers.

Secure and reliable, elegant and intuitive, and open for innovation - this is the future of open source, which is why we're proud to be the developers of the fastest growing Linux in the world despite already being the most widely deployed.

If you're interested in a career at Canonical, we are a remote-first company so please apply to any suitable role as skills are valued more than location, despite some having a preferred geographic preference. 

www.canonical.com

title: Junior PHP Back-End Developer - AFS Energy
descriptionHtml:
Job Description

About the company

AFS Energy is an international-oriented scale-up in the heart of Amsterdam. We deal with opportunities and developments in Renewable Energy every day and are at the forefront of enabling organizations to achieve their sustainability goals.

We are always on a mission to make our ideas, products, and opportunities a great success. Our Energy team is existing of ambitious Brokers, Consultants, Analysts, and dedicated support teams. With more than 1.450 clients worldwide, activity in 50+ countries, and a workforce of more than 175 colleagues with 25+ different nationalities, we continue to focus on growth within the world of Environmental commodities.

At AFS Energy, our values drive how we work and grow together. We are committed to being knowledgeable in our field, collaborative in our approach, entrepreneurial in our mindset, accurate in our execution, and ethical in all our dealings.

About The Role

We are searching for a PHP Back-End Developer who is eager to learn, result-driven, and a critical-thinker ready to grow their skills by diving into complexities. The role is part of a growing team that developed the first easy-to-access trading platform for SMEs compliant to European Emissions Allowances (EUAs). The back-end developer will contribute to building features with user impact, help maintain the codebase, collaborate with various stakeholders, and learn about ensuring the scalability and performance of our systems to support business growth. The ideal candidate has a passion for solving technical challenges, and a collaborative mindset to work closely with product managers, front-end developers, and other stakeholders.

If you thrive in an innovative environment where your contributions directly influence the success of the platform and its users, we encourage you to join our team and help shape the future of sustainable trading solutions.

Job requirements

  • 1-3 working experience as a Back-End Developer.
  • Some experience in developing web applications.
  • A foundational understanding of Object-Oriented Programming concepts – experience with PHP is a plus, but we welcome enthusiastic learners familiar with other OOP languages.
  • Familiarity with or eagerness to learn frameworks such as Symfony.
  • Fluency in English – written & verbal.
  • An aptitude for understanding business logic and the drive to learn how to translate it effectively into working code.
  • Good communication skills and the ability to work collaboratively within a team and with different stakeholders.


Your Skills And Experiences

  • Some working experience or strong foundational knowledge of PHP. Familiarity with Linux is beneficial, along with an understanding of or interest in containers and cloud solutions.
  • Team player, open to collaboration, and ability to work effectively within distributed teams.
  • Ability to take ownership of assigned tasks through to completion and a proactive approach to learning how to solve problems.
  • Familiarity with or willingness to learn agile development practices, including tools like Git.
  • Contributing to the design, building, and maintenance of APIs, services, and systems that support AFS Energy’s internal teams, with guidance from senior developers.


Our tech stack

  • PHP 8.3
  • Symfony
  • API-Platform
  • GraphQL
  • Postgres


Join our team and play an important role in driving the energy transition by contributing to simplifying the complexities of the environmental commodity markets.

Get in touch!

Are you ready for a new challenge at the Amsterdam Stock Exchange? Please send your résumé through the application link. For further questions, feel free to reach out to snihot@afsgroup.nl. Since this is a junior role we expect you to add a link to a portfolio website or github page.

Application process

1st round: Job interview with the Recruitment team

2nd round: Job interview with Development Team

3rd round: Case study and interview with the Operations line.

Note

We handle our recruitment in-house and do not require assistance from external parties. Any unsolicited résumés received from unaffiliated recruitment agencies will be treated as direct applications.

companyDescription:
AFS Energy is a leading intermediary operating in the sustainability and renewable energy market. We value long-term relationships and guide organisations towards climate solutions.

We support our clients in understanding new regulations and compliance requisites. Through proactive cooperation, our advisors offer tailor-made solutions. We help you understand how the environmental commodity markets operate and how to reap the most benefits.

AFS Energy provides you with market access, the latest products and market updates, all within the right regulatory and compliance frameworks.

title: Full Stack Developer
descriptionHtml:
Bij IJsfontein maken we complexe onderwerpen niet alleen begrijpelijk, maar vooral ook uitdagend! We ontwikkelen innovatieve digitale toepassingen zoals serious games, interactieve platforms en apps. Onze oplossingen dagen gebruikers uit, inspireren en activeren. Als ervaren Full Stack Developer ben jij verantwoordelijk voor de ontwikkeling en optimalisatie van onze digitale applicaties – van backend tot frontend.


De functie

Bij IJsfontein zetten developers ideeën om in robuuste, gebruiksvriendelijke systemen en interfaces. Vaak beginnen projecten vanaf nul en groeien ze uit tot enterprise-grade oplossingen. Jij bent verantwoordelijk voor zowel de backend-infrastructuur als de frontend-ervaring en werkt nauw samen met interactieontwerpers, vormgevers en de projectmanager om projecten tot leven te brengen.


  • Je vertaalt inhoudelijke en functionele wensen naar schaalbare, veilige en gebruiksvriendelijke digitale oplossingen.
  • Je ontwikkelt en onderhoudt zowel backend- als frontend-componenten die eenvoudig uit te breiden en te onderhouden zijn.
  • Samen met het team en klanten schat je werkzaamheden in en zorg je voor structuur en kwaliteit.
  • Je geeft technisch advies en denkt mee over architectuur en oplossingsrichtingen.
  • Je werkt nauw samen in een multidisciplinair team met o.a. interactieontwerpers, frontend developers, vormgevers en projectmanagers.


Wie zoeken we?

Wij zijn op zoek naar een ervaren Full Stack Developer met meerdere jaren ervaring in het ontwikkelen van moderne webapplicaties. Je beschikt over een HBO- of WO-werk- en denkniveau en hebt ruime ervaring met PHP (Laravel) én JavaScript-frameworks (bijvoorbeeld Vue.js, React of Angular). Daarnaast heb je kennis van CI/CD-processen en affiniteit met Test Driven Development. Ervaring met verschillende hostingomgevingen, zoals Docker, Kubernetes, Linux en Azure, is een belangrijke pré. Je beheerst zowel de Nederlandse als de Engelse taal.


Wat biedt IJsfontein?

IJsfontein en educatie zijn onlosmakelijk met elkaar verbonden. Spelend leren is bij ons een vanzelfsprekend onderdeel van elk project. Spel en serieuze inhoud zijn niet met elkaar in tegenspraak, maar versterken elkaar. Gaming en interactie veranderen de manier waarop we als maatschappij kijken naar leren en motivatie. Vanuit onze expertise en visie op educatie levert IJsfontein een belangrijke bijdrage aan deze ontwikkeling.


Bij IJsfontein werken betekent dat je bijdraagt aan maatschappelijk relevante projecten. Wij zijn een bureau waar kwaliteit voorop staat. De lijnen zijn kort, de werksfeer is informeel, warm en betrokken.

We bieden een marktconform salaris, leuke collega’s en een inspirerende werkplek.

companySlogan: Playful Solutions, Serious Impact
companyDescription:
IJsfontein makes media interactive with a focus on playful learning. We are convinced that people are naturally curious and intrinsically motivated to develop themselves. In our view, play is one of the most effective ways to encourage this natural behavior.

Our projects have objectives ranging from creating awareness to education and from training to educational entertainment. Think, for instance, of a serious game as a training tool for (medical) staff, interactive exhibits and apps for museums or a cross platform digital method for primary education.

IJsfontein has more than 40 people working for the company, ranging from concept directors to designers and from programmers to marketeers. Our clients are varied, but they share a complexity of content. We translate this into interactive concepts that are accessible for the target group. This approach has resulted in award-winning products we’ve been proud of since 1997.

title: Software Development Engineer IV (Full Stack)
descriptionHtml:
About Us
QuillBot was founded in 2017 with a mission to help students and professionals—especially those learning English—strengthen their writing. Today, we help over 56 million people around the world create great things. Whether you're writing, designing, coding, or collaborating, QuillBot is a place where anyone can create at the speed of thought. Our AI-powered tools help you think clearly, communicate effectively, and create beautifully—across every platform, in any format, at any skill level. If you're passionate about using technology to make the path from inspiration to execution more accessible, intentional, and relevant, come join us.

Role Overview
We’re looking for a Software Development Engineer IV (Full Stack) with strengths in backend systems and frontend architecture. You’ll help shape how we build our writing and editing tool, ensuring it is modular, scalable, extensible, and maintainable as we continue adding features.

On the backend, you’ll design APIs and services that integrate seamlessly into the editor while supporting millions of users. On the frontend, you’ll bring structure and clarity — building modular, performant systems that make the editor easy to extend and maintain. You’ll thrive in environments with ambiguity, where not everything is fully defined yet, and where strong product thinking and design sense help shape the right solution.

Responsibilities

  • Architect and implement modular backend systems and APIs that power the writing and editing experience.
  • Shape the frontend architecture, ensuring it is modular, scalable, and capable of supporting complex editing workflows.
  • Build user-facing features (React, TypeScript, CSS) with a strong emphasis on UX and performance.
  • Ensure excellent developer experience (DX) by writing clean, self-documented, and reusable code.
  • Balance backend flexibility with maintainability, designing systems that empower frontend teams to move quickly.
  • Collaborate closely with product managers, designers, and engineers to shape both technical architecture and product experience.
  • Prototype quickly, iterate often, and bring clarity to evolving product ideas.
  • Mentor teammates and raise the bar on technical and architectural decision-making.

Qualifications

  • 7+ years of professional full-stack production experience.
  • Proven experience designing scalable APIs and modular backend systems.
  • Strong frontend expertise (React, TypeScript, design systems, performance optimization).
  • Experience structuring complex frontend applications (e.g., editors, dashboards, or large-scale products).
  • Strong practices in testing, documentation, and code quality.
  • Excellent communication and collaboration skills in cross-functional teams.

Bonus Points

  • An eye for design and UX — translating product ideas and mocks into polished user experiences.
  • Experience with design systems and component-driven development.
  • Comfort working in ambiguous, evolving product spaces where iteration is the norm.
  • Strong sense of product ownership and ability to think from the user’s perspective.
  • Previous experience in SaaS, AI-powered products, or large-scale platforms.

Benefits & Perks

  • Competitive salary & annual bonus
  • Pension plan through the Zwitserleven Pension Fund
  • A minimum of 33 days paid time off (including 7 public holidays and a day off on your birthday)
  • A yearly personal development budget of €500
  • Free consultations at OpenUp
  • Discount and extra credits on a ClassPass monthly subscription
  • A remote-friendly culture, including working abroad for up to 3 months
  • The flexibility to work from home, including a monthly working from home allowance of €60 per month
  • Parenthood: minimum of 6 weeks fully paid partner leave & 16 weeks fully paid maternity leave
  • Travel allowance: (NS business card or kilometre allowance of €0.23/km)
  • Healthy lunch and snacks at the office
  • Employee referral program
  • Premium access to QuillBot & LanguageTooler

*Benefits and benefit amounts differ by region. A comprehensive list applicable to your region will be provided in your interview process. 

Research shows that candidates from underrepresented backgrounds often don't apply for roles if they don't meet all the criteria. We strongly encourage you to apply if you're interested: we'd love to learn how you can amplify our team with your unique experience!

This role is eligible for hire in Netherlands.

We are a virtual-first company and have employees dispersed throughout the United States, Canada, India, Israel, Germany, and the Netherlands. We have a market-based pay structure that varies by location. The base pay for this position is dependent on multiple factors, including candidate experience and expertise, and may vary from the amounts listed. You may also be eligible to participate in our bonus program and may be offered benefits, and other types of compensation.

#QuillBot


In accordance with Dutch law, the base salary for this role if filled within Netherlands is as follows.  

Netherlands Pay Range: €85.000 EUR - €115.000 EUR

Equal ​Employment Opportunity Statement ​(EEO)
We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity and ​inclusion within our company.  ​We will consider all qualified applicants without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, sex, gender ​identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, age, marital status, ​veteran status, or ​ability status. We will ensure that individuals who are differently abled are provided reasonable accommodation to participate in the job application or interview process, to perform essential job functions, and to receive other benefits and privileges of employment as provided to other applicants or employees. Please contact us to request accommodation.

title: Full Stack Engineer
descriptionHtml:
• Nieuw-Vennep
  • Hybrid

I'm interested

  • Nieuw-Vennep
  • Hybrid

Job Description

Kubota Technology Innovation Europe department

The KTI-EU organization is a newly established department focusing on technology development for digital

solutions and systems in agriculture from both a fundamental and applied research perspective. The

department bridges the gap between market research, collaborations and technology mapping (driven by our

Innovation Center Europe) and product development as done by our R&D centers, like Kubota Research and

Development Europe and Kverneland Group. The KTI department primary focus is on the European market, but

in collaboration with the global organization and other regional offices e.g., KTI-SV (Silicon Valley, USA) to align

and coordinate global initiatives.

In this context and in order to strengthen our team, we are looking to recruit a Full Stack engineer. This role

contributes to the design, implementation and test of a precision agriculture platform and applications using

Microsoft framework and Azure services. This is a critical role for the success of our digital advancements

pushing the boundaries of productivity and sustainability.

Responsibilities

  • Design and implement a cloud-based precision agriculture platform and applications using Microsoft framework and Azure services;
  • Requirement definition: Act as a full stack engineer working with team members and the business organization to develop detailed techno-functional requirements of platform/software needed to accelerate research activities on precision agriculture.
  • Develop platform and applications: Design and implement platform and applications defined in the requirements. This includes front-end components, back-end business logic (including web-APIs) and database design.
  • Documentation: Enhance documentation for system allowing for information sharing across regions (where installed and where upcoming implementations) of all reports available.
  • Test: Review test requirements define test plan and execute testing to ensure the delivery of error- free solutions to the client community.
  • Working with cross-functional teams: You will collaborate with developers, architects, and project managers to ensure that solutions are delivered on time, within budget, and meet business requirements.

Skills & Requirements

  • Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science or related fields (e.g., Engineering, Statistics, Informatics) with at least 4 years of relevant experience.
  • Strong technical skills including experience with the Angular framework, C# in .NET, Entity Framework, and/or understanding JSON API payloads. Experience developing single-page web applications using JavaScript, TypeScript, HTML, and CSS is a plus.
  • Proficient in application deployment, bug fixing, design patterns, software development lifecycle (SDLC), and software quality and process improvement.
  • Skilled in working with databases, capable of writing advanced SQL queries, and contributing to software development standards and best practices.
  • Good knowledge of Azure cloud computing (APIM, AKS, App Services, DevOps) and Azure PaaS environments, along with strong understanding of microservice design and architecture.
  • Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills, with proven ability to work in a diverse, international environment and communicate effectively.
  • Experienced in following organizational change management processes and project execution within Agile methodologies.
  • Fluent in English.

About The Company

Lay the groundwork for tomorrow with Kubota!

Since 1890, Kubota has evolved in a unique way worldwide. With a strong will to solve problems in food, water and the environment, we have leveraged our strength as a manufacturer and a solutions provider. Spanning across 120+ countries and employing more than 50,000 people in Asia, Europe and North America, Kubota generates revenue in excess of $20 billion. From agricultural and industrial machinery, and overall water solutions, to any other living environment solution, our question, and our challenge was always the same: what can we do to meet the demands and enhance our lives for tomorrow?

Explore this exciting career opportunity and join us on the journey as we seek to be an “Essentials Innovator for Supporting Life”.

My job, Our future

Work for the development of societyWork for the development of society by drawing on all of our capabilitiesand know-how to offer superior products and technologies.

Open the way to tomorrowBuild today and open the way to tomorrow, with the aim of bringing prosperity to the company and happiness to employees.

Challenge the unknownChallenge the unknown with creativity and courage.

Eirini Dragoumanou | Contact Person

Mail Send e-mail

I'm interested

From agricultural and industrial machinery, and overall water solutions, to any other living environment solution, our question, and our challenge was always the same: what can we do to meet the demands and enhance our lives for tomorrow?Explore this exciting career opportunity and join us on the journey as we seek to be an “Essentials Innovator for Supporting Life”.My job, Our future Work for the development of societyWork for the development of society by drawing on all of our capabilitiesand know-how to offer superior products and technologies.Open the way to tomorrowBuild today and open the way to tomorrow, with the aim of bringing prosperity to the company and happiness to employees.Challenge the unknownChallenge the unknown with creativity and courage.Eirini Dragoumanou | Contact Person Mail  Send e-mailI'm interestedGraphic rendering with WebGL2 has been disabled or is not supported by your graphic card. The map cannot be displayed.+−Kubota Holdings EuropeNieuw-Vennep | HybridVisit website
companyDescription:
Kubota had the first establishment in Europe more than 40 years ago and has shown a significant growth since. In the European region Kubota currently has more than 4,400 employees and achieves sales over € 2.2 billion. 
The European business organization is organized in five Business Units (Tractor, Construction Machinery, Engine, Implements and Parts) and counts 12 manufacturing facilities and 25  distribution, service and sales offices covering the whole European region offering products including tractors, construction machinery, engines, agricultural machinery, turf equipment and utility vehicles. 
To embody Kubota’s European ambitions, Kubota Holdings Europe B.V. was established in 2017 as the Regional Headquarters of Kubota in Europe. The main goal is to support the European activities in driving lean and efficient processes aimed at creating customer value. 
Subsidiaries in Europe are:
-	Kubota Baumaschinen GmbH
-	Kubota Deutschland GmbH
-	Kubota España, S.A
-	Kubota Europe S.A.S
-	Kubota Farm Machinery Europe S.A.S
-	Kubota Turkey Makine Ticaret Limited Şirketi
-	Kubota UK Limited
-	Kverneland Group (10 manufacturing facilities and 17 sales companies)
For more information on Kubota in Europe please visit www.kubota-eu.com

Kubota Corporation
The mother company Kubota Corporation has been a leading manufacturer of agricultural, turf, hay and construction equipment since 1890. With world Headquarters in Osaka Japan, approximately 40,000 employees and offices in more than 110 countries throughout North America, Europe and Asia, Kubota achieved revenues last year over $16 billion. Although, agricultural equipment is Kubota’s primary line of products, Kubota also produces a diverse line of other products including city wide water filtration systems, irrigation, piping, roofing, housing and large underground valves. For more information on Kubota worldwide, please visit www.kubota-global.net

title: Front end Developer
descriptionHtml:
Functieomschrijving

Development vanuit een breder perspectief

Hoe gaaf is het om oplossingen te bouwen die direct effect hebben op het financiële leven van jou, je buurman, je broer, je neef, je ouders, you name it. Bij Yellowtail sta jij aan de basis hiervan. We bouwen aan oplossingen voor pensioenen, hypotheken, leningen maar ook voor de overheid. Grote klanten zoals Aegon en ABN Amro maken inmiddels gebruiken van onze software. Omdat we software bouwen voor financiële instellingen zijn we ISO en SOC gecertificeerd.

Als Senior Front-end Developer ben jij hierin een belangrijke schakel! Jij zorgt er tenslotte voor dat onze software-oplossing voor elke klant specifiek en gebruiksklaar wordt gemaakt. Geen standaardoplossingen maar maatwerk voor elke klant. Dat is waar wij goed in zijn! Naast het bouwen van software houd je je ook bezig met het reviewen van code, het verbeteren van het development proces en het onderzoeken van nieuwe technieken met bijbehorende implicaties.

Ons streven is om jouw werk zo leuk en uitdagend mogelijk te houden.

Waarom is Senior Frond-End Developer jouw nieuwe job?

Jij krijgt energie van het bouwen van software, daarom doe je dit al enkele jaren. Daarin heb je je al op diverse vlakken ontwikkeld. Zo is het opzetten van een applicatie vanaf scratch voor jou no problem, draai je je hand niet om voor het schrijven van specificaties en is TypeScript vertrouwde programmeertaal voor jou.

Je weet dat je als developer nooit klaar bent met leren. Voor jou is je baan pas echt een leuke job als je je steeds verder kunt ontwikkelen en nieuwe technieken kunt leren. Bij het bepalen wie welk project oppakt, weet jij precies waarin jij het beste tot je recht komt. Daar ga je dan ook voor want je weet, pas dan kun je groeien!

Maar niet alleen je eigen groei is belangrijk. Je zet je ook graag in voor de groei van het team en helpt de junior collega’s bij hun ontwikkeling tot ervaren developers.

Stack

Als Front-end Developer Hoef Je Uiteraard Nog Geen Ervaring Te Hebben Met Álle Technieken Die Wij Bij Yellowtail Gebruiken. Het Is Wel Goed Om Te Weten Waarin Je Je Nog Kunt Ontwikkelen. De Stack Waarmee We Werken Is

  • Angular/React/React Native/VueJS
  • Cypress
  • C#, .NET Core
  • MongoDB
  • Docker
  • Azure Devops (infra as code)
  • Kubernetes

Wie zijn jouw collega’s?

Jouw collega’s vormen een divers en internationaal team dat uit Back-end/Front-End Developers bestaat. Je hebt niet alleen collega’s in Nederland maar ook in Zuid-Afrika en India. Je spreekt en schrijft dan ook vloeiend Engels.

Vereisten

Wat wij belangrijk vinden

Als Senior Front-End Developer Spreek En Schrijf Je Goed Nederlands En Kun Je Jezelf Verstaanbaar Maken In Engels. Daarnaast Neem Je Wat Ons Betreft Vooral Ervaring Mee. Ervaring Met

  • Development, 5 jaar of meer
  • Minimaal 1 van onze front-end frameworks
  • REST API-integratie
  • End to end testing
  • Build pipelines
  • Git & Git flow

What’s in it for you?

Bij Ons Ben Je Verzekerd Van Een Werkomgeving Waarin Alle Basiszaken Perfect Geregeld Zijn. Denk Aan De Lekkerste Lunches Die Worden Verzorgd, De Nieuwste MacBook En Telefoon Die Voor Je Klaarligt, Een Prima Pensioenregeling En Een Soepele Salaris- En Kostenafhandeling. Maar Dat Is Nog Lang Niet Alles! Wat Ons Écht Onderscheidt Is Onze Manier Van Werken

  • Je mag volledig jezelf zijn en hoeft niet te voldoen aan een bepaald imago of stereotype. We zien je graag zoals je bent;
  • Je krijgt alle ruimte en kansen geboden om te groeien en te leren. Samen gaan we op zoek naar jouw talenten en ontwikkelen deze verder;
  • Een mobiliteitsvergoeding van €800, kan je ook als salaris uit laten betalen;
  • Je mag fouten maken want daar leer je van. We helpen op te staan en te groeien;
  • Je hebt de ontwikkeling van je salaris grotendeels zelf in de hand. De salarisrange van deze functie is tussen de €3.900 en € 5.300 bruto per maand (afhankelijk van jouw kennis en ervaring) en jij hebt invloed op de groei hiervan;
  • Je bepaalt grotendeels zelf waar en wanneer je werkt. Wij geloven in een goede werk-privé balans dus helpen we je om je thuiswerkplek goed en verantwoord in te richten. Maar we gaan verder: je kunt bij ons zelfs vanaf je favoriete vakantiebestemming remote werken;
  • Je kunt veel leuke activiteiten ondernemen met collega’s. Zo hebben we 2x per jaar een trip met het bedrijf, elke maand een Cultural FriYay en regelmatig andere (sportieve, interessante, leerzame) evenementen;
  • En wil je op kantoor even een pauze nemen, kun je altijd je collega uitdagen voor een potje dart, tafelvoetbal of tafeltennis!

companySlogan: Wij creëren datagedreven oplossingen die ertoe doen
companyDescription:
De consument van nu bepaalt. Hij wil zijn financiële zaken zelf gemakkelijk en goedkoop online kunnen regelen. Yellowtail helpt financials met consultancy services en fintech oplossingen in te spelen op veranderend consumentengedrag. We lopen voorop in de markt, zijn ambitieus en groeien snel. Daar zijn we trots op. Net als op ons team van professionals; een gebalanceerde mix van skills en kennis op het gebied van business, IT consultancy en UX design. Professionals die stuk voor stuk ondernemend, benaderbaar en slim zijn.

Yellowtail is onderdeel van Conclusion (www.conclusion.nl)

title: Full Stack Software Engineer (Mid / Senior Level)
descriptionHtml:
At Cutr we're looking for a Full-Stack Software Engineer to join our product team.

About The Job

As a Full-Stack Software Engineer at Cutr, you’ll help reinvent how designers and wood manufacturers collaborate—building tools that make manufacturing easier, faster, and more sustainable. You'll be involved in the entire product development lifecycle including the design, development, deployment and maintenance of new and existing features. You'll write clean and functional code on the front and back-end. You'll collaborate closely with our development & product teams to ensure system consistency and to create a great user experience. You'll write reusable and maintainable code. You'll also perform UI tests to optimize performance. Ultimately, your work will have direct impact on the stability and user experience of our products.

Our Tech Stack At a High Level

  • Frontend: Vue.js and React.js
  • Backend: Node.js (Express), PostgreSQL
  • Infrastructure: GCP, Kubernetes

This role is Amsterdam or remote in locations that are near/compatible with Central European Timezone.

This role is full-time (5 days/week), and we’re not able to offer part-time arrangements

About You

  • You have ~5+ years of full-time software engineering experience (or equivalent proven expertise).
  • You leverage AI tools daily to accelerate your workflow, from prototyping to production. You know how to get high-quality code shipped fast with AI.
  • You are comfortable with front-end and back-end languages. You have worked with Javascript, databases, web servers, and designers
  • You have experience with testing and debugging
  • You're analytical and good at time management
  • You have great communication and problem-solving skills
  • You are ambitious. You want to quickly grow your career at an early stage venture-backed startup and make a big impact on the business, and if you’ve been a founder or early team member before, even better.

Compensation And Benefits

  • Competitive equity package
  • Tools and resources you need to do your best work
  • Generous PTO policy
  • Team off-sites around every 6 months

Note: some benefits depend on local employment practices and law

About Us

Cutr is the platform for designers to get things made. We are a team of engineers, woodworkers and designers with the shared objective of making wood manufacturing easier, faster and cheaper for everyone involved. We care about moving the world to a zero-carbon future, and believe a 10x better wood manufacturing industry is the key to achieving it. We're backed by the best and we'd LOVE to meet you.

Our Process

  • Initial chat with hiring manager - We'll chat about the role and goals (yours and ours).
  • Code exercise - You'll work through a coding exercise with a couple members of the engineering team
  • "On-site" (often remote) - You will meet more members of the team, with rounds including product/design, operations, and engineering.
  • Offer! 🎉

We Care About

Customer Obsession - Everything we do should revolve around our customers. We can have great ideas as experienced product builders, but those ideas should come from a high degree of understanding of the problems our customers are experiencing.

Diversity - We believe that as a team our ability to solve problems is greater when we’re looking at the problems from different perspectives. This means we’re actively working to build a team of diverse backgrounds and experiences and building an inclusive environment that empowers individuality, empathy, and innovation.

Maturity - We want to work with people who can approach teamwork with empathy and humility. We’re all working hard to solve difficult problems, and along the way we might disagree about how to do that. How we positively resolve these conflicts matters and makes us a better team.

Apply for the job

Do you want to join our team as our new Full Stack Software Engineer? Then we'd love to hear from you!

Order your wooden parts online in minutes.

Cutr is a community of woodworkers, engineers and designers. We get your project made. Upload a file, get a free quote, accept it and we’ll get to work!

title: Front-end Developer Mobile Team
descriptionHtml:
Are you the person who leverages new technologies in front-end development to deliver the best possible user experience for all our customers? If so, keep reading!

What will you do as a Front-end Developer?

In this role, you’ll be responsible for rebuilding and maintaining the web self-service environment of our Mobile Product, where customers can easily manage their accounts. This will be a full rebuild as we move the platform to React, giving you the opportunity to shape the architecture and front-end approach from the ground up.

You’ll be the dedicated front-end developer in the team, working closely with backend developers, QA, and product colleagues to ensure a seamless customer experience. With this setup, you’ll have a lot of ownership and influence over the front-end direction and delivery.

At Budget Thuis, most applications are developed in-house using Agile methodologies like Scrum and Kanban. We give our teams the freedom to take ownership of the applications they build and encourage the use of modern tools and frameworks.

The Mobile Team

Our Mobile Product team consists of an architect, product manager, engineering manager, backend developers, an iOS developer, an Android developer, and both QA and AQA specialists. Together, they are responsible for the mobile experience and customer portals, where our customers can easily manage everything themselves. Because our teams are end-to-end, there’s also room to broaden your skills—for example, if you’re interested in backend development, you’ll have the space and support to grow in that direction.

What do you bring?

Role

Besides a strong drive to keep learning and improving yourself (and the organization), we believe you’ll be successful in this role if you have:

  • A completed education in Computer Science;
  • At least 3 years of experience with React development;
  • Experience with Figma;
  • Extensive experience with React, HTML(5), JavaScript (ES5 & ES6), TailwindCSS, and NextJS;
  • A solid background in building responsive interfaces;
  • Strong communication skills;
  • A love for technology, innovation, and new developments;
  • A collaborative and positive mindset, while also confident enough to share your opinions;
  • Experience with DDD and UX/web design (nice-to-have);
  • Knowledge of PHP and Symfony (not required, but a plus);

At Budget Thuis, we believe it’s important that you can be 100% yourself. In our organization, we welcome different perspectives and personalities—we are curious and appreciative of one another. For this position, we are preferably looking for someone who enriches our team in every way: someone who, through their background and personal qualities, is a strong addition to Budget Thuis.

Why Budget Thuis?

  • A gross salary between €4.000 and €5.500 (based on 40 hours, depending on experience);
  • A 13th month;
  • Budget Summer Free: paid Friday afternoons off in July & August;
  • 25 vacation days (based on 40 hours) + option to buy 1.5 weeks extra;
  • A solid pension scheme (11% employer / 5% employee);
  • Sustainable travel allowance (Swapfiets or NS Business Card);
  • Focus on vitality: free weekly boot camps and participation in sports events (Dam tot Damloop, Mudmasters, company soccer, etc.);
  • Fun extras for your 1, 3, and 5-year anniversaries (dinners, weekends away, sabbatical opportunities);
  • Hybrid working (50/50 office & home), plus the option to work one month per year fully remote;
  • Fresh hot lunch daily from our chef for only €2,50 net per day;
  • A scale-up mentality where bold ideas and entrepreneurship are valued;
  • An office in the heart of Amsterdam with regular drinks and company parties;
  • Free Budget internet & mobile, plus great deals on Budget energy.

Want to know more about us?

  • Full employment benefits
  • About Budget Thuis

⚠️ Relocation is not possible

Questions & Contact

Are you excited about this vacancy? Then send us your CV and motivation via the button below! Do you have any questions about this role? Please contact Liesbeth van Brakel at: liesbeth.vanbrakel@budgetthuis.nl.

jobPosterTitle: Corporate Recruiter bij Budget Thuis | Energie ⚡| Telecom 📱
companySlogan: Hoi! Wij zijn Budget Thuis. Aanbieder van Budget Energie, Budget Mobiel en Budget Internet.
companyDescription:
Ongeveer 850.000 mensen krijgen stroom en gas van Budget Energie. En we hebben de smaak te pakken! Nóg meer saaie producten leveren, daar worden we heel blij van... Producten die je als huishouden móet hebben. Maar waar je het liefst zo min mogelijk tijd aan besteedt. En zo min mogelijk voor betaalt natuurlijk! 

Daarom bieden we naast Budget Energie sinds kort ook Budget Alles-in-1 (Internet, TV en Bellen via het KPN-netwerk). Om het nog makkelijker te maken, hebben we daar nu ook Budget Mobiel aan toegevoegd. Maandelijks opzegbare Sim Only abonnementen (ook via het betrouwbare netwerk van KPN). Dus al je energie- en telecomdiensten onder één dak. En dat onder een nieuwe naam, Budget Thuis. 

Bij Budget Thuis bieden we diensten voor in en om je huis die je móet hebben. Maar waar je eigenlijk geen omkijken naar wilt hebben. Gas en stroom moeten er gewoon zijn. Internet en tv moeten gewoon werken en je wilt natuurlijk altijd bereikbaar zijn. Het liefst tegen een zo laag mogelijke prijs. En zonder gedoe. Dat is Budget Thuis.

title: Fullstack Software Engineer - Business Solutions
descriptionHtml:
Dataiku is The Universal AI Platform™, giving organizations control over their AI talent, processes, and technologies to unleash the creation of analytics, models, and agents. Providing no-, low-, and full-code capabilities, Dataiku meets teams where they are today, allowing them to begin building with AI using their existing skills and knowledge.

Why Engineering at Dataiku?

Dataiku’s on-premise, cloud, or SaaS-deployed platform connects many data science technologies, and our technology stack reflects our commitment to quality and innovation. We integrate the best of data and AI tech, selecting tools that truly enhance our product. From the latest LLMs to our dedication to open source communities, you'll work with a dynamic range of technologies and contribute to the collective knowledge of global tech innovators. You can find out even more about working in Engineering at Dataiku by taking a look here.

In Business Solutions, we are building apps that leverage Dataiku’s capabilities in data and AI, focused on key enterprise use cases that need their own, user-focused UI’s and flows. We do this for customers in verticals such as Manufacturing, Life Sciences and Finance, powering key processes within their business- and operating models. In short: our work truly is part of “everyday AI”!

How You’ll Make An Impact

  • Build Innovative AI-Driven Applications: Design, develop, and deploy AI-powered applications that solve complex business problems, integrating Dataiku’s backend AI capabilities with user-centric, intuitive front-end interfaces.
  • Work with Data Scientists and Industry Specialists: Collaborate with solutions engineers, data scientists, and industry experts to develop the best solutions for customers. Help define requirements and deliver state-of-the-art applications that meet user needs across different verticals such as finance, manufacturing, and life sciences.
  • Empower Business Users: Create applications that allow expert users to work with large datasets and extract meaningful insights quickly and intuitively. Your goal is to bring complex data to life in the browser and simplify interactions with large-scale data sets.
  • Drive Continuous Improvement: Take responsibility for the end-to-end lifecycle of applications—from PoC to production. Contribute to the maintenance and evolution of the tech stack and frameworks, and support new features and architecture improvements to ensure scalability and reliability.
  • Collaborate Across Teams: Work closely with core teams to ensure high-quality, reusable components, provide best practices, and help make data scientists and business users autonomous in building solutions end-to-end.
  • Contribute to Team Growth: Help mentor new team members, participate in interviews, and contribute to onboarding processes. Bring your expertise and enthusiasm to help grow a collaborative, inclusive, and innovative team culture.

What You’ll Need To Be Successful

  • Full-Stack Development Experience: You have experience in full-stack software engineering, with experience taking an app from PoC to production. You are comfortable working across the stack—from the front-end user interface to the back-end infrastructure.
  • Front-End Skills: Proficiency in modern reactive front-end frameworks like Vue.js (preferred), React, or Angular. You have a deep understanding of building user-centric, interactive web applications.
  • Back-End Skills: Strong experience with backend development, especially with Python (FastAPI, Flask, etc.). You are familiar with RESTful API design and willing to adapt to Dataiku’s tech stack and best practices.
  • Experience with Data-Intensive Applications: You understand the challenges of working with large datasets and designing high-performance, data-driven applications. Experience with analytics products or data platforms is a strong plus.
  • Customer-Oriented Mindset: You have a strong focus on solving real-world problems for customers. You understand that building an effective product means diving deep into customer use cases, iterating based on feedback, and delivering the most relevant and efficient solutions.
  • Curiosity: You are excited to learn, adapt, and take on new challenges. Whether it's discussing architecture, troubleshooting issues, or writing code, you are driven to make an impact and contribute to the team’s success.
  • Tech Enthusiast: You’re genuinely passionate about AI and data-driven applications. You’re excited by the possibility of using cutting-edge AI technologies, like LLMs, to shape the future of business.

What does the hiring process look like?

  • 45 min call with a Technical Recruiter
  • Technical video interview with an Engineering Team Lead
  • Take home assignment or Live Coding session
  • 2 last interviews with VPs of Engineering

What are you waiting for!

At Dataiku, you'll be part of a journey to shape the ever-evolving world of AI. We're not just building a product; we're crafting the future of AI. If you're ready to make a significant impact in a company that values innovation, collaboration, and your personal growth, we can't wait to welcome you to Dataiku! And if you’d like to learn even more about working here, you can visit our Dataiku LinkedIn page.

Our practices are rooted in the idea that everyone should be treated with dignity, decency and fairness. Dataiku also believes that a diverse identity is a source of strength and allows us to optimize across the many dimensions that are needed for our success. Therefore, we are proud to be an equal opportunity employer. All employment practices are based on business needs, without regard to race, ethnicity, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, religion, age, neurodiversity, disability status, citizenship, veteran status or any other aspect which makes an individual unique or protected by laws and regulations in the locations where we operate. This applies to all policies and procedures related to recruitment and hiring, compensation, benefits, performance, promotion and termination and all other conditions and terms of employment. If you need assistance or an accommodation, please contact us at: reasonable-accommodations@dataiku.com

Protect yourself from fraudulent recruitment activity

Dataiku will never ask you for payment of any type during the interview or hiring process. Other than our video-conference application, Zoom, we will also never ask you to make purchases or download third-party applications during the process. If you experience something out of the ordinary or suspect fraudulent activity, please review our page on identifying and reporting fraudulent activity here.

companySlogan: The Universal AI Platform™
companyDescription:
Dataiku is The Universal AI Platform™, giving organizations control over their AI talent, processes, and technologies to unleash the creation of analytics, models, and agents. Aggressively agnostic, it integrates with all clouds, data platforms, AI services, and legacy systems to ensure full technology optionality — empowering customers to future-proof their AI initiatives. 

Providing no-, low-, and full-code capabilities, Dataiku meets teams where they are today, allowing them to build with AI using their existing skills and knowledge. Designed for the most demanding enterprise environments, Dataiku builds governance into every part of the platform, ensuring regulatory compliance and complete business alignment.

More than 700 companies worldwide use Dataiku, including leaders across industries including life sciences, logistics, retail, manufacturing, energy, financial services, software, and technology. With a strong focus on the Forbes Global 2000, Dataiku also supports non-profits and academic institutions through its AI-for-Good initiatives.

title: Front End Software Engineer Internship
descriptionHtml:
What To Expect
Start Date: ASAP

Location: Amsterdam

Duration: 6 months

Fulltime position (40 hours a week)

NOTE: YOU MUST BE ENROLLED IN EDUCATION DURING THE ENTIRE INTERNSHIP TO BE CONSIDERED.

Within Tesla Vehicle Software organization, the Service Engineering team serves as a link between service, manufacturing, and development teams worldwide for all vehicle sub-systems. We develop vehicle software and diagnostic tools to ensure that customer vehicles are diagnosed and repaired accurately, reliably, and as efficiently as possible.

We are looking for a highly motivated front-end software intern with solid full-stack coding skills to create engaging and intuitive diagnostic interfaces on the vehicle’s touchscreen. The tool you’ll be responsible for is used in diagnostics for customer vehicles and plays a major role in the Service automation of Tesla Robotaxis.

Please highlight and detail related personal projects in your CV.

Project example: https://service.tesla.com/service-mode

Through internships with Tesla Vehicle Software, university students have the opportunity to learn and grow their professional skillset while working on complex real-world engineering problems. This hands-on experience, which includes software development, integration, testing, and deployment provides a valuable introduction to the industry and Tesla’s dynamic work environment, complementing university learnings with practical experience, under the guidance of an assigned mentor.

What You'll Do

  • Rapid prototyping / mockup of in-vehicle service experiences
  • Design, code and debug User Interfaces and APIs
  • Develop end-to-end tests
  • Collaborate with a cross-functional teams of hardware and software engineers


    • What You'll Bring

  • Currently enrolled in programs related to Engineering / Computer Science
  • Experienced with JavaScript/TypeScript (React)
  • Knowledge of Linux/Unix systems
  • Thrives in fast-paced environments with a proactive approach
  • Level C1 in English (spoken and written)
  • Some experience with Rust is a plus
  • Previous experience with Figma, Svelte is a plus


    • , Tesla

industries: Motor Vehicle Manufacturing, Renewable Energy Semiconductor Manufacturing, and Utilities
companySlogan: Tesla’s mission is to accelerate the world’s transition to sustainable energy.
companyDescription:
Tesla is accelerating the world’s transition to sustainable abundance. To achieve our mission, we're building a world powered by solar, enabled by battery storage and transported by electric vehicles.
 
We’re committed to hiring and developing top talent from around the world for any given discipline. Headquartered in Texas, we operate six huge, vertically integrated factories across three continents. With over 100,000 employees, our teams take a first-principles approach to designing, building, selling and servicing our products in-house.
 
Our world-class teams operate with a non-conventional philosophy of inter-disciplinary collaboration. Each member of the team is expected to challenge and to be challenged, to create, and to innovate. We’re tackling the world’s most difficult and important problems—and we wouldn’t succeed without our shared passion for making the world a better place.

title: Fullstack Developer
descriptionHtml:
Fullstack Developer
We’re a fast-growing startup on a mission to become the DocuSign for Visuals. In under a year, we’ve captured early customers worldwide, forged key partnerships, and defined a bold vision for online trust. Now we’re expanding our product team and laying the technical groundwork for what comes next—starting with you.

About Verify
We are a fast-growing international startup with the ambition to become the DocuSign for visuals. In less than a year, we’ve successfully entered our first vertical markets and brought on board our initial customers. Now, we’re ready to scale! Building a strong, content-driven marketing engine is a key part of that journey.

About the role
You’ll be part of our small but ambitious engineering team, working directly with our CTO and a full-stack developer. This is not just about writing code, it’s about shaping the product from the ground up. From architecture decisions to building new features end-to-end, you’ll play a central role in how our platform evolves.

What you'll do
On the front end, you’ll create elegant, responsive Angular interfaces that deliver a seamless user experience. On the back end, you’ll design and scale Node.js/TypeScript services on Google Cloud, tying it all together with Firebase. You’ll also be hands-on with key new initiatives like building our Consent Manager, developing dashboards for marketing analytics, and designing AI-driven features that bring our vision to life. If you thrive in a fast-paced environment, enjoy working across the stack, and want your work to have immediate impact, this role is for you.

Requirements
  • Front-end: Develop interactive, responsive UIs in Angular; translate designs into high-quality code.
  • Back-end: Build and maintain serverless services and APIs in Node.js/TypeScript on GCP.
  • Firebase: Leverage Firestore, Authentication, Cloud Functions, and Realtime features for data and user management.
  • Integrate Google Cloud AI & Image services to power image analysis and verification features.
  • DevOps: Set up CI/CD (Cloud Build), testing pipelines, infrastructure as code, and monitoring/alerting in Google Cloud.
  • Collaboration: Work closely with AI engineers, UX designers, and product to deliver end-to-end solutions.
  • Quality: Write clean, well-tested code; conduct peer reviews; enforce security best practices.
  • Planning: Translate product requirements into detailed technical tasks and estimates.

Job Specific Requirements
  • 3+ years in a full-stack or combined front-end/back-end role.
  • Proficient in JavaScript/TypeScript, with hands-on experience in Angular and Node.js.
  • Solid experience with Firebase (Firestore, Auth, Cloud Functions).
  • Familiarity with RESTful and/or GraphQL API design.
  • Understanding of performance optimization, scalability, and security in a cloud environment.
  • Comfortable in a fast-paced, low-structure startup setting.
  • Strong communication skills and a team-oriented approach.

Nice to Have
  • Experience writing and deploying Google Cloud Functions.
  • Experience leveraging Elasticsearch for advanced search functionality.
  • Infrastructure automation with Terraform or Deployment Manager.
  • Working knowledge of Go (Golang) for microservices.
  • Interest in AI-driven features.

What We Offer
We’re offering the opportunity to join an experienced founding team at a defining moment in our journey. You’ll play a key role in shaping our product, tech stack, and company culture — not just writing code, but building something that lasts. Expect a competitive salary, meaningful equity, and the chance to help define a category.

Apply for the Job
Do you want to join our team? We'd love to hear from you! Get in touch with our recruiter, Randi via +316 21 93 42 51 or apply using the application form on the website!

companySlogan: Making the digital world a place you can trust
companyDescription:
Welcome to Verify, where we’re revolutionizing trust in digital content. Our mission: to establish a world where authenticity reigns. With innovative AI, we embed imperceptible watermarks in digital assets, ensuring their veracity. 

Our core values of big thinking, ownership, integrity, and innovation drive us towards a future where every digital interaction is genuine, combating fake news and protecting intellectual rights. Trust in content, redefined.

Through our fingerprint technology we are able to provide a unique fingerprint for each asset. The fingerprint allows us to identify, track and trace assets over the internet. Ultimately our technology enables customers to protect their Intellectual properties and help them to better understand and measure the success of their brand on the internet.

With our servers in the US and Europe we are compliant in multiple regions and have global coverage.

title: Senior PHP Developer
descriptionHtml:
About us:

Planner 5D is a global hub for home design, uniting over 100+ million users in 230 territories around our planet (yes, we have 2 users connecting from Antarctica each month!). Our platform simplifies the home renovation process from concept to execution, and this process has never been more straightforward with our cutting-edge software. You don't need to be a professional designer to enhance your home or workspace. We are dedicated to streamlining the design experience, making the customization of dream homes accessible to everyone.

Our cross-platform presence spans Web, iOS, Android, Windows, and MacOS, ensuring seamless synchronization for our users. Planner 5D is more than just software; it's a vibrant community of enthusiastic and product-oriented professionals. From diverse backgrounds, our team collaborates across time zones, fueled by a shared passion to revolutionize the home design market.

We are constantly looking for like-minded talent eager to take ownership and drive innovation within our expanding suite of tools. Join us in shaping the future of home design.

We are seeking a skilled PHP Developer to join our dynamic team. Beyond the foundational skills in PHP development, we are looking for individuals who have a strong understanding of software design principles. The ideal candidate should be able to apply these principles effectively to develop robust, scalable, and maintainable software solutions.

Responsibilities:

  • Develop, test, and maintain high-quality PHP applications;
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define, design, and ship new features;
  • Write clean, modular, and reusable code;
  • Follow best practices - SOLID, STUPID, design patterns, writing tests, writing self-documenting or well documented code, etc.;
  • Optimize application performance and scalability;
  • Troubleshoot and debug applications to resolve performance and other issues;
  • Stay updated with emerging technologies and industry trends


Requirements:

  • Proficiency in PHP 8+ programming language;
  • Familiarity with Domain-Driven Design principles and practices;
  • Experience with PHP frameworks such as Laravel, Symfony, etc.;
  • Experience in writing unit tests using testing frameworks such as PHPUnit;
  • Extensive experience Implementing new (and refactoring)
  • Knowledge of relational databases (e.g., MySQL, PostgreSQL);
  • Understanding of front-end technologies (HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript);
  • Good understanding of version control systems (e.g. Git);
  • Ability to work independently and in a team environment;
  • Excellent problem-solving and communication skills;
  • Intermediate in English


Additional Skills (Preferred but not required):

  • Experience with TypeScript is preferred but not mandatory. Candidates without TypeScript experience will be supported in developing this skill through company resources;
  • Familiarity with containerization technologies such as Docker;
  • Knowledge of message queuing systems like RabbitMQ or Kafka;
  • Knowledge of NoSQL databases (e.g., MongoDB);
  • Knowledge of modern JavaScript frameworks (e.g., React, Angular, Vue.js);
  • Understanding of security best practices in web development


What we offer:

  • Great work environment that balances freedom and responsibility
  • Our team is made up of friendly and passionate enthusiasts who are eager to help and share their knowledge
  • We believe in work-life balance, so you'll receive around 30+ days of paid holidays per year
  • Company computer equipment by request
  • Education courses for our team members, and we're willing to allocate funds toward your training expenses
  • English classes on our corporate platform
  • Offline company events in Lithuania and online team-building
  • Unlimited free Planner5D subscriptions


Note: We only consider applications from candidates currently based in locations: Lithuania or Netherlands. Visa sponsorship is available if you hold primary residence with work authorization.

companyDescription: Make your home a better place! Planner 5D is a popular home improvement and interior design platform used by 77+ million users worldwide...

title: Senior Frontend Developer
descriptionHtml:
🚀 Exciting Opportunity: Senior Frontend Developer - Fully Remote 🚀


Fully Remote | Salary + Bonus + Equity | Flexible Hours | Unlimited Annual Leave


I'm partnering with an exceptional SaaS company ranked in the top 1–2% globally, and we’re looking for Senior Frontend Engineers with experience in product-led SaaS environments to drive innovation across the organization.


What You’ll Do:

  • Develop and maintain innovative features and tools in various initiatives.
  • Collaborate closely with engineers and designers to solve complex challenges
  • Improve user experience through close collaboration with product/design teams.


What You’ll Bring:

  • 5+ years of hands-on engineering experience with Typescript, React.js and/or Next.js
  • Proven expertise in building features and tools in a product-based environment.
  • Strong focus on writing clean, scalable, and secure code
  • Excellent communication, collaboration, and problem-solving skills


What’s on Offer:

  • Fully remote work with flexible hours
  • Competitive compensation: salary, bonus, and equity
  • Work with a world-class engineering team on challenging, high-impact projects
  • Access to modern tools, training, and resources to fuel your growth
  • Unlimited annual leave so you can recharge when needed
  • Regular team retreats and in-person meetups
  • A leadership role with direct ownership and influence over the future of the platform


If you're a superstar with Typescript, React.js or Next.js experience, please apply
