Met jouw expertise draag je bij aan een robuust en toekomstbestendig platform dat aansluit bij de doelstellingen van de organisatie en de behoeften van de klant.VerantwoordelijkhedenOntwikkelen en onderhouden van moderne front-end applicaties.Actief bijdragen aan alle fases van de software delivery lifecycle.Werken met en uitbreiden van ons cloudplatform op basis van RedHat OpenShift.Samenwerken in een multidisciplinair agile team.Zorgen voor een optimale gebruikerservaring (UX/UI).Bouwen van schaalbare en lokaal toegankelijke (gelokaliseerde) front-ends.Opzetten en onderhouden van geautomatiseerde CI/CD pipelines.KwalificatiesRuime ervaring met React.Ervaring met automatiseren van tests op verschillende niveaus (unit tot E2E met Playwright).Aantoonbare ervaring met UX/UI design.Ervaring met het ontwikkelen van gelokaliseerde front-ends.Begrip van DevOps-principes.Ervaring binnen agile teams en bekend met agile werkwijzen.Ervaring met het opzetten en onderhouden van geautomatiseerde CI-pipelines.Uitstekende beheersing van de Nederlandse taal.Gewenste VaardighedenKennis van Webpack / Vite (pré).Ervaring met Server-Side Rendering (SSR) (pré).Ervaring met het deployen van front-end applicaties op Kubernetes / OpenShift (pré).Beloningspakket en CompensatieSalaris tot €6.500,- per maand excl. vakantiegeld. Aantrekkelijk arbeidsvoorwaardenpakket: 29 vakantiedagen, 8% vakantiegeld, een 13e maand. Flexibel mobiliteitsbudget. Continu leren: toegang tot interne en externe technische trainingen, certificeringstrajecten en een uitgebreide kennisbibliotheek. Duidelijk groeipad: lokale én internationale carrièremogelijkheden met begeleiding van management. Werk-privébalans: een hybride werkvorm met flexibele remote-opties, zodat je kunt werken waar het voor jou het beste uitkomt.
jobPosterTitle: Recruitment Consultant bij Sterksen
industries: IT Services and IT Consulting and IT System Data Services
companyDescription:
Sterksen is al meer dan 20 jaar een innovatieve recruitment partner, marktleider binnen IT-recruitment. Sinds 2021 is Sterksen onderdeel van HeadFirst Group, met kantoren in Breda, Voorburg en Hoofddorp.

Sterksen zoekt en selecteert de meest talentvolle medewerkers in de arbeidsmarkt. We leveren Sourcing Power met een directe en actieve arbeidsmarktbenadering, sterk gericht op kwaliteit en met een human touch. Met als resultaat een hoog slagingspercentage, werkgevers die door kunnen én talent op de juiste plek!

title: Full Stack Webdeveloper, Amsterdam
descriptionHtml:
€Tot €6072,00 per maand bruto fulltime

ip. 006401

Politie

Team Digitale Opsporing (TDO) Amsterdam zoekt een senior full stack ontwikkelaar. Dit team ondersteunt vanuit de specialistische opsporing o.a. de operatie door het ontwikkelen van apps en tools.

Als full stack webontwikkelaar pas je, zelfstandig of in teamverband, bestaande software aan en ontwerp en realiseer je ook nieuwe applicaties.

Je beschikt over een flinke dosis analytische vaardigheden, kunt analyses omzetten in concrete oplossingen en handelt en communiceert tactvol. Feiten kun je helder en gestructureerd vastleggen en presenteren.

Daarbij ben je creatief en in staat om ‘outside-the-box’ te denken. Ook kun je goed hoofd- en bijzaken onderscheiden en breng je informatie uit diverse bronnen met elkaar in verband. Je bent klantgericht, creatief, proactief en op de juiste momenten zeer nauwkeurig.

Resultaatgerichte Opdracht Definitie

  • Ontwikkelen van zowel back-end als front-end systemen voor applicaties;
  • Functionele APIs creëren;
  • Ontwikkelen van een maatwerkapplicatie voor de opsporing, waarbij je verantwoordelijk bent voor de technische architectuur en je actief meewerkt als full stack ontwikkelaar

Contacten

Zowel interne als externe contacten

Opleiding

Eis

  • Je hebt minimaal HBO werk-en denkniveau. Deze opleidingseis zal niet worden meegenomen als beoordelingscriteria, echter dien je het gevraagde niveau aan te kunnen tonen door middel van de werkervaring in het CV van de kandidaat.

Wens

  • Je hebt minimaal een erkend, volwaardig, volledig en afgerond diploma op HBO niveau in de richting van ICT.

Professionele kennis en werkervaring

Eisen

  • Je hebt in de afgelopen 7 jaar minimaal 5 jaar aantoonbare werkervaring als full-stack developer
  • Je hebt minimaal 5 jaar aantoonbare werkervaring met PHP / Laravel framework
  • Je hebt minimaal 3 jaar aantoonbare werkervaring met HTML / CSS / Javascript / Vue.js
  • Je hebt minimaal 2 jaar aantoonbare werkervaring in de onderstaande technologisch stack:
    • SQL (MySQL/PostgreSQL)
    • Ci/CD
    • Docker
    • Git
    • Linux
Wensen

  • Je hebt minimaal 1 jaar aantoonbare werkervaring binnen agile / scrum teams.
  • Je hebt minimaal 1 jaar aantoonbare werkervaring met RabbitMQ.
  • Je hebt aantoonbare werkervaring met ElasticSearch.
  • Je hebt minimaal een erkend, volwaardig, volledig en afgerond diploma op HBO niveau in de richting van ICT.
  • Je hebt aantoonbare werkervaring binnen de politieorganisatie.

Competenties

Initiatief

Signaleert kansen. Handelt ernaar en durft daarbij risico’s te nemen om uiteindelijk een bepaald herkenbaar voordeel voor de organisatie te behalen. Begint liever uit zichzelf dan passief af te wachten.

Inlevingsvermogen

Onderkent de gevoelens en behoeften van anderen en het effect van eigen handelen daarop.

Samenwerken

Heeft oog voor het groepsbelang en draagt actief bij aan het gemeenschappelijke resultaat.

Sociale Vaardigheid

Beweegt zich tactvol en gemakkelijk in contacten met anderen. Is in staat met zijn optreden emoties en de sociale interactie te beïnvloeden.

Mondelinge- En Schriftelijke Uitdrukkingsvaardigheid

Maakt feiten, meningen en ideeën aan anderen in begrijpelijk Nederlandse taal mondeling en schriftelijk duidelijk. Goede kennis van de Engelse taal in woord en geschrift.

Let op: Om je sollicitatie correct te verwerken, verzoeken wij je vriendelijk om de screeningsvragen onder deze vacature te beantwoorden. Dit helpt ons om je profiel snel en zorgvuldig te beoordelen.

Voordelen voor detacheerders (uitzendovereenkomst) om via All About Work te werken

  • Je sollicitatie wordt binnen 24 uur verwerkt en je krijgt een snelle terugkoppeling.
  • All About Work hanteert geen relatie- of concurrentiebeding.
  • Vanaf dag 1 opbouw pensioen via Stipp
  • Keuze loon uitbetaling per week of per vier weken.
  • CAO van de opdrachtgever is van toepassing.

Screeningsvragen:

    • Je hebt minimaal HBO werk-en denkniveau. Deze opleidingseis zal niet worden meegenomen als beoordelingscriteria, echter dien je het gevraagde niveau aan te kunnen tonen door middel van de werkervaring in het CV van de kandidaat.
    • Je hebt minimaal een erkend, volwaardig, volledig en afgerond diploma op HBO niveau in de richting van ICT.
    • Je hebt in de afgelopen 7 jaar minimaal 5 jaar aantoonbare werkervaring als full-stack developer
    • Je hebt minimaal 5 jaar aantoonbare werkervaring met PHP / Laravel framework
    • Je hebt minimaal 3 jaar aantoonbare werkervaring met HTML / CSS / Javascript / Vue.js
    • Je hebt minimaal 2 jaar aantoonbare werkervaring in de onderstaande technologisch stack:
      • SQL (MySQL/PostgreSQL)
      • Ci/CD
      • Docker
      • Git
      • Linux
    • Je hebt minimaal 1 jaar aantoonbare werkervaring binnen agile / scrum teams.
    • Je hebt minimaal 1 jaar aantoonbare werkervaring met RabbitMQ.
    • Je hebt aantoonbare werkervaring met ElasticSearch.
    • Je hebt minimaal een erkend, volwaardig, volledig en afgerond diploma op HBO niveau in de richting van ICT.
    • Je hebt aantoonbare werkervaring binnen de politieorganisatie.
    • Voor deze opdracht is het verplicht om je woonplaats, postcode en geboortedatum door te geven. Staan deze in je CV? Anders hier doorgeven.
    • Bij deze sollicitatie is een motivatiebrief verplicht, graag toevoegen.
    • Heb je de komende maanden vakantie gepland?
    • Wat is je gewenste bruto fulltime maandsalaris voor deze functie?

companySlogan: Your talent and ambition is what brings us together.
companyDescription:
Wij zijn All About Work"
All About Work" is een arbeidsbemiddelingsbureau dat zich richt op het samenbrengen van kandidaten en opdrachtgevers voor (vooral) tijdelijke vacatures, met name binnen overheidsinstanties zoals Gemeenten, Provincies, waterschappen en andere semi-overheidsinstanties. Het doel is om gekwalificeerde kandidaten te identificeren en te plaatsen in interim-posities die overeenkomen met hun vaardigheden en ervaring. 

Daarnaast heeft "All About Work" een gedreven team met Young Professionals die MarCom opdrachten uitvoeren voor klanten.

title: Frontend Developer
descriptionHtml:
Role Overview

As our Medior Frontend Developer, you’ll develop high-performance, low-latency frontend pages across both a legacy PHP system and a modern tech stack using AstroJS, Svelte, and TypeScript. You’ll collaborate closely with backend developers to integrate APIs and deliver seamless user experiences, while also contributing to the design and development of global landing pages. Working alongside marketing teams, you’ll help implement user tracking via Google Ads APIs, and gain hands-on experience with frontend best practices, performance optimization, and CI/CD deployment workflows.


We are Creative Clicks

Creative Clicks is a leading mobile marketing company with a strong and highly converting product portfolio. We have mastered the science of mobile performance-based advertisement and bring outstanding return on investment for our publishing and advertising partners.


We identify opportunities in the field of mobile performance-based marketing, execute them internationally via our unparalleled marketing and distribution network. Thanks to our robust operational and financial back office we are able to scale up quickly and efficiently. Creative Clicks started in 2009 and has now more than 200+ employees of more than 25 different nationalities across its network of companies, which are active in 65+ countries across six continents.


We believe everyone is unique. So, be you! Our success is a result of our Triple E Philosophy. Be the Energetic and Entrepreneurial Expert. Dream big, everything is possible. We give our people autonomy and accountability, without internal politics. And we celebrate our successes together, every day.


What You’ll Bring:

  • 2-4 years of experience in frontend development.
  • Solid understanding of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript fundamentals.
  • Experience with modern frontend frameworks (ideally AstroJS and/or Svelte).
  • Experience with PHP - our legacy framework still needs to be maintained as we phase it out.
  • Familiarity with integrating APIs and working with RESTful or similar architectures.
  • A collaborative mindset and enthusiasm for working in a multicultural, dynamic environment.
  • A drive to continuously learn and improve your technical skills, including CI/CD deployment pipelines and code quality tools.


🌟 Nice to haves:

  • An interest in design principles that improve customer conversion rates.
  • Understanding of CI/CD pipelines with regard to frontend deployments.



We offer

  • A highly dynamic and fast – growing working environment
  • An international company with more than 25 different nationalities
  • Competitive salary and fully paid commuting expenses.
  • 25 days of annual leave (and the opportunity to buy out 10 more) with a healthy work-life balance and a hybrid work set up
  • A place to learn discover and develop yourself
  • Healthy lunch in the office
  • Fun and ambitious young team of colleagues and a recently renovated beautiful office only 2 minutes from Leidseplein in in Amsterdam


This job is open for candidates who are already living in the Netherlands.


🌈 Creative Clicks is proud to be a diverse and equal opportunity employer and as such does not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, national origins, age, sexual orientation, disability or any other characteristic protected by applicable laws. Selection decisions are solely based on job-related factors.

companySlogan: We are the leading full-service marketing platform. Launched in 2009, we count 6 offices, 200+ employees.
companyDescription:
We are the world's leading performance marketing agency, active since 2009, with six offices worldwide and over 200 professionals dedicated to delivering excellence.

We empower brands, publishers, and marketers to attract and engage global customers at scale through our proprietary machine learning technology. Our KPI-driven, mobile marketing solutions include social and search, video, native, and display advertising, supplied at a massive scale via our strong network of 36,000 partners.

At Creative Clicks, data is the fuel that drives our campaigns. Our proprietary machine learning and tracking technology ensures automatic campaign optimization, while our team uncovers insights based on audience, user, and campaign data from the thousands of campaigns we've managed.

We serve 1,000 clients from six offices across three continents, available 24/7. With a strong presence in North America, Western Europe, and China, we offer a range of models, including agency, CPA/CPM/CPI, Cost Plus, and more.

Beyond technology and expertise, our in-house creative studio excels in combining creativity with data. As digitally native performance storytellers, we craft powerful, audience-focused campaigns that cut through the clutter and drive measurable results. Our full-suite creative team rapidly develops highly engaging content and optimizes it in real-time based on campaign performance.

At Creative Clicks, we live by the Triple E philosophy: Energetic, Entrepreneurial, Experts. This philosophy characterizes our teams and guarantees their success. Our energetic people build off each other’s energy, creating a vibrant and dynamic work environment. The entrepreneurial mindset encourages team members to take ownership and aim for the stars, turning dreams into reality no matter how large or small they seem. Finally, we strive to be absolute experts in digital and performance marketing, setting trends rather than following them. 

Our motto: "One team. One dream!"

title: Software Engineer, Full-Stack
descriptionHtml:
Company Description


At Sparqle, we’re building the future of sustainable last mile delivery. Our platform connects e-commerce customers (such as Decathlon, Ricoh) to sustainable last mile carriers in the Netherlands and Belgium, helping cities reduce emissions and making logistics more efficient. We’ve just raised funding again, and we’re scaling quickly. That’s why we are looking for engineers who thrive in a fast-moving startup environment and that want to make meaningful impact.


Our software processes thousands of orders every day and needs to be both robust and flexible. That means building systems that integrate with new carriers, e-commerce platforms, and other third-party software. It also means creating tools to handle exceptions and edge cases — whether that’s supporting e-commerce shops when deliveries go wrong or helping carriers run operations smoothly.


Role Description

As a Full-Stack Engineer, you’ll own features end-to-end: from thinking through customer needs together with the team, to building, testing, and deploying. If you enjoy ownership, iterate fast, and want your work to have a direct impact on sustainability at scale, we’d love to meet you.


What you'll do

  • Build and improve features across our stack (NestJS, React, TypeScript)
  • Design, test, and deploy reliable systems on AWS with Terraform & Kubernetes
  • Collaborate closely with the team (but also, customers and carriers) to ship what matters
  • Work on integrations with carriers, e-commerce platforms, and other partners
  • Build tools to handle operational exceptions and provide great support experiences at scale


Need to haves

  • 3+ years experience building scalable backend systems
  • Familiarity with modern cloud technologies (AWS, Kubernetes, Terraform)
  • Proficiency with TypeScript and React
  • Startup mentality: pragmatic, fast, and hands-on
  • Strong sense of ownership and responsibility for shipped features


Nice to haves

  • Experience in logistics, mobility, or sustainability-focused products
  • Experience working in fast-scaling startups


What you'll get

  • Competitive salary + participate in the Employee Stock Option Program (ESOP)
  • 25 paid days off
  • A modern office in Amsterdam, near the olympic stadium.
  • The possibility to do meaningful and impactful work in a fast-growing startup, defining the future of sustainable logistics in Europe


Where we work

We’re based in Amsterdam and work in a hybrid office culture. We spend most days in the office for collaboration and team energy, and some of us work from home one or two days a week for focus time.


How to apply

If you’re interested, send an email to engineering@sparqle.com with:

  • Your CV
  • A short intro on why you’re excited about Sparqle
  • Share a tough problem you’ve solved. What was the challenge, how did you tackle it, and what was the result? This could be any recent project you’re proud of, inside or outside of work.

companySlogan: Sustainable shipping that strengthens your brand
companyDescription: Sparqle is a sustainable delivery platform connecting retailers and e-commerce brands with eco-friendly shipping options. Cut your logistics emissions, strenghten your brand, and increase conversion with our scalable, sustainable deliveries.

title: Senior Full Stack Engineer
descriptionHtml:
ABOUT FUGA

FUGA provides forward-thinking music distribution, technology, and marketing services to forward-thinking music companies. Working at the heart of the music industry with more than 800 clients, including Riot Games, Hospital Records, Epitaph, and Beggars Group, FUGA is the world's leading full-service B2B music distributor.

FUGA works at the forefront of music distribution technology, connecting its clients with digital service providers like Spotify, Apple Music, and Amazon Music while helping them get the most from their music, whether that's with award-nominated label services, industry-leading revenue accounting, or using FUGA's suite of best-in-class products.

RESPONSIBILITIES

As a Senior Full Stack Engineer for FUGA, you will be responsible for developing, prototyping, and conceptualizing the current and future frontend architecture that powers the FUGA distribution platform.

Your responsibilities will also extend to the improvement of the development process in collaboration with other stakeholders, creating clear user experience journeys, and ensuring that the platform scales according to our growth. You will be working closely with other senior engineers at FUGA whilst shaping the direction of the stack, collaborating on a larger scale re-architecture of the platform.

REQUIREMENTS

TECH

  • Proficiency in JavaScript/TypeScript and frameworks like React (expert level).
  • Solid knowledge of full stack development, with a strong frontend orientation.
  • Understanding of optimizing production builds for performance, scalability, and maintainability
  • Experience with CI/CD pipelines and automation tools (GitHub Actions preferred).
  • Understanding of API development and maintenance, with proven experience in Node.js or/and other backend languages.
  • Some level of experience with Redis, including caching and distributed session management.
  • Strong capability to address complex engineering topics like architecture and observability.
  • Strong foundation in software development principles, including design patterns and testing strategies (unit and integration testing).
  • Excellent communication with designers and product teams to translate business goals into effective technical solutions
  • Interest in music technology or related fields.

SOFT

  • Strategic Thinking: Understanding how technology aligns with business objectives and contributing to the technical strategy of the organisation.
  • Decision Making: Make informed decisions about integrating existing libraries or packages versus building from scratch, focusing on long-term maintainability and efficiency.
  • Mentorship and Coaching: Guiding and mentoring junior and mid-level developers, sharing knowledge and best practices.
  • Influence and Leadership: Leading teams, driving initiatives, and influencing technical decisions across the organisation.
  • Problem Ownership: Taking responsibility for identifying, solving, and preventing complex technical issues.
  • Agile and Process Improvement: Leading agile practices, process improvements, and advocating for the adoption of best practices.
  • Conflict Resolution: Handling disagreements and conflicts within teams or across departments in a constructive and collaborative manner.
  • Presentation Skills: Effectively communicating technical concepts to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
  • Continuous Learning and Innovation: Staying updated with industry trends, exploring new tools and technologies, and encouraging a culture of innovation.
  • Risk Management: Assess and address potential risks related to code changes and refactoring, keeping in mind the company's current QA process.
descriptionText: ABOUT FUGAFUGA provides forward-thinking music distribution, technology, and marketing services to forward-thinking music companies. Working at the heart of the music industry with more than 800 clients, including Riot Games, Hospital Records, Epitaph, and Beggars Group, FUGA is the world's leading full-service B2B music distributor.FUGA works at the forefront of music distribution technology, connecting its clients with digital service providers like Spotify, Apple Music, and Amazon Music while helping them get the most from their music, whether that's with award-nominated label services, industry-leading revenue accounting, or using FUGA's suite of best-in-class products.RESPONSIBILITIESAs a Senior Full Stack Engineer for FUGA, you will be responsible for developing, prototyping, and conceptualizing the current and future frontend architecture that powers the FUGA distribution platform.Your responsibilities will also extend to the improvement of the development process in collaboration with other stakeholders, creating clear user experience journeys, and ensuring that the platform scales according to our growth. title: Senior PHP Developer
descriptionHtml:
Functieomschrijving

Morgan Black is voor een van haar goede klanten per direct op zoek naar een Senior PHP Developer met Symfony en Kubernetes ervaring. Jij zal gaan helpen met de doorontwikkeling en uitrol van enkele applicaties.


Functie eisen

  • Minimaal 5 jaar werkervaring als PHP Developer
  • HBO of WO werk/denkniveau;
  • Specialist in: PHP, Symfony
  • Ervaring met Kubernetes, CI/CD, Redis/Elasticsearch
  • Beheerst de Nederlandse taal zowel in woord als in geschrift.


Bedrijfsprofiel & Cultuur

Onze klant is een internationale organisatie die graag blijft innoveren. Jij zal gaan werken in een multidisciplinair scrum team. Er heerst een open werksfeer waarbij er veel zelfstandigheid word verwacht. Momenteel is er een vaste werkdag op kantoor.


Arbeidsvoorwaarden

  • 32-36 uur in de week
  • Contractduur: 6 maanden (verlenging mogelijk)
  • Marktconform tarief
  • Locatie: Amsterdam
  • Start: januari


Als je geen ZZP / freelancer, maar geïnteresseerd bent in dit tijdelijk project, kan Morgan Black voor een payroll constructie zorgen.


Heb je interesse? Neem dan contact op via e-mail of telefoon. d.macnack@morganblack.nl of 020-7920111


Contact Persoon:

Dario Macnack

title: Full Stack Java Developer
descriptionHtml:
Are you a Full Stack Java Developer looking for an exciting new opportunity? Then this role may be the right one for you!


Skills: Java, Node.js, React, SQL, Spring Boot


For one of their key clients based in Amsterdam, Amoria Bond is currently looking for a Full Stack Java Developer.


As Full Stack Java Developer you will be responsible for:

  • Develop, test, and deploy scalable web applications.
  • Build and maintain RESTful APIs and microservices using Java/Spring Boot or Node.js.
  • Implement responsive front-end interfaces using React.js / Angular.
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality features.
  • Ensure performance, security, and code quality best practices.

What we’re looking for:

  • Strong experience with Java 8+/Spring Boot and/or Node.js.
  • Hands-on with React.js / Angular, HTML, CSS, JavaScript/TypeScript.
  • Good understanding of SQL/NoSQL databases (MySQL, MongoDB, etc.).
  • Familiarity with Git, CI/CD pipelines, and Docker/Kubernetes.
  • Experience working in Agile environments.


Skills: Java, Node.js, React, SQL, Spring Boot


Are you the Full Stack Java Developer we are looking for? Send you CV and contact details to andrew.charles@amoriabond.com and I will contact you as soon as I can!

We will endeavour to respond to your application ASAP. However, there may be times when it is not possible to reply to all applications, due to high volumes of enquiries. This is sometimes the case for unsuccessful applications to one of our vacancies. We apologise for this and can reassure you that we will keep your details and contact you in the future should any suitable positions arise.

companySlogan: TALiNT’s Best Company to Work For/Recruiter’s Best Client Service/REC’s Best People Development/Global Rec Best Overseas
companyDescription:
Amoria Bond is an international, award-winning recruitment company dedicated to progressing lives through specialist staffing and recruitment solutions. 

With nearly 20 years’ experience, we connect businesses with skilled professionals across EMEA, North America and APAC to help build a greener, better future. 

We offer flexible, value-led services including freelance solutions, staff augmentation, and permanent recruitment, such as executive search, across the pioneering industries of Advanced Engineering, Technology and Energy. 

Our ambitious goal of progressing lives everywhere is deeply embedded in our culture. We hold ourselves accountable for meeting this goal through our PROFES values (Positivity, Respect, Ownership, Fun, Excellence, Success) and our Best Service Charter, which defines the standards we promise to clients, candidates, colleagues and our wider community. 

Our commitment goes beyond recruitment. Through the Amoria Bond Charitable Trust, we've donated over £946,000 to global causes, partnered with Project Peru for 15+ years, planted 163,395 trees, and organised numerous local CSR initiatives annually.  

Our employee-led culture is built on development and progression, supported by a transparent 10-step progression plan, multi-channel training for all levels, and personal development budgets. The results speak for themselves: 90% of our leaders began as trainees, 89 promotions over the last year, and 16 awards won for our learning and development programmes. 

Thanks to our people-first approach, best service commitment and steady growth, we’ve received multiple accolades, including APSCo DE’s Staffing Company of the Year (2024), and featured for the seventh year running in the Recruiter Hot 100 (2025).

title: Medior Full-Stack Product Engineer (Startup, SaaS, Amsterdam)
descriptionHtml:
Over 2 million food & beverage (F&B) businesses operate in the EU.


60% face failure within their first year


80% in five years.


SOUS is here to change that.


We’re building a platform that empowers independent F&B creators to thrive—unlocking new revenue streams, cutting costs, and scaling online growth with ease. From e-commerce to delivery management to building loyal communities, we’re reimagining how independent F&B brands grow in a digital-first world.


In just two years, we’ve scaled rapidly, onboarded top talent, and brought in over €8M in sales for our clients. Now, we’re evolving—transitioning to a SaaS-first model that will shape the future of the €100B independent F&B market.


To make this vision a reality, we’re searching for a Senior Full-Stack Product Engineer who’s as excited about building great products as they are about leading a team. If you’re ready to roll up your sleeves, write brilliant code, and influence the technical direction of a high-growth startup, we’d love to meet you.


Tasks

Code, Build, and Ship



  • Develop and refine our core backend (Django) and frontend (React + TypeScript).

  • Create and improve APIs for users, orders, shipping, and partner tools.

  • Build smart integrations with tools like Shopify and Mendrix.

  • Set the bar for code quality, testing (TDD/BDD), and CI/CD workflows.

  • Identify opportunities to innovate and improve.


Requirements

Hands-On Experience:



  • You’ve been in the trenches as a full-stack developer for 3+ years, and you’re fluent in Python (Django).

  • You’ve built SaaS applications that are battle-tested in production.

  • Your database game is strong—PostgreSQL and ORMs are second nature to you.


Smart Development Practices:



  • Testing isn’t just a buzzword for you—it’s how you build (Pytest, React Testing Library).

  • You’re fluent in Git workflows and CI/CD tools (e.g., Bitbucket Pipelines).


API experience:



  • Experience in building and integrating APIs—whether it’s RESTful APIs, JWT Auth, or third-party tools like Shopify and Mendrix.


Frontend Know-How:



  • You know your way around React.


Bonus Points For:



  • Experience with Firebase (Auth, Hosting) or Google Analytics.

  • Building SaaS platforms and multi-tenant architectures.

  • A background in e-commerce, marketplaces, or scaling startups.


Benefits

Why SOUS?



  • Competitive Salary + Equity: €65k + options—you’ll grow with us.

  • Shape the Future: Your contributions will define what SOUS becomes.

  • Flexibility: While we’re primarily on-site, we value flexibility when it makes sense.

  • Passion-Driven Team: Join a group of foodies and techies who love solving big problems.

  • High Impact: Be part of a mission that’s changing the way F&B creators succeed.


What to Expect in the Hiring Process:



  1. A 60-minute intro call to get to know each other and learn more about the projects you've worked on.

  2. A take-home project (with a 90-minute review session).

  3. A 45-minute cultural alignment chat to see if we’re a match.


Ready to make an impact? Let’s build something incredible together.

Major F&B corporations are investing millions into digital tools to grow their business.

We’ve helped F&B creators generate millions in new sales and we’re now growing to help thousands more across Europe 👩‍🍳🚀

title: Web Frontend Engineer - JS, CSS, React, Flutter
descriptionHtml:
Canonical is a leading provider of open-source software and operating systems to the global enterprise and technology markets. Our platform, Ubuntu, is very widely used in breakthrough enterprise initiatives such as public cloud, data science, AI, engineering innovation and IoT. Our customers include the world's leading public cloud and silicon providers, and industry leaders in many sectors. The company is a pioneer of globally distributed collaboration, with 1100+ colleagues in 75+ countries and very few office-based roles. Teams meet two to four times yearly in person, in interesting locations around the world, to align on strategy and execution.

The company is founder-led, profitable and growing.

We are hiring a Web/UI Engineer to develop a data-rich and reliable user experience. These frontends are constructed using JS, CSS, React, and Flutter, and serve as Canonical's enterprise products that act as the company's face to our users.

In order to create consistency across our products and sites, we have a central team that builds an open-source React toolkit and presentation layer, the Vanilla Framework. We are excited to develop this further and see if we can help more open-source projects build performant and accessible interfaces that respond well to diverse layouts. We use REST APIs for communication, and we consider API design an important part of the process.

Flutter is a new front-end technology that has the potential to unify our desktop and web development. We are growing the team's exposure to Flutter and have roles on both web and Ubuntu engineering for this specialism.

We hire developers with outstanding academic results and a passion for open-source software, innovation, and cutting-edge web technologies. In these roles, you will have the opportunity to make significant contributions through high-quality, front-end and back-end code while exhibiting technical leadership, exceptional design, and intuitive user experience.

Additionally, we encourage colleagues to engage with the broader open-source community. We're looking for individuals who can help build a thriving community, contribute to a broad range of technologies, and ensure seamless software operations at scale.

Location: This is a Globally remote role.

The role entails

  • Design and implement well-tested and documented software in Web technologies or Flutter.
  • Debug and fix issues encountered by your users
  • Participate in our engineering process through code and architectural reviews
  • Collaborate with community and colleagues on technical specifications
  • Contribute to technical documentation to make it the best of its kind
  • Seek improvements to engineering and operations practices
  • Deploy and operate services developed by the team
  • Contribute to the success of your product through technical advocacy

What we are looking for in you

  • An exceptional academic track record from both high school and university
  • Undergraduate degree in Computer Science or STEM, or a compelling narrative about your alternative path
  • Drive and a track record of going above and beyond expectations
  • Well-organised, self-starting and able to deliver to schedule
  • Professional manner in interacting with colleagues, partners, and community
  • Experience designing and writing high-quality Web technologies
  • Experience with and passion for Typescript, React or Flutter
  • An eye for accessibility and performance
  • Professional written and spoken English
  • Experience with Linux (Debian or Ubuntu preferred)
  • Excellent interpersonal skills, curiosity, flexibility, and accountability
  • Passion, thoughtfulness, and self-motivation
  • Excellent communication and presentation skills
  • Result-oriented, with a personal drive to meet commitments
  • Ability to travel twice a year, for company events for up to two weeks each

Nice-to-have skills

  • Experience with container tech such as LXD, Docker and Kubernetes
  • Attention to detail concerning user-centric UI development
  • REST API design, development and governance
  • Performance engineering and security experience

What we offer colleagues

We consider geographical location, experience, and performance in shaping compensation worldwide. We revisit compensation annually (and more often for graduates and associates) to ensure we recognise outstanding performance. In addition to base pay, we offer a performance-driven annual bonus or commission. We provide all team members with additional benefits, which reflect our values and ideals. We balance our programs to meet local needs and ensure fairness globally.

  • Distributed work environment with twice-yearly team sprints in person
  • Personal learning and development budget of USD 2,000 per year
  • Annual compensation review
  • Recognition rewards
  • Annual holiday leave
  • Maternity and paternity leave
  • Employee Assistance Programme
  • Opportunity to travel to new locations to meet colleagues
  • Priority Pass, and travel upgrades for long-haul company events

About Canonical

Canonical is a pioneering tech firm at the forefront of the global move to open source. As the company that publishes Ubuntu, one of the most important open source projects and the platform for AI, IoT and the cloud, we are changing the world of software. We recruit on a global basis and set a very high standard for people joining the company. We expect excellence - in order to succeed, we need to be the best at what we do. Most colleagues at Canonical have worked from home since its inception in 2004. Working here is a step into the future, and will challenge you to think differently, work smarter, learn new skills, and raise your game.

Canonical is an equal-opportunity employer

We are proud to foster a workplace free from discrimination. Diversity of experience, perspectives, and background creates a better work environment and better products. Whatever your identity, we will give your application fair consideration.

We recruit on a global basis and set a very high standard for people joining the company. We expect excellence - in order to succeed, we need to be the best at what we do. Most colleagues at Canonical have worked from home since its inception in 2004. Working here is a step into the future, and will challenge you to think differently, work smarter, learn new skills, and raise your game.Canonical is an equal-opportunity employerWe are proud to foster a workplace free from discrimination. Diversity of experience, perspectives, and background creates a better work environment and better products. Whatever your identity, we will give your application fair consideration.
companySlogan: Enterprise open source, secured and delivered by the publisher of Ubuntu.
companyDescription:
We deliver open source to the world faster,  more securely and more cost effectively than any other company.

We're also the publishers of Ubuntu, the world’s most popular enterprise Linux from cloud to edge, together with a passionate global community of 200,000+ contributors. 

Ubuntu means 'humanity to others'​. We chose it because it embodies the generosity at the heart of open source, the new normal for platforms and innovation.

Together with a community of 200,000, we publish an operating system that runs from the tiny connected devices up to the world's biggest mainframes, the platform that everybody uses on the public cloud, and the workstation experience of the world's most productive developers.

Secure and reliable, elegant and intuitive, and open for innovation - this is the future of open source, which is why we're proud to be the developers of the fastest growing Linux in the world despite already being the most widely deployed.

If you're interested in a career at Canonical, we are a remote-first company so please apply to any suitable role as skills are valued more than location, despite some having a preferred geographic preference. 

www.canonical.com

title: PHP Back-End Developer - AFS Energy
descriptionHtml:
Job Description

About the company

AFS Energy is an international-oriented scale-up in the heart of Amsterdam. We deal with opportunities and developments in Renewable Energy every day and are at the forefront of enabling organizations to achieve their sustainability goals.

We are always on a mission to make our ideas, products, and opportunities a great success. Our Energy team is existing of ambitious Brokers, Consultants, Analysts, and dedicated support teams. With more than 1.450 clients worldwide, activity in 50+ countries, and a workforce of more than 175 colleagues with 25+ different nationalities, we continue to focus on growth within the world of Environmental commodities.

At AFS Energy, our values drive how we work and grow together. We are committed to being knowledgeable in our field, collaborative in our approach, entrepreneurial in our mindset, accurate in our execution, and ethical in all our dealings.

About The Role

We are searching for a PHP Back-End Developer who is eager to learn, result-driven, and a critical-thinker ready to grow their skills by diving into complexities. The role is part of a growing team that developed the first easy-to-access trading platform for SMEs compliant to European Emissions Allowances (EUAs). The back-end developer will contribute to building features with user impact, help maintain the codebase, collaborate with various stakeholders, and learn about ensuring the scalability and performance of our systems to support business growth. The ideal candidate has a passion for solving technical challenges, and a collaborative mindset to work closely with product managers, front-end developers, and other stakeholders.

If you thrive in an innovative environment where your contributions directly influence the success of the platform and its users, we encourage you to join our team and help shape the future of sustainable trading solutions.

Job requirements

  • 5+ working experience as a Back-End Developer.
  • Some experience in developing web applications.
  • A foundational understanding of Object-Oriented Programming concepts – experience with PHP is a plus, but we welcome enthusiastic learners familiar with other OOP languages.
  • Familiarity with or eagerness to learn frameworks such as Symfony.
  • Fluency in English – written & verbal.
  • An aptitude for understanding business logic and the drive to learn how to translate it effectively into working code.
  • Good communication skills and the ability to work collaboratively within a team and with different stakeholders.


Your Skills And Experiences

  • Some working experience or strong foundational knowledge of PHP. Familiarity with Linux is beneficial, along with an understanding of or interest in containers and cloud solutions.
  • Team player, open to collaboration, and ability to work effectively within distributed teams.
  • Ability to take ownership of assigned tasks through to completion and a proactive approach to learning how to solve problems.
  • Familiarity with or willingness to learn agile development practices, including tools like Git.
  • Contributing to the design, building, and maintenance of APIs, services, and systems that support AFS Energy’s internal teams, with guidance from senior developers.


Our tech stack

  • PHP 8.3
  • Symfony
  • API-Platform
  • GraphQL
  • Postgres


Join our team and play an important role in driving the energy transition by contributing to simplifying the complexities of the environmental commodity markets.

Get in touch!

Are you ready for a new challenge at the Amsterdam Stock Exchange? Please send your résumé through the application link. For further questions, feel free to reach out to snihot@afsgroup.nl. Since this is a junior role we expect you to add a link to a portfolio website or github page.

Application process

1st round: Job interview with the Recruitment team

2nd round: Job interview with Development Team

3rd round: Case study and interview with the Operations line.

Note

We handle our recruitment in-house and do not require assistance from external parties. Any unsolicited résumés received from unaffiliated recruitment agencies will be treated as direct applications.

companyDescription:
AFS Energy is a leading intermediary operating in the sustainability and renewable energy market. We value long-term relationships and guide organisations towards climate solutions.

We support our clients in understanding new regulations and compliance requisites. Through proactive cooperation, our advisors offer tailor-made solutions. We help you understand how the environmental commodity markets operate and how to reap the most benefits.

AFS Energy provides you with market access, the latest products and market updates, all within the right regulatory and compliance frameworks.

title: Senior Full-Stack developer
descriptionHtml:
Friva ontwikkelt slimme software waarmee makelaarskantoren dagelijks duizenden woningzoekers efficiënt kunnen bedienen. Dankzij onze tools besparen binnendienstteams enorm veel tijd bij het plannen van bezichtigingen.


Wat ga je doen

  • Werken aan onze Laravel-applicatie en front-end (Blade, vanilla JavaScript, jQuery en Vue.js).
  • Nieuwe features ontwerpen en bouwen samen met het productteam.
  • Bestaande codebases optimaliseren en schaalbare oplossingen neerzetten.
  • Meedenken over de technische roadmap en architectuurkeuzes.
  • Beheren en verbeteren van onze eigen cloudomgeving (meerdere VPS’en).

Wat we zoeken

  • Hands-on senior full-stack developer met minimaal 4 jaar ervaring in Laravel en gedegen kennis van JavaScript.
  • Ervaring met REST-API’s en MySQL.
  • Ervaring met het uitlezen van mailboxen via IMAP of via API-koppelingen met OAuth is wenselijk.
  • Sterke kennis van software-architectuur en het bouwen van schaalbare multi-tenant applicaties.
  • Kennis van CI/CD-processen, werken via SSH en versiebeheer met Bitbucket is een duidelijke pré.
  • Pré: gevoel voor UX/UI-design en oog voor een goede gebruikerservaring.
  • Teamspeler die zelfstandig kan werken en graag verantwoordelijkheid neemt.
  • Vloeiende beheersing van Nederlands en Engels (spreken en schrijven).

Wat we bieden

  • Salaris: €5.000 – €7.500 bruto per maand (afhankelijk van ervaring).
  • Werkplek: ons kantoor in Haarlem en – na de proeftijd – maximaal 2 dagen per week remote.
  • Tech-stack: Laravel, Tailwind, MySQL, Bitbucket.
  • 20 vakantiedagen en reiskostenvergoeding.
  • MacBook en een goede monitor.
  • Een klein, hecht team met veel ruimte voor eigen ideeën en directe impact.

Sollicitatieproces

  1. Telefonisch voorgesprek – korte kennismaking (ca. 20 min).
  2. Eerste gesprek – uitgebreid interview bij ons op kantoor.
  3. Tweede gesprek + opdracht – verdiepende technische sessie met een kleine praktijkopdracht.
  4. Aanbod arbeidsvoorwaarden – we bespreken het contractvoorstel en de arbeidsvoorwaarden.
  5. Tekenen – je ondertekent de arbeidsovereenkomst en we plannen je startdatum.

Over Friva

Friva is een ambitieus SaaS-bedrijf dat makelaarskantoren helpt hun processen te automatiseren en woningzoekers een soepele ervaring te bieden. Met duizenden aanvragen per dag zijn we een belangrijke schakel in de Nederlandse vastgoedmarkt – en we groeien snel.

Interesse?

Stuur je CV en (optioneel) een korte motivatie naar info@friva.nl

Let op: Acquisitie of andere vormen van bemiddeling of outsourcing naar aanleiding van deze vacature wordt niet op prijs gesteld.

companySlogan: Transform your real estate agency 🏢 with automated customer contact🤖 💬 and streamlined housing applications🏠✅
companyDescription:
Friva was born out of a passion for real estate and a desire to help estate agents work more efficiently and effectively in a hectic market🌪️ . Combining more than a decade of experience in real estate agency🏘️and leading software development 💻 we have created a platform that transforms🔄 customer contact, simplifies the handling of housing applications🔍✉️and unlocks new revenue opportunities💰. Our in-house IT team continues to innovate🔧🚀, with a clear focus on our clients' needs 🎯. Find out how Friva can help your office take the next step in property excellence🌟.

🏠 Specialists in Real Estate Software At Friva, we combine deep experience in real estate agency with cutting-edge software solutions, resulting in a platform made by real estate agents, for real estate agents. 

🚀 Transformation in Customer Contact Our bespoke software offers a revolution in customer contact, from streamlined property enquiries to automated email communication, enabling estate agents to save up to 50% time in customer interactions. 

🔍 Crystal clear overview Say goodbye to an overflowing inbox and manual management. With Friva, brokers have an overview of interested clients and scheduled viewings at a glance, even in the most hectic property markets. 

💡 Innovation at the Core Constantly listening to our customers' needs, our in-house IT team continues to look for innovative opportunities and ways to keep our software up-to-date and ahead of the market. 

🤝 Real Expertise Led by founders Boyd and Marcellino, who together have more than a decade of experience in brokerage, Friva is poised to reshape and strengthen the way brokers interact with clients. 

Get in touch to discover how Friva can transform your brokerage!

title: Fullstack Typescript developer
descriptionHtml:
Werken voor een health-tech scale-up in de zorg?


Onze klant bouwt een platform dat zorgorganisaties helpt slimmer om te gaan met hun flexibele personeel. Het doel: zorgkosten verlagen, minder tijd kwijt zijn aan planning en personeelstekorten sneller opvangen.


Het platform koppelt zorgorganisaties aan hun flexpool, uitzendbureaus en regionale partners. Zo wordt handmatig werk geautomatiseerd en krijgen patiënten de zorg die ze nodig hebben. Denk aan integraties met planningssystemen, HR, elektronische cliëntendossiers en externe leveranciers.


De sfeer is informeel en er is veel ruimte voor initiatief. Er wordt gewerkt in cycles van zes weken: geen eindeloze backlog, maar duidelijke doelen, focus en echte impact.


Wat ga je doen?

Je wordt onderdeel van een productteam van zeven mensen. Samen ontwikkelen jullie nieuwe features, verbeteren jullie de schaalbaarheid en zorgen jullie dat het platform technisch top blijft.


De nadruk ligt op programmeren (TypeScript, NodeJS, Express, GraphQL, PostgreSQL, React, GCP), maar er is ook ruimte om door te groeien richting een leidende rol. In het begin werk je vooral aan code, later pak je ook de champion-rol: projecten leiden, richting geven en beslissingen nemen samen met het team.


Je bent betrokken bij het hele proces: van solution design tot development, reviews, integratietesten en het implementeren van standaarden. Er wordt gewerkt met een vier-ogen-principe: elke pull request wordt getest en gereviewd, zodat de kwaliteit hoog blijft en iedereen van elkaar leert.


Kortom: je bouwt niet alleen software, maar helpt ook mee om het team en het product naar een hoger niveau te tillen.


Wat moet je kunnen?

  • Minimaal 5 jaar ervaring als developer
  • Ervaring met het bouwen en schalen van softwareapplicaties
  • Ervaring met Node.js, Express, MongoDB of PostgreSQL en cloud (AWS of GCP)
  • Ervaring met integratietests, unit-tests en code reviews
  • Ervaring met DDD of interesse hierin
  • Kennis van event-driven architectuur is een plus
  • Ambitie om door te groeien richting een leidende rol
  • Sterke communicatieve vaardigheden en pragmatische aanpak


Wat krijg je ervoor terug?

  • Een jaarsalaris tussen €52.000 en €72.000, afhankelijk van ervaring
  • Hybride werken: 2 dagen op kantoor in Amsterdam, de rest vrij in te delen
  • Vanaf 32 uur per week mogelijk
  • 10% van je werktijd voor persoonlijke ontwikkeling met een mentor (training, conferenties, side-projects, etc.)
  • Laptop of Macbook naar keuze, plus alle hardware/software die jij nodig hebt
  • Warme lunch op kantoor
  • 25 vakantiedagen (meer in overleg altijd mogelijk)
  • Thuiswerkvergoeding
  • Een klein team met korte lijnen, veel vrijheid en echte verantwoordelijkheid


Klinkt dit als jouw volgende stap? Klik snel op solliciteren of mail naar l.verweij@haystackpeople.nl of bel/app naar +31 6 20293364.

companySlogan: We can find a needle in a haystack
companyDescription:
Haystack People is a trusted recruitment agency specializing in the mediation of ambitious IT professionals. Since every organization and vacancy requires a different approach, we offer customized services. By making clear agreements with our partners in combination with our high-quality recruitment methodology, we manage to win the "War for Talent" every time.

Are you looking for a job as CTO of a Tech Scale-up? Do you need a Scrum Master for your development team? Want to work with the latest technology as a Frontend Developer or hire a new developer? We only work with the most attractive organizations and know how to make the best matches through our specialist network!

Contact us to see how we can help you as a job seeker or employer.

title: Software Development Engineer IV (Full Stack)
descriptionHtml:
About Learneo
Learneo is a platform of builder-driven businesses, including Course Hero, CliffsNotes, LitCharts, Quillbot, Symbolab, and Scribbr, all united around a shared mission of supercharging productivity and learning for everyone. We attract and scale high growth businesses built and run by visionary entrepreneurs. Each team innovates independently but has a unique opportunity to collaborate, experiment, and grow together, and they are supported by centralized corporate operations functions, including HR, Finance and Legal.

About QuillBot
QuillBot was founded in 2017 with a mission to help students and professionals—especially those learning English—strengthen their writing. Today, we help over 56 million people around the world create great things. Whether you're writing, designing, coding, or collaborating, QuillBot is a place where anyone can create at the speed of thought. Our AI-powered tools help you think clearly, communicate effectively, and create beautifully—across every platform, in any format, at any skill level. If you're passionate about using technology to make the path from inspiration to execution more accessible, intentional, and relevant, come join us.

Role Overview
We’re looking for a Software Development Engineer IV (Full Stack) with strengths in backend systems and frontend architecture. You’ll help shape how we build our writing and editing tool, ensuring it is modular, scalable, extensible, and maintainable as we continue adding features.

On the backend, you’ll design APIs and services that integrate seamlessly into the editor while supporting millions of users. On the frontend, you’ll bring structure and clarity — building modular, performant systems that make the editor easy to extend and maintain. You’ll thrive in environments with ambiguity, where not everything is fully defined yet, and where strong product thinking and design sense help shape the right solution.

Responsibilities

  • Architect and implement modular backend systems and APIs that power the writing and editing experience.
  • Shape the frontend architecture, ensuring it is modular, scalable, and capable of supporting complex editing workflows.
  • Build user-facing features (React, TypeScript, CSS) with a strong emphasis on UX and performance.
  • Ensure excellent developer experience (DX) by writing clean, self-documented, and reusable code.
  • Balance backend flexibility with maintainability, designing systems that empower frontend teams to move quickly.
  • Collaborate closely with product managers, designers, and engineers to shape both technical architecture and product experience.
  • Prototype quickly, iterate often, and bring clarity to evolving product ideas.
  • Mentor teammates and raise the bar on technical and architectural decision-making.

Qualifications

  • 7+ years of professional full-stack production experience.
  • Proven experience designing scalable APIs and modular backend systems.
  • Strong frontend expertise (React, TypeScript, design systems, performance optimization).
  • Experience structuring complex frontend applications (e.g., editors, dashboards, or large-scale products).
  • Strong practices in testing, documentation, and code quality.
  • Excellent communication and collaboration skills in cross-functional teams.

Bonus Points

  • An eye for design and UX — translating product ideas and mocks into polished user experiences.
  • Experience with design systems and component-driven development.
  • Comfort working in ambiguous, evolving product spaces where iteration is the norm.
  • Strong sense of product ownership and ability to think from the user’s perspective.
  • Previous experience in SaaS, AI-powered products, or large-scale platforms.

Benefits & Perks

  • Competitive salary & annual bonus
  • Pension plan through the Zwitserleven Pension Fund
  • A minimum of 33 days paid time off (including 7 public holidays and a day off on your birthday)
  • A yearly personal development budget of €500
  • Free consultations at OpenUp
  • Discount and extra credits on a ClassPass monthly subscription
  • A remote-friendly culture, including working abroad for up to 3 months
  • The flexibility to work from home, including a monthly working from home allowance of €60 per month
  • Parenthood: minimum of 6 weeks fully paid partner leave & 16 weeks fully paid maternity leave
  • Travel allowance: (NS business card or kilometre allowance of €0.23/km)
  • Healthy lunch and snacks at the office
  • Employee referral program
  • Premium access to QuillBot & LanguageTooler

*Benefits and benefit amounts differ by region. A comprehensive list applicable to your region will be provided in your interview process. 

Research shows that candidates from underrepresented backgrounds often don't apply for roles if they don't meet all the criteria. We strongly encourage you to apply if you're interested: we'd love to learn how you can amplify our team with your unique experience!

This role is eligible for hire in Netherlands.

We are a virtual-first company and have employees dispersed throughout the United States, Canada, India, Israel, Germany, and the Netherlands. We have a market-based pay structure that varies by location. The base pay for this position is dependent on multiple factors, including candidate experience and expertise, and may vary from the amounts listed. You may also be eligible to participate in our bonus program and may be offered benefits, and other types of compensation.

#Learneo


In accordance with Dutch law, the base salary for this role if filled within Netherlands is as follows.  

Netherlands Pay Range: €85.000 EUR - €115.000 EUR

Equal ​Employment Opportunity Statement ​(EEO)

We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity and ​inclusion within our company.  ​We will consider all qualified applicants without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, sex, gender ​identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, age, marital status, ​veteran status, or ​ability status. We will ensure that individuals who are differently abled are provided reasonable accommodation to participate in the job application or interview process, to perform essential job functions, and to receive other benefits and privileges of employment as provided to other applicants or employees. Please contact us to request accommodation.
descriptionText: About LearneoLearneo is a platform of builder-driven businesses, including Course Hero, CliffsNotes, LitCharts, Quillbot, Symbolab, and Scribbr, all united around a shared mission of supercharging productivity and learning for everyone. We attract and scale high growth businesses built and run by visionary entrepreneurs. Each team innovates independently but has a unique opportunity to collaborate, experiment, and grow together, and they are supported by centralized corporate operations functions, including HR, Finance and Legal. About QuillBotQuillBot was founded in 2017 with a mission to help students and professionals—especially those learning English—strengthen their writing. Today, we help over 56 million people around the world create great things. Whether you're writing, designing, coding, or collaborating, QuillBot is a place where anyone can create at the speed of thought. Our AI-powered tools help you think clearly, communicate effectively, and create beautifully—across every platform, in any format, at any skill level. If you're passionate about using technology to make the path from inspiration to execution more accessible, intentional, and relevant, come join us.Role OverviewWe’re looking for a Software Development Engineer IV (Full Stack) with strengths in backend systems and frontend architecture. You’ll help shape how we build our writing and editing tool, ensuring it is modular, scalable, extensible, and maintainable as we continue adding features.On the backend, you’ll design APIs and services that integrate seamlessly into the editor while supporting millions of users. On the frontend, you’ll bring structure and clarity — building modular, performant systems that make the editor easy to extend and maintain. You’ll thrive in environments with ambiguity, where not everything is fully defined yet, and where strong product thinking and design sense help shape the right solution.ResponsibilitiesArchitect and implement modular backend systems and APIs that power the writing and editing experience.Shape the frontend architecture, ensuring it is modular, scalable, and capable of supporting complex editing workflows.Build user-facing features (React, TypeScript, CSS) with a strong emphasis on UX and performance.Ensure excellent developer experience (DX) by writing clean, self-documented, and reusable code.Balance backend flexibility with maintainability, designing systems that empower frontend teams to move quickly.Collaborate closely with product managers, designers, and engineers to shape both technical architecture and product experience.Prototype quickly, iterate often, and bring clarity to evolving product ideas.Mentor teammates and raise the bar on technical and architectural decision-making.Qualifications7+ years of professional full-stack production experience.Proven experience designing scalable APIs and modular backend systems.Strong frontend expertise (React, TypeScript, design systems, performance optimization).Experience structuring complex frontend applications (e.g., editors, dashboards, or large-scale products).Strong practices in testing, documentation, and code quality.Excellent communication and collaboration skills in cross-functional teams.Bonus PointsAn eye for design and UX — translating product ideas and mocks into polished user experiences.Experience with design systems and component-driven development.Comfort working in ambiguous, evolving product spaces where iteration is the norm.Strong sense of product ownership and ability to think from the user’s perspective.Previous experience in SaaS, AI-powered products, or large-scale platforms.Benefits & PerksCompetitive salary & annual bonusPension plan through the Zwitserleven Pension FundA minimum of 33 days paid time off (including 7 public holidays and a day off on your birthday)A yearly personal development budget of €500Free consultations at OpenUpDiscount and extra credits on a ClassPass monthly subscriptionA remote-friendly culture, including working abroad for up to 3 monthsThe flexibility to work from home, including a monthly working from home allowance of €60 per monthParenthood: minimum of 6 weeks fully paid partner leave & 16 weeks fully paid maternity leaveTravel allowance: (NS business card or kilometre allowance of €0.23/km)Healthy lunch and snacks at the officeEmployee referral programPremium access to QuillBot & LanguageTooler*Benefits and benefit amounts differ by region. A comprehensive list applicable to your region will be provided in your interview process. Research shows that candidates from underrepresented backgrounds often don't apply for roles if they don't meet all the criteria. We strongly encourage you to apply if you're interested: we'd love to learn how you can amplify our team with your unique experience!This role is eligible for hire in Netherlands.We are a virtual-first company and have employees dispersed throughout the United States, Canada, India, Israel, Germany, and the Netherlands. We have a market-based pay structure that varies by location. The base pay for this position is dependent on multiple factors, including candidate experience and expertise, and may vary from the amounts listed. You may also be eligible to participate in our bonus program and may be offered benefits, and other types of compensation.#Learneo In accordance with Dutch law, the base salary for this role if filled within Netherlands is as follows.  Netherlands Pay Range: €85.000 EUR - €115.000 EUR Equal ​Employment Opportunity Statement ​(EEO)We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity and ​inclusion within our company.  ​We will consider all qualified applicants without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, sex, gender ​identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, age, marital status, ​veteran status, or ​ability status. We will ensure that individuals who are differently abled are provided reasonable accommodation to participate in the job application or interview process, to perform essential job functions, and to receive other benefits and privileges of employment as provided to other applicants or employees. Please contact us to request accommodation.
companySlogan: Pioneering a platform of builder-driven productivity and learning businesses.
companyDescription: Learneo is pioneering a platform of productivity and learning businesses. The platform of businesses includes CliffsNotes, the original and iconic study guide company; Course Hero, an online learning platform of academic resources; LanguageTool, a multilingual writing platform; LitCharts, a creator of literature resources; QuillBot, an AI-powered writing companion; Scribbr, a multilingual academic proofreading service; StudentBrands, a suite of supplemental learning technologies; and Symbolab, an AI-based mathematics resource. The company has office hubs in the U.S., Canada, Germany, Israel, India, and the Netherlands.

title: Fullstack developer (Laravel, Vue, Nuxt, NextJS) bij AI development agency
descriptionHtml:
Wil jij deel uitmaken van een revolutie in softwareontwikkeling? Bij SevenLab geloven we in de kracht van AI om de toekomst vorm te geven. Met onze unieke Software Development As A Service methode nemen we alle frustraties van traditionele softwareontwikkeling weg en realiseren we cutting edge (gen)AI toepassingen.


We zijn op zoek naar een getalenteerde Fullstack Developer (backend ervaring, Vue) die ons team komt versterken en meewerkt aan innovatieve AI-oplossingen voor onze klanten.


Taken

  • Ontwikkelen van schaalbare en krachtige (AI) applicaties met behulp van het Vue-framework

  • Samenwerken met ons team van ongeveer 15 collega's aan end-to-end AI-applicatieontwikkeling

  • Incidenteel gebruik van low-code platforms zoals n8n i.c.m. je fullcode ervaring en skills

  • Vertalen van complexe AI-concepten naar praktische toepassingen voor onze klanten

  • Bijdragen aan het continu verbeteren van onze Software Development As A Service methode


Vereisten

  • Minimaal 3 jaar ervaring met fullstack ontwikkeling, waarvan minstens 2 jaar met met een backend taal zoals nextjs, nuxt, node, laravel

  • Sterke kennis van JavaScript (bij voorkeur ervaring met Vue of Angular), HTML en CSS

  • Kennis van en ervaring met backend frameworks

  • Ervaring met het ontwerpen en implementeren van RESTful API's

  • Bekend met versiebeheer

  • Goede beheersing van de Nederlandse en Engelse taal in woord en geschrift

  • Ervaring met AI-technologieën zoals Machine Learning is een pré

  • Proactieve en klantgerichte instelling

  • Analytisch sterk en in staat om complexe problemen op te lossen


Benefits

  • 28 vakantiedagen per jaar

  • Pensioenregeling

  • Super SevenLab dagen waar we leuke innovatieve projecten oppakken

  • Fantastisch leuk team om mee samen te werken

  • Mogelijkheid om je expertise in cutting-edge AI-technologieën te vergroten

  • Werken aan uitdagende en impactvolle projecten voor toonaangevende klanten


Ben jij de Fullstack Developer die we zoeken? Solliciteer dan nu en laat ons zien wat jou uniek maakt! Bij SevenLab bekijken we de kandidaten zorgvuldig.


Als je wordt uitgenodigd, krijg je eerst een korte remote kennismaking. Daarna nodigen we je uit op ons kantoor voor een persoonlijk gesprek en een assessment. We kijken ernaar uit om je te ontmoeten en samen de toekomst van AI-softwareontwikkeling vorm te geven!

companyDescription: From specialised AI agents and custom AI-powered tools to private AI infra. With clear monthly pricing and quick results, you get AI that actually works from day one.

title: Medior Full-Stack JavaScript Developer
descriptionHtml:
Medior Full-Stack JavaScript Developer bij Amdax - Amsterdam

Wij zoeken een Medior Full-Stack JavaScript Developer met een sterke focus op CMS-development voor het beheer en de doorontwikkeling van onze websites. Je werkt primair met Craft CMS en integreert het met onze frontends in React/Next.js. Je zorgt ervoor dat onze CMS-oplossingen schaalbaar, efficiënt en gebruiksvriendelijk zijn en dat contentteams moeiteloos kunnen werken. Ervaring met PHP is een pluspunt.

Wat ga je doen?

  • Beheren en doorontwikkelen van het CMS achter de websites.
  • Ontwerpen en implementeren van oplossingen in Craft CMS voor flexibele contentbeheerfunctionaliteit.
  • Integreren van API’s en koppelingen tussen het CMS en externe systemen.
  • Bouwen van schaalbare frontend-componenten in React/Next.js.
  • Optimaliseren van de CMS-ervaring voor interne gebruikers.
  • Samenwerken met developers, UX/UI-designers en product owners in een agile werkomgeving.


Wat we jou bieden

  • €3.500 - €5.000 bruto p/m, afhankelijk van jouw kennis en ervaring
  • 8% vakantiegeld
  • Variabele beloning
  • 25 vakantiedagen
  • Laptop en headset
  • Amdax participatieregeling; word zelf ook aandeelhouder van Amdax!
  • Pensioenregeling in bitcoin
  • Reiskostenvergoeding incl. NS Business Card en/of leasefiets regeling
  • Flexibiliteit om vanuit huis te werken
  • Goede ontwikkel- en opleidingsmogelijkheden


Meer weten over Amdax, wat wij doen en wie wij zijn?

Neem dan een kijkje op https://werkenbij.amdax.com/

Solliciteren

Mocht deze functie goed bij jou passen, stuur dan ons jouw CV met een korte motivatie. We reageren snel, dus je hoeft niet lang in spanning te zitten!

In de regel hebben we met elke kandidaat 2 of 3 interviews, afhankelijk van de functie. We werken in onze interviews met een persoonlijkheidstest en afhankelijk van de functie is er ook een assessment, test of case die we aan jou zullen voorleggen. Als daar sprake van is laten we je dat meteen aan het begin van het proces weten.

Wat we zoeken

  • Minimaal 3 jaar ervaring als Full-Stack JavaScript Developer, met focus op CMS-development.
  • Ervaring met Craft CMS of een vergelijkbaar headless CMS.
  • Kennis van React, Next.js, TypeScript en Node.js.
  • Ervaring met MongoDB of PostgreSQL.
  • Bekend met RESTful & GraphQL API’s en integratie van third-party services.
  • Basiskennis van PHP is een grote plus.
  • Ervaring met Git, CI/CD en DevOps-principes.
  • Je hebt sterke communicatieve vaardigheden in zowel Nederlands als Engels, aangezien je samenwerkt met verschillende teams binnen de organisatie.
  • Zelfstandig, proactief en oplossingsgericht.
  • Fulltime beschikbaar (40 uur)

companySlogan: Leading Digital Asset House
companyDescription:
Based in the financial heart of Amsterdam, Amdax is dedicated to helping people invest in Bitcoin and digital assets. We provide private client services, access to market intelligence, and investment opportunities across a range of digital assets. Our services are always tailored to the unique circumstances of each client.

We pride ourselves on delivering an approach to our clients’ needs that is respectful of their privacy and fully compliant with all relevant regulations. With nearly a decade of experience in the blockchain sphere and years of regulatory diligence, our team is uniquely situated to guide our clients through the realm of digital assets. One of our greatest joys lies in sharing this knowledge and competitive edge with our clients.

title: Full Stack Developer bij Digital Chefs
descriptionHtml:
Word jij enthousiast van gevarieerde projecten voor (inter)nationale klanten? Wil jij bijdragen aan de persoonlijke ontwikkeling van duizenden personen? Wil jij werken aan software met weinig tot geen technical debt? En dit alles in een ambitieus en getalenteerd team? Zoek dan niet verder!


Digital Chefs is op zoek naar een ervaren full-stack developer die gemotiveerd is om zijn/haar passie & skills te steken in toekomstige projecten en daarbij onze missie deelt om digitaal leren te transformeren.


Over Digital Chefs


Even voorstellen. Wij zijn Digital Chefs, een team professionals met jaren ervaring in concept, design en development voor award-winnende digitale leeroplossingen. We bewijzen keer op keer dat goede digitale leeroplossingen een positieve impact hebben op organisaties en hun medewerkers. Onze missie is om lerende organisaties te ondersteunen bij hun Digital Learning Transformatie.


Taken

Jij gaat werken aan



  • Spannende & uitdagende projecten voor opdrachtgevers als KLM & Jumbo Supermarkten

  • Ons eigen merk en de daarbij horende software

  • Het up-to-date houden van onze documentatie en workflow


Enkele gebruikte technieken



  • React Native, React, Vue

  • HTML, CSS

  • Express

  • MySQL, MongoDB

  • AWS


Vereisten

Jouw ervaring



  • Minimaal 4 jaar ervaring als full-stack developer

  • Ervaring in technisch ontwerp, ontwikkeling en onderhoud van software

  • Ervaring met SCRUM

  • Je hebt oog voor detail en je werk is goed gestructureerd/georganiseerd


Je maakt indruk met



  • Verstand van agile ontwikkel methodieken

  • Een brede interesse die verder gaat dan software en technologie

  • Actieve betrokkenheid bij development communities

  • Een open karakter waarbij je snapt hoe je in een team moet werken


Benefits

Wat kunnen wij jou bieden



  • € 3.500 – € 7.000 bruto salaris per maand (afhankelijk van kennis en ervaring)

  • Een 40-urige werkweek (minder is bespreekbaar)

  • Een marktconforme arbeidsovereenkomst van aanzienlijke duur

  • Deelname aan ons Digital Chefs pensioenplan

  • Een jaarlijkse winstbonus

  • 26 vakantiedagen

  • Reiskostenvergoeding

  • De vrijheid om op afstand of op kantoor te werken (nabij Amsterdam Sloterdijk)

  • Alle hardware en software die je nodig hebt – of de mogelijkheid om je eigen hardware mee te nemen

  • Gratis dagelijkse lunch op kantoor
